title: 24pc Deluxe 50 Inch Aluminum Folding Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit with 30L Backpack
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation
current_seo_desc: Backpack Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Kit
description_html:
The ASR Outdoor 24piece Deluxe Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Kit comes with everything you need to strike it rich in one convenient place.

All of the items included fit neatly into a double-stitched canvas backpack that can hold up to 30 liters or 1830 cubic inches in volume. The included gold mining equipment is ready to deploy from your backpack; All you need to do is make sure your sluice box is level in the field. When extended in the stream the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place so that when removed it does not fold up and collapse without warning.

Best in quality components are included in the backpack sluice box kit to aid in maximizing your gold collecting in the field. The gold panning supplies included are for all experience levels of gold prospecting enthusiasts. The sluice box itself is made of highly durable materials, constructed from rust free aluminum. It includes miners moss and gold carpet that is preinstalled.

Extended Dimensions: 50" Length with a 9.25" Channel and 13.25" Flange
Folded Dimensions: 15" x 9.25" x 5" (L x W x H) 

In addition to the sluice box and the durable rucksack, we’ve included other gold panning tools and accessories that will aid in the extraction, processing and collection or storage of gold and other precious metals or gems.

KIT INCLUDES:

  • (1) 50" Folding sluice box
  • (1) 30L Canvas backpack
  • (1) 1/2" classifier screen 
  • (1) 12” dual riffle gold pan
  • (1) 10” dual riffle gold pan
  • (1) 10” single riffle gold pan
  • (1) Magnifying tweezers
  • (2) Large collection glass vials
  • (2) Small collection glass vials
  • (2) Backpack Attachment Carabiner Clips
  • (1) Folding pick axe shovel
  • (1) Claim Site Ribbon
  • (4) Fine Gold Water Tweezers
  • (2) Gold Snuffer Bottles
  • (4) Assorted bedrock crevice tool picks

When extended in the stream the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place so that when removed it does not fold up and collapse without warning. title: 20oz Rock Pick Mining Hammer, 11-inch Pointed Tip Gold Prospectors Tool
category: Hardware > Tools > Hammers
current_seo_desc: 20oz rock pick hammer 20oz geology mining tool rock hounding fossil digging gold prospecting masonry brick hammer construction contractor german nail stump game octoberfest hammerschlagen
description_html:
• SINGLE PIECE HARDENED STEEL: Extremely durable and able to withstand a constant pounding whether it is for rock hounding geology or gold prospecting

  • ANTI-FATIGUE RUBBER GRIP: Featuring a ergonomic molded handle designed to help reduce the pressure from the constant vibrations of repeated material striking while hunting for fossils

  • SQUARE FACE with PICK: Use the pointed tip pick to break open rock and loosen sediment while utilizing the hammer square face end to drive chisels splitting rocks

  • SPECIFICATIONS: Overall Length: 11.5 inches; Overall Weight: 32oz; Head Weight: 20oz; Provides the perfect balance and power-to-weight ratio to increase swing speed and intensify striking power

  • APPLICATIONS: Ideal for gold prospecting and fossil hunting this is an essential tool for a rock hounding, geologist, archaeologist, and hobbyist

 

The ASR Outdoor Rock Pick Hammer is a 11 inch pointed tip prospecting equipment tool created especially with prospectors, rock hounds, contractors and the everyday user sin mind. This heavy, well-balanced, 20 ounce head weight rock hammer is fully polished and forged of one piece of steel. There are no frills or hidden agendas; it is made to take a beating and dish one out.

This is a rugged and extremely durable, field-tested geology fossil finding tool that features unibody one piece forged steel construction with a dual face hammer head; a square face on one end and a pointed tip rock pick on the other. The GR-20 has an overall weight of 32 ounces, and is 11.5 inches in length, the head weighs 20 ounces giving it great balance and superior power-to-weight ratio allowing you to strike with precision and drive chisels into rocks with confidence, splitting them apart while on the hunt for gold, minerals and fossils. This Rock Pick Mining Hammer is a must-have geological tool that is ideal for any beginner gold prospector, university geology student or life-long rock hounding geologist professor, alike.

The ergonomic anti-shock injection molded handle makes it comfortable to hold and gives relief while absorbing the vibrations from the constant striking of material. Added head control is benefited from the handle being constructed from a firmer rubber grip while also providing against accidental slipping while in the field.

SPECIFICATIONS:

    Model: GR-20
    Overall Length: 11.5”
    Head Length: 7″
    Overall Weight: 32oz
    Head Weight: 20oz
    Rubberized Grip Handle
    Single Piece Forged Steel Construction

Hone in on your rock hounding and mineral gem collecting capabilities with the ASR Outdoor 20oz Rock Pick Hammer Prospector Mining Tool. This is an absolute must have for any prospector.

title: Multi Riffle Plastic Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Equipment, Green
category: Sporting Goods
current_seo_desc: Portable Backpack Gold Panning Sluice Box
description_html:
• HIGH YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: Four Molded Riffle Collection Trap Designs are Built in Through the Sediment Channel which Help You Effortlessly Collect more Flake and Nuggets; Hungarian, V-shape, Micro, and Square
  • MAXIMUM EFFICIENCY:  The Entire Gold Panning Sluice Box is 30 inches in Length with a 10-inch Wide Riffle Channel; 3-inch High Channel Walls; 16 inch Flared Opening Designed to Increase the Volume of Water Entering the Riffled Sediment Channel, While Increasing the Flow Rate though the Sluice Box
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made to be used. Designed to be portable the sluice box for gold prospecting is lightweight made from high-impact ABS plastic. It will never rust and can withstand the harshest environments
  • EFFORTLESS USE: Ready to deploy. All you need to do is make sure your sluice box is level in the field. The multi-riffle sediment channel finds gold fast, making this Ideal for gold panning beginners

The ASR Outdoor Gold Panning 30-inch Portable Gold Sluice Box is a gravity fed high recovery gold prospecting and mineral collection tool. Extremely portable with an adjustable shoulder strap allowing you to take it to the mouth of the river, high into the mountains, near the base of a waterfall or anywhere in between. Weighing only 7lbs, made from high-impact durable plastic, this sluice box will never rust and can be used even in the harshest of climates without worry. 

Molded into the channel of the ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Sluice Box is a (4) different sets of sediment riffle traps featuring tried and true riffle designs to maximize the amount of gold that is separated from your pay dirt, they are; Hungarian, V-shape, Micro, and Square. This combination will in-turn, increase the amount of gold you separate out from your paydirt prospecting material you've collected, simplifying the separating process of your sediment and maximizing your efficiency.

The Gold Sluice Box is 30 inches in length with a 10 inch wide channel and has 3 inch high channel walls to keep all your valuable, high yielding gold pay dirt confined and flowing over the riffle collection traps. The mouth of the Gold Prospecting Sluice Box features a 16 inch flared opening designed to increase the volume of water entering the prospecting channel thus increasing the flow rate through the Sluice Box. The Sluice Box is manufactured from green ABS High-Impact plastic allowing for maximum clarity and easy spotting or identifying of gold flakes, nuggets, gems, or your choice mineral.

To increase your gold collection efforts, use the ASR Outdoor Material Classifier Screens to sort your sediment before utilizing the Gravity Trap Riffled Sluice Box for gold prospecting.

title: 7pc Beginner Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit with Gold Prospecting Equipment (Aluminum or Plastic)
category: Sporting Goods
current_seo_desc: ASR Outdoor Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Kit Pan Vial Snifter Trowel Tweezer 7pc
description_html:
• HIGH-YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: Four Molded Riffle Collection Trap Designs are Built in Through the Sediment Channel which Help You Effortlessly Collect more Flake and Nuggets; Hungarian, V-shape, Micro and Square

  • 50" FOLDING ALUMINUM SLUICE BOX: The entire sluice Box is 32 inches in Length with a 10-inch Wide Riffle Channel; 3-inch High Channel Walls; 16 inch Flared Opening Designed to Increase the Volume of Water Entering the Riffled Sediment Channel, While Increasing the Flow Rate though the Sluice Box

  • 32" FIXED PLASTIC SLUICE BOX: The Entire Sluice Box is 32 inches in Length with a 10-inch Wide Riffle Channel; 3-inch High Channel Walls; 16 inch Flared Opening Designed to Increase the Volume of Water Entering the Riffled Sediment Channel, While Increasing the Flow Rate though the Sluice Box
  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made to be used, designed to be portable! The sluice box for gold prospecting is lightweight made from high impact ABS plastic. It will never rust and can withstand the harshest environments


The ASR Outdoor Beginner Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Kit comes with everything you'll need to pan for gold anywhere, anytime!

The backbone of these kits are made up of the unique sluice boxes, both with a versatile shoulder strap which allows you to easily take it to the beach, mountains or a river.

The ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Gravity Trap 32-inch Portable Riffle Gold Sluice Box is a gravity fed high recovery gold prospecting and mineral collection tool. Extremely portable and weighing only 7lbs, made from high-impact durable plastic, it will never rust and can be used even in the harshest of climates without worry.

Molded into the channel of the sluice box is a set of riffle traps featuring four tested and true riffle designs to maximize the amount of gold that is separated from your pay dirt, they are; Hungarian, V-shape, Micro, and Square. These traditional and proven riffle patterns will help increase the amount of gold prospecting material you collect while separating your sediment and maximizing your efficiency.

The Gravity Trap Gold Sluice Box is 32 inches in length with a 10 inch wide channel and has 3 inch high channel walls to keep all your valuable, high yielding pay dirt confined and flowing over the riffle collection. The mouth of the Gold Prospecting Sluice Box features a 16 inch flared opening designed to increase the volume of water entering the prospecting channel thus increasing the flow rate through the Gold Prospecting Sluice Box. The Gold Prospecting Sluice Box is manufactured from green ABS High-Impact plastic allowing for maximum clarity and easy spotting or identifying of gold flakes, nuggets, gems, or your choice mineral.

Alternatively, the ASR Outdoor 50 Inch Folding Sluice Box is lightweight and incorporates traditional tried and true design aspects in an elongated 50" run out. with a large wide mouth flare opening. What makes this unit different and extra handy is the ability to fold up to just 15 inches tall by 12 inches wide, easily fitting into a backpack or 5 gallon bucket that is ideal for all day hikers, adventurers, and seasoned miner 49ers.  You can backpack this folding sluice into remote areas anywhere!

The sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place when the sluice is unfolded. This takes care of the most common complaint about similar cheaper models in that they would often fold up when you tried to pick them up out of the stream.

The sluice box riffles feature Uni-Body construction, the riffles are precision laser cut from a single piece of 18 gauge steel and then formed into ultra light, sturdy steel riffles. These are then zinc plated for long, rust-free service.

It even comes with miner's moss and carpet already installed, so you won't have to worry about cutting and fitting your own when starting out.

And lastly, In addition to the sluice box of your choice, we've included a 10" diameter gold pan with dual riffles, a 4oz capacity snifter bottle and a 2 dram glass vial for collecting your gems and minerals. We also added in a heavy duty trowel, a 10x magnifying loupe and a set of magnifying tweezers to help you identify and evaluate your findings. This is a great prospecting kit for beginners, intermediate and expert prospectors alike!

title: ASR Outdoor X Pan for Gold with Bobby Bo 3oz Beginner Paydirt Gold Panning Kit, 6pc
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation
description_html:
Learn how to pan for gold with this five piece ASR Outdoor gold pan kit for beginners. This exciting new prospecting starter gold panning kit includes engineered gold paydirt by professional prospector Bobby Bo. Sourced from his gold rich claim site, you'll be able to learn gold panning techniques at home to pan for gold like a seasoned gold miner.

    The ASR Outdoor six piece gold panning kit is an excellent option for kids and beginners who are just getting started in gold prospecting. Inside the kit, we’ve included five essential prospecting equipment tools to learn the basics of gold panning. You'll find a modern 10" dual riffle gold pan that will help you start identifying and collecting precious ores. There is a 3oz gold snuffer bottle that can be used to grab small gold flakes at the bottom of your gold pan, fill it with water to suck up your small gold pickers and use the included glass collection vials to safely store them.

    We partnered with Bobby Bo to bring you this fun beginner gold pan gold panning kit for beginners so you can watch online videos and follow along at home before heading out into the field on your next camping trip. Bobby Bo gold paydirt is packed with size 20 and size 30 mesh coarse gold flake and fine gold flour with nearly no black sand or magnetite so you will not have to do any separation processing to find your gold in the paydirt. This bag of paydirt gold was expertly designed to practice gold prospecting techniques, not to make you rich. Bobby Bo is a gold prospecting expert who specializes in teaching classes of all ages about gold panning and gold mining.

    Grab this kit for yourself, a friend or family member who enjoys outdoor activities like camping and hiking. Its fun to find gold out it nature but learning how with the proper techniques is your first step in this fun outdoor hobby.

    • GOLD PAY DIRT - Each beginner gold pan kit comes with a 3 ounce bag of paydirt (total weight) each bag contains fine gold flour and coarse gold flakes in the 20-30 mesh size range
    • DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PAN - Best in class 10 inch gold pan has large and shallow riffle side wall, allowing better separation of gold from other material; lightweight, high contrast colors with carabiner hole
    • FINE GOLD RECOVERY TOOLS - (1) 3oz capacity gold snuffer bottle designed to suction pick up gold flakes and gold flour; (2) small glass vials with screw cap (1 dram and 1 2/3 dram capacity)
    • BEFORE USE - Gold pan should be seasoned before use by washing off all factory production oils
    • SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: plastic, metal, glass, paydirt; Colors: green, black, blue; Glass vial capacity: 1 dram (.065oz), 1 2/3 dram (.1oz) air tight plastic lid; Dual Riffle Gold Pan size: 10” diameter; Snifter bottle capacity: 3oz; Paydirt bag size: 3oz (.225lbs)

title: 24pc Gold Panning Kit with 5 Gallon Bucket and 10lb Pan for Gold with Bobby Bo Paydirt (2 Colors)
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation
description_html:
• GOLD PANNING KIT: Develop gold panning skills and techniques with the ASR Outdoor x Bobby Bo 10lbs Paydirt Kit! While the paydirt is intended for practicing gold panning skills at home, this kit includes useful gold prospecting equipment that can later be taken to the field for processing unclassified raw materials
  • 10LBS GOLD PAY DIRT: 10lb bag of Bobby Bo unclassified paydirt ranks between intermediate and advanced paydirt for the more experienced prospector; paydirt features fine gold, large gravels and significant amounts of black sand that will require classification work
  • 5 GALLON BUCKET: Heavy duty plastic bucket with carry handle works in conjunction with large classifier screens; stack sifting screens on top of bucket to create a seamless material classification system, ideal for removing unwanted material from paydirt concentrate
  • GOLD PANS: 10 and 12 inch dual riffle gold pans have shallow and deep riffles for processing various kinds of material in one pan; pre-seasoned 10 inch pan is ideal for cleanup of concentrates; large pre-seasoned 14 inch prospecting pan is best suited for processing large amounts of raw material in the field
  • PROSPECTING TOOLS: Recovery equipment includes snuffer bottles, glass vials, magnifying tweezers, pipettes, 8lb magnetic separator tool, 10x eye loupe, prospecting scoop, folding shovel, testing stone and 1/8, 1/4 and 1/20 classifier screens


For the gold prospector, novice or veteran, who wants to continue to practice their gold panning skills, look no further than the ASR Outdoor 24pc Gold Panning Kit with 5 Gallon Bucket and 10lbs Bobby Bo Paydirt.

With a focus on gold panning specifically, the 10lb bag of intermediate to advanced paydirt is a surefire way to develop and enhance gold panning skills and techniques, as well as classification work, without requiring a trip to a claim site. That being said, all the gold prospecting equipment included in this gold panning kit are valuable and useful tools, which can be used time and time again for processing, collection, examination and storage of found gold or other valuable items in the field come future gold prospecting excursions.

The 10lb bag of ASR Outdoor x Bobby Bo unclassified paydirt ranks on the intermediate and advanced paydirt scale, curated for the more experienced prospector. This paydirt features fine gold for a more difficult extraction process, large gravels and significant amounts of black sand that will require classification work.

This gold panning kit comes with the following gold prospecting equipment: 10 and 12 inch dual riffles pans (need to be seasoned before use), 10 inch pre-seasoned finishing pan, 14 pre-seasoned inch prospecting pan, 5 gallon bucket, classifier screens (1/2, 1/4 and 1/8 inch), snuffer bottles, glass storage vials, magnifying tweezers, pipettes, 8lb magnetic separator tool, 10x eye loupe, prospecting scoop, folding shovel and testing stone.
body_text: GOLD PANNING KIT: Develop gold panning skills and techniques with the ASR Outdoor x Bobby Bo 10lbs Paydirt Kit! While the paydirt is intended for practicing gold panning skills at home, this kit includes useful gold prospecting equipment that can later be taken to the field for processing unclassified raw materials 10LBS GOLD PAY DIRT: 10lb bag of Bobby Bo unclassified paydirt ranks between intermediate and advanced paydirt for the more experienced prospector; paydirt features fine gold, large gravels and significant amounts of black sand that will require classification work 5 GALLON BUCKET: Heavy duty plastic bucket with carry handle works in conjunction with large classifier screens; stack sifting screens on top of bucket to create a seamless material classification system, ideal for removing unwanted material from paydirt concentrate GOLD PANS: 10 and 12 inch dual riffle gold pans have shallow and deep riffles for processing various kinds of material in one pan; pre-seasoned 10 inch pan is ideal for cleanup of concentrates; large pre-seasoned 14 inch prospecting pan is best suited for processing large amounts of raw material in the field PROSPECTING TOOLS: Recovery equipment includes snuffer bottles, glass vials, magnifying tweezers, pipettes, 8lb magnetic separator tool, 10x eye loupe, prospecting scoop, folding shovel, testing stone and 1/8, 1/4 and 1/20 classifier screens For the gold prospector, novice or veteran, who wants to continue to practice their gold panning skills, look no further than the ASR Outdoor 24pc Gold Panning Kit with 5 Gallon Bucket and 10lbs Bobby Bo Paydirt. With a focus on gold panning specifically, the 10lb bag of intermediate to advanced paydirt is a surefire way to develop and enhance gold panning skills and techniques, as well as classification work, without requiring a trip to a claim site. That being said, all the gold prospecting equipment included in this gold panning kit are valuable and useful tools, which can be used time and time again for processing, collection, examination and storage of found gold or other valuable items in the field come future gold prospecting excursions.The 10lb bag of ASR Outdoor x Bobby Bo unclassified paydirt ranks on the intermediate and advanced paydirt scale, curated for the more experienced prospector. This paydirt features fine gold for a more difficult extraction process, large gravels and significant amounts of black sand that will require classification work. This gold panning kit comes with the following gold prospecting equipment: 10 and 12 inch dual riffles pans (need to be seasoned before use), 10 inch pre-seasoned finishing pan, 14 pre-seasoned inch prospecting pan, 5 gallon bucket, classifier screens (1/2, 1/4 and 1/8 inch), snuffer bottles, glass storage vials, magnifying tweezers, pipettes, 8lb magnetic separator tool, 10x eye loupe, prospecting scoop, folding shovel and testing stone.

title: 7pc Kids Starter Gold Panning Kit Beginner Prospecting Equipment with Paydirt (3 Colors)
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation
description_html:
• 7PC KIDS GOLD PANNING KIT: ASR Outdoor beginner’s gold prospecting kit comes with everything kids or beginners need to practice gold panning; plastic scoop, 6 inch classifier, collection vial, snifter bottle, 10X magnifier, 8 inch dual riffle gold pan and 3oz bag of paydirt
  • BOBBY BO GOLD PAY DIRT: The unique component of this gold panning kit is the paydirt! Engineered by professional Pacific Northwest prospector Bobby Bo, this paydirt is sourced from his gold rich claim site in Washington State; each bag will bare approximately 20 to 30 mesh gold flakes
  • ESSENTIAL GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: x1 6 inch mini classifier screen to sift away gravel and other unwanted materials with 40 holes per square inch for fine material; 8 inch dual riffle high contrast color gold pan; the small classifier and gold pan are the perfect sizes for little hands
  • SNUFFER BOTTLE AND ACCESSORIES: x1 3oz snifter bottle to suck up and clean gold flakes, x1 glass vial to store found gold, x1 durable plastic scoop and x1 10X magnification glass loupe for material examination
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Materials: plastic, metal, glass, paydirt; Colors: green, black; Scoop length: 11”; Magnification loupe power: 10X; Glass vial capacity: 2 dram (.125oz), air tight plastic lid; Mini classifier screen size: 40 holes/inch (fine); Snifter bottle capacity: 3oz; Paydirt bag size: 3oz (.225lbs)

This ASR Outdoor 7pc gold panning kit is a great option for kids (and beginners) who are just getting started in the world of gold prospecting. With this kit, we’ve included 7 essential gold panning tools to learn and experiment with the basics of gold panning, however the unique component of this beginner gold panning kit is the paydirt, engineered by local professional Pacific Northwest prospector Bobby Bo; sourced from his gold rich claim site in Washington State, you'll be able to practice basic gold panning techniques without venturing far from home!

The essential gold prospecting equipment items included in this gold panning kit are the gold pan and mini classifier. For classifying, we’ve included a 6 inch mini classifier screen that will help to sift out larger unwanted materials from your black and blonde sands. The sifter features 40 holes per square inch, making it a great tool for sifting fine materials. For sifting out gold nuggets or gold flakes from your deposit, we’ve included an 8 inch dual riffle, high contrast gold pan that will allow you to pan off smaller gravels and sands and reach gold at the bottom.

As far as gold panning accessories are concerned, we’ve also included a 3oz snifter bottle that can be used to grab small gold nuggets. Once gold is captured, use the glass collection vial to safely store them. In addition to the snifter bottle and collection vial, we also included a 10X magnification power loupe for examining any findings.

And, as mentioned above, in collaboration with Bobby Bo, ASR Outdoor is proud to include our Pacific Northwest 3oz bag of gold paydirt concentrate and specifically designed for practicing gold panning techniques! Each bag will bare gold flakes and flower gold in the 20-30 mesh size range.

A great way to get outside and learn a new hobby while spending time with friends and family, pack this kids gold panning kit with paydirt on your next camping trip, or plan an outdoor excursion around gold prospecting at a nearby river or lake; either way, kids will love it!

title: ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Paydirt 1LB Advanced Bag Gold Prospecting Concentrate Flakes (Green or Black)
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• 7PC GOLD PANNING KIT: Advance gold panning skills with ASR Outdoor x Bobby Bo Intermediate Paydirt Gold Panning Kits! Featuring unclassified intermediate level paydirt and essential gold prospecting equipment, develop your gold panning skills at home without having to travel to a claim site
  • BOBBY BO ADVANCED PAY DIRT: 1lbs intermediate bag is made up of unclassified paydirt and includes small amounts of coarse minerals and black sand (use the included 5lb magnetic separate pen here); paydirt features a mix of small and large gold for a more challenging extraction process
  • FINISHING GOLD PAN: Features two riffle traps to catch gold, a wide textured bottom for efficient separation and a saturated solid green color to highlight gold in the bottom of the pan; lightweight, super tough pan that will hold up to years of prospecting
  • 5LB MAGNETIC SEPARATOR PEN: A must have gold mining tool with lifting power of 5lbs, this pocket pen will allow you to pull black sand and other magnetic materials out of you paydirt, making it easier to spot gold in your working deposit
  • GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: This ASR Outdoor gold panning kit includes 1lbs paydirt bag, 10 inch traditional gold pan, 3oz snuffer bottle, glass vial, carabiner, pipette and 5lbs magnetic separator pen

If you’re looking to progress your gold panning skills and techniques, look no further than the ASR Outdoor x Bobby Bo Intermediate Paydirt Gold Panning Kits!

With the included intermediate level paydirt from ASR Outdoor brand ambassador Bobby Bo, you never have to travel to a claim site. From the comfort of your home, develop and advance your gold panning skills with just the few pieces of gold prospecting equipment included in this gold panning kit.

The 1lb bag of intermediate paydirt is unclassified and includes heavier or more coarse materials like gravels and black sands. Classification work and use of the 5lb magnetic separator pen tool included with this gold panning kit will be required, in order to work your paydirt deposit down to a finer concentrate, that will in turn make it easier to pan for and extract gold. This paydirt features a mix of small and large gold for a more challenging extraction process!

When panning, you’ll be using ASR Outdoors 10 inch finishing gold pan; this gold pan features two riffle traps to catch gold, a wide textured bottom for efficiency during separation and a saturated solid green color to highlight gold. This lightweight but super tough pan is molded from one piece of ABS plastic, is buoyant in water and will hold up to many seasons of prospecting to come.

In addition to the 1lbs intermediate paydirt and 10 inch finishing gold pan, this ASR Outdoor gold panning kit includes x1 3oz snifter bottle, x1 glass storage vial and x1 pipette and 5lb magnetic separator pen. A great gold panning kit for any level of gold prospector looking to advance or keep their gold panning skills and techniques sharp.

title: Dual Riffle Gold Pans Gold Prospecting Equipment (3 Colors and Sizes)
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PAN: Gold Pan incorporates both deep and shallow riffle side wall, allowing better separation of gold from other heavy minerals

  • HIGH QUALITY FABRICATION: Molded from one piece high impact ABS plastic, this gold pan is light weight, rust-free, UV resistant and floats

  • MAXIMUM GOLD RECOVERY: Dual riffle gold pan technology allows for all sizes of alluvial gold particles to be efficiently collected without missing any fine specs

  • PAY DIRT GOLD NUGGETS: Large riffles trap the gold much like the riffles in a sluice box, leading to a faster panning process letting you process more pay dirt

  • BEFORE USE: Gold pan should be seasoned before use


Trap gold while gold prospecting with the ASR Outdoor Dual Riffle Gold Pan for Gold Prospecting Gravity Trap.

This lightweight but super tough pan is a top quality gold-getter and will hold up to years of gold prospecting!

Featuring two riffle types cut into the sidewalls of the pan helping to catch more fine gold and taking the hard work out of the panning process. These deep and shallow riffles make it possible to run more gold paydirt and gold rich concentrate effectively through the prospecting gold pan.

This high-impact plastic gold pan is lightweight, easy to use and the most efficient gold panning tool to use today over traditional steel gold pans. It is molded from durable ABS plastic that is UV resistant, rust-proof, and available in multiple sizes.

Use the deep riffles to rough out the raw material, finishing with the shallow riffles to make short work of your final heavy gold concentrates.

title: 17pc Complete Backpack Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit with 10lb Bobby Bo Intermediate Gold Paydirt (3 Colors)
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• GOLD PANNING KIT: A portable kit for the avid prospector, we’ve included all the necessary gold prospecting equipment for end to end processing, as well as a 10lb bag of ASR Outdoor x Bobby Bo intermediate paydirt for continued off site gold panning skill and technique development
  • 10LBS GOLD PAY DIRT: 10lb bag of Bobby Bo unclassified paydirt ranks between intermediate and advanced paydirt for the more experienced prospector; paydirt features fine gold, large gravels and significant amounts of black sand that require classification work
  • 50 INCH FOLDING SLUICE BOX: This aluminum sluice box features built in 8 gauge steel zinc-plated riffles, carpet and woven vinyl miners moss; Sluice box easily fits into included canvas rucksack or 5 gallon bucket; no assembly required and includes shoulder strap
  • 5 GALLON BUCKET: Heavy duty plastic bucket with carry handle works in conjunction with large classifier screens (1/8 and 1/4 inch); stack sifting screens on top of bucket to create a seamless classification system, ideal for removing unwanted raw material from paydirt concentrate
  • 17PC PROSPECTING TOOLS: Snuffer bottles, glass vials, magnifying tweezers, 8lb magnetic separator, scoop, single and dual riffle gold pans, canvas backpack, rock pick hammer, classifier screens, 5 gallon bucket and 50 inch folding sluice box

The ASR Outdoor 17pc Gold Panning Kit with 5 Gallon Bucket 50 Inch Folding Sluice Box and 10lbs Bobby Bo Paydirt is intended for end to end raw material processing in the field, but with the included ASR Outdoor x Bobby Bo 10lb paydirt bag, avid prospectors can continue to practice and develop gold panning skills and techniques off site. Moreover, the included five gallon bucket, large capacity ASR Outdoor canvas rucksack and 50 Inch folding aluminum sluice box with shoulder strap, make this gold panning kit and included gold prospecting equipment easily transportable.

Important gold prospecting equipment to take note of included in this ASR Outdoor gold panning kit:

50 Inch Folding Sluice Box: Folding down to just 15 inches, this compact aluminum sluice box comes pre-assembled with built in miners moss, carpet and 18 gauge steel zinc-plated riffles, making it a high yield gold recovery gold mining tool. Sluice box easily fits into included canvas rucksack or 5 gallon bucket and includes shoulder strap

10lbs Bobby Bo Paydirt: Curated for the more experienced prospector, this paydirt features fine gold for a more difficult panning and extraction process, large gravels and significant amounts of black sand that require classification work

5 Gallon Bucket and Classifier Screens: Heavy duty bucket with carry handle works in conjunction with included large classifier screens (1/8 and 1/4 inch); stack sifting screens on top of bucket to create a seamless classification system, designed for removing unwanted raw material from paydirt concentrate

30L Cotton Canvas Rucksack: Interior draw cord compression closure, large top load lid closure, 3 exterior compartments and reinforced stitching, this durable cotton canvas backpack is built for adventure! Easily fits folding sluice box, gold prospecting equipment and personal items

As stated, this 17pc gold panning kit from ASR Outdoor contains gold prospecting equipment you can take to the field for end to end processing, recovery and storage; and with the addition of the 10lb paydirt from Bobby Bo, this allows you to continue to develop and grow your gold panning skills at off site locations or at home. Completely portable, all the equipment fits into the included backpack and five gallon bucket, allowing for ease of portability to and from the field.

title: 15pc Travel Backpack Gold Panning Kit with Mini Sluice Box and 3lb Gold Bobby Bo Paydirt (2 Styles)
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• GOLD PANNING KIT WITH PAY DIRT: 3lbs bag of unclassified gold pay dirt paired with our popular lightweight backpack gold panning kit, means you can practice and enhance gold panning and sluice box techniques at home before taking to the field
  • 3LB GOLD PAY DIRT: Total weight is 3 pounds of unclassified paydirt filled with coarse gold flakes and fine flower gold. Black sand and larger raw material is present; working through this paydirt is a surefire way to develop gold panning and sluicing skills without needing to be on site
  • PORTABLE RUBBER SLUICE BOX: A great method for fine gold recovery alongside gold panning; measuring 12 inches with no assembly required, the mini rubber sluice box is constructed from one piece of TPR and features x3 built in riffle patterns to aid in fine gold recovery
  • PORTABLE ALUMINUM SLUICE BOX: Mini aluminum sluice box features V Shaped ribbed rubber sluice box matting, proven to efficiently trap gold; And, weighing in at just 0.60lbs, this compact sluice box is easy to pack and carry with other gold prospecting equipment
  • TRAVEL BACKPACK: Drawstring backpack fits all gold prospecting equipment, making this gold panning kit ideal for evaluating onsite paydirt concentrate, for hiking into remote claim sites locations or for enhancing gold panning techniques at home; great gift for new gold panning hobbyists!


We’ve paired one of our most popular gold panning backpack kits with a 3lbs bag of Bobby Bo paydirt, meaning you can practice and enhance gold panning and sluice box techniques at home, before taking to the field. And, while this gold panning kit is intended for travel (all the gold prospecting equipment included in this gold panning kit fit inside the drawstring backpack), the included bag of paydirt provides the opportunity to develop and hone fine gold recovery skills in preparation for a day at the claim site.

The 3lbs bag of Bobby Bo intermediate unclassified paydirt means classification work is required, as well as the removal of heavier magnetic materials like black sand and other unwanted organic matter. On the gold recovery front, this kit offers both panning or sluicing options; choose from the included 10 inch or 12 inch dual riffle gold pans, or mini rubber sluice box! A great method for fine gold recovery alongside gold panning, the mini rubber sluice box or aluminum sluice box measure 12 inches with no assembly required. The sluice box is constructed from one piece of TPR rubber and features three built in riffle patterns to aid in fine gold recovery. The aluminum sluice box features V Shaped ribbed rubber sluice box matting, proven to efficiently trap gold; And, weighing in at just 0.60lbs, this compact sluice box is easy to pack and carry with other gold prospecting equipment.

All gold mining tools included in this gold panning kit covers you from start to finish in the gold recovery process, from processing and classification to retrieval and storage. Gold prospecting equipment includes: scoop, 1/30 classifier screen, and x2 dual riffle gold pans, mini sluice box, 8lbs magnetic classifier, scoop, magnifying tweezers, sniffer bottle, pipettes, drawstring backpack, paydirt and glass storage vials.

Lightweight and compact, this gold panning kit is great for fine gold recovery work at home, but is also ideal for evaluating onsite paydirt concentrate, or for hiking into remote claim sites locations where limited equipment is the only option. The kit also makes a great gift for new gold panning hobbyists, for packing with your camping gear or as a fun activity to do with kids.

title: 5pc Beginners Gold Panning Kit with Pan, Glass Vials, Snifter Bottle, Magnifying Tweezers
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PAN: 10 inch in diameter with deep and shallow riffles; must be seasoned before use
  • GLASS VIAL: 2x Glass vials (1 large and 1 small) with screw top lid for storage
  • MAGNIFYING TWEEZERS: Assess the quality of recovered gold or other valuable items, 4.5 inches long
  • GOLD SNIFTER BOTTLE: 3oz capacity

Take to your local river with the ASR Outdoor 5pc Beginner's Gold Panning Kit! This set comes with everything you'll need to pan for gold, examine and store gold flakes, gold flour or small gold nuggets, or other gems, fossils or precious metals found when gold panning.

In the beginner gold panning kit, we've included one of our most popular gold pan sizes: 10 inch diameter; the gold pan features dual riffles (coarse and fine) that will assist you in separating gold from other unwanted materials like gravels, sands and rocks. The dual riffle gold pan is molded from one piece of high impact, ABS plastic; the gold pan is very lightweight, rust resistant, UV resistant, waterproof and it floats! This pan is unseasoned so be sure to clean off before use for best results.

As for gold prospecting equipment accessories, this kit comes with a magnifying tweezers that you'll be able to use to evaluate the quality of any found objects that may be of value. A few of the other items included are a snuffer bottle for cleaning and gold capture, a set of tweezers for precision work and lastly, one glass vial for storage with screw top.

This is a great kit for beginner gold prospectors who are looking to experiment and get their hands dirty with this fun and challenging outdoor sport or hobby.

Gold panning and recovery equipment prospectors kit designed to be lightweight and easily carried into your claim site to evaluate your gold prospect before taking in bigger equipment. The drawstring backpack houses all the included gold mining equipment, keeping everything organized and convenient to tote to and from the field site.

Lightweight, compact, and travel-friendly, this ASR Outdoor 14 piece portable gold panning kit has you covered from start to finish on the gold prospecting front; setting you up for success in the field whether you’re panning, cleaning, sorting, examining, or storing.

title: 50 Inch Aluminum Folding Gold Sluice Box Prospecting Equipment
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• PORTABLE DESIGN: Sluice Box folds down compact for easy storage and carrying. You can backpack this gold sluice box into remote areas or even carry it inside a 5 gallon bucket

  • EFFORTLESS USE: All you need to do is make sure your sluice box is level in the field. When extended in stream, the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place so that it does not fold up and collapse without warning

  • HIGH-YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: 18 gauge steel zinc-plated riffles are built in throughout the sediment channel trapping gold flake and small gold nuggets in the woven vinyl miners moss which is pre-installed and ready to use out of the box

  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made to be used; designed to be portable; the backpack sluice box for gold panning is lightweight made from highly durable aluminum. It will surly withstand the harshest environments

  • SLUICE BOX SPECIFICATIONS: Extended Dimensions: 50" Length; Folded Dimensions: 15" x 9" x 5" ; Wide-Mouth Flange: 13.25" ; Weight: 8.4lbs; Comes with carpet, woven vinyl miners moss and shoulder strap

    --------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Pan for gold anywhere, anytime with the ASR Outdoor Backpack Folding Gold Sluice Box for gold prospecting. Extremely portable, folding down in size simply by loosening the connecting wing nuts, it will pack right up into your backpack. You're ready to prospect for gold right out of the package with woven vinyl miners moss included and installed.

Simplify your gold prospecting and mining with the ASR Outdoor Aluminum Folding Gold Sluice Box.

This lightweight, aluminum folding sluice box incorporates traditional tried and true design aspects in an elongated 50" run out. with a large wide mouth flare opening. What makes this unit different and extra handy is the ability to fold up to just 15 inches tall by 12 inches wide, easily fitting into a backpack or 5 gallon bucket that is ideal for all day hikers, adventurers, and seasoned miner 49ers.  You can backpack this folding sluice into remote areas anywhere!

The sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place when the sluice is unfolded. This takes care of the most common complaint about similar cheaper models in that they would often fold up when you tried to pick them up out of the stream.

The sluice box riffles feature Uni-Body construction, the riffles are precision laser cut from a single piece of 18 gauge steel and then formed into ultra light, sturdy steel riffles. These are then zinc plated for long, rust-free service.

It even comes with miner's moss and carpet already installed, so you won't have to worry about cutting and fitting your own when starting out.

Due to its simplicity and portability, this is a great gold recovery sluice box for beginners and serious prospecting enthusiasts alike!

title: Stackable 5 Gallon Bucket Classifier Screens Sifting Sieves (Many Sizes)
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• 5 GALLON CLASSIFIER SCREEN: Soil sifting mesh classifiers will fit on top of 5 gallon bucket and our 14 inch gold pan; Interlocking, stackable design; Top Diameter: 13.25 inches, Bottom Diameter: 11 inches
  • RUGGED DESIGN: Constructed from high impact durable plastic with 304 stainless steel wire mesh
  • CLASSIFIER SIFTING SCREEN MESH SIZES: 1/100", 1/70", 1/50", 1/30", 1/20", 1/12", 1/8", 1/4", 1/2"
  • GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: Classifying your raw material down is imperative for successful gold recovery; removing large and worthless rocks from paydirt
  • FIELD TESTED: Easily screen off gravel and rock from your findings to locate gold and other treasures hidden within your raw material

The Classifier Soil Sifting Screens will aid your increase the amount of material you can run by separating unwanted coarse raw material into finer, manageable good material ready to wash in your gold pan or run through a sluice box.

Available in 9 different sizes for both fine and coarse material sifting, ensuring you'll be able to properly sift all size material.

Each soil classifying screen will fit over a standard 5 gallon bucket as well as a 14" gold pan and they are stackable, interlocking on top of each other to ensure that they will not slip or slide when used in conjunction with one another.

Proper classification of material by size is the key to more efficient gold separation. This is true for roughing out your material, all the way to the final step of fine gold separation. Using a gold sifter screen is essential for gold panning, sluicing or running a high banking equally well.
 
Separating and processing your gold concentrates by size with a classifier makes gold recovery much more efficient and less labor intensive, is faster and a more effective, resulting in more gold!

3pc Coarse Combo: 1/2", 1/4", 1/8"
3pc Fine Combo: 1/30", 1/70", 1/100"
4pc Combo: 1/2", 1/8", 1/20", 1/70"
5pc Combo: 1/2", 1/4", 1/8", 1/12", 1/20"

title: Large Gold Panning Prospector's Sand Scoop Hand Trowel (4 Colors)
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• GOLD PANNING SCOOP: An essential gold mining equipment tool for your gold panning kit. The plastic gold prospecting sand scoop shovel will help in your gold recovery efforts, especially when used in conjunction with a metal detector or when metal detecting

  • HEAVY DUTY PLASTIC: Ideal for metal detecting, this reinforced, heavy duty, single piece construction plastic sand scoop is non metallic, will not rust or set off any false positive readings, allowing you to use and reuse the tool for many seasons to come
  • BRIGHT VIBRANT COLOR: The vibrant bright color of the gold prospecting shovel sand scoop will help aid in your gold recovery efforts to help sort and spot and gold among other particles like sand, dirt and minerals

  • LIGHT AND PORTABLE: Lanyard hole, lightweight, and convenient size allow for easy portability

  • SPECIFICATIONS: Length: 12.5 inches; Weight: 3.5oz; Includes lanyard hole for multiple carrying options; Color: Assorted


The ASR Outdoor Heavy Duty Plastic Gold Panning Sand Scoop Trowel for Metal Detecting and Gold Pan Prospecting is a must-have gold panning essential to include in your prospectors kit of gold prospecting equipment, alongside a metal detector, sluice box, gold pans, classifier sieves and rock pick hammer, to help increase your gold recovery efforts!

Whether you’re a seasoned gold prospector or just poking around in your local riverbed for the first time with friends or family, this plastic gold panning sand scoop shovel will help you to increase your gold recovery efforts, especially when used in conjunction with a metal detector.

The ASR Outdoor plastic gold rush gold panning gold prospecting sand scoop is made from reinforced, heavy duty, single-piece construction plastic; the shovel is non-metallic, rust-free and corrosion-free, allowing you to use and reuse the gold recovery tool for many gold panning seasons to come! In addition to the sand scoop’s formidable construction, the shovel also boasts a bright and vibrant color. The vivid color choice is purposeful, as it will greatly aid in your gold recovery efforts to help sort and spot gold among other particles like sand, dirt and minerals.

And, when you’re not using the gold panning tool alongside your gold rush sluice box, metal detector, gold pans, sieves and other gold prospecting equipment, the hand shovel can be used in your backyard for gardening purposes, or as a pooper scooper tool to pick up after pets like cats or dogs in your garden. The sand scoop trowel also includes a lanyard hole at the top of the handle, giving you many convenient carrying options.

title: Small Stackable 6 Inch Classifier Screen Sifting Sieves, Assorted Stainless Steel Mesh Sizes
category: Business & Industrial > Mining & Quarrying > Mining & Quarrying Supplies
description_html:
• HIGH IMPACT PLASTIC: Made with high quality ABS plastic formed around 304 stainless steel wire mesh; ideal tool for removing large unwanted raw material from paydirt concentrate like rocks or gravel before gold panning

  • STACKABLE DESIGN: Create a seamless classification system by stacking the 6 inch mini classifiers on top of each other from largest to smallest 

  • LIGHTWEIGHT: Great alternative to our larger classifier screens if you are packing and panning light; each sifting screen weighs just 0.24lbs

  • HIGH YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: Sorting through similar sized materials is a faster and more effective way to sort and will speed up the panning process, resulting in more gold!

The ASR Outdoor Mini Classifier Sifting Screens are a must-have for gold prospecting, gold mining and mineral recovery.

Utilizing our high-impact classifier screen sieves is one of the first steps in successful gold prospecting by reducing down your material into a manageable size. The Gold Rush Prospectors Mini Classifier Sifting Screen Set will aid in your recovery efforts by sorting your raw material quickly and efficiently.

Available in 8 different sizes for both fine and coarse material sifting, you can piece-meal your own set together or purchase the complete set, ensuring you have the right tools at your disposal in order to be able to properly sift and separate your material.

These sand and gravel screens are made of tough, high-impact plastic and 304 stainless steel wire mesh. Since each classifier is only 6" in diameter, it's great for beginners, stores easily and is stackable.

Although gold is heavy, small flakes will not be able to displace larger rocks from your initial sample. Screening or classifying material into groups based on size will ensure that any gold, whether nuggets or flakes, will not get lost.

In addition, looking through similar sized materials is a faster and more effective way to sort and will speed up the panning process, resulting in more gold.

Soil Screen Sieve Sizes: 4 holes/Inch, 10 holes/inch, 20 holes/inch, 30 holes/inch, 40 holes/inch, 50 holes/inch, 60 holes/inch, 100 holes/inch.

title: Mini Portable Aluminum Sluice Box with Rubber Matting Gold Prospecting Equipment, 12 Inch
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• NO ASSEMBLY REQUIRED: Ready to use out of the box; Uses wing nut closures for easy set up; No tools required; Run gold paydirt and processed concentrate to maximize your gold recovery efforts

  • COMPACT AND PORTABLE: At only 12” length by 3.5” wide with 1.5" high channel walls, this aluminum pocket mini sluice box is easy to pack up in your hiking backpack for your next gold prospecting adventure

  • RUBBER SLUICE BOX MATTING: Includes V-Shape ribbed rubber sluice box matting. Optional woven vinyl miners moss carpet can be installed under the rustproof angled mesh channel inserts if desired (not included)

  • WEATHERPROOF: Constructed from rust resistant aluminum this mini pocket sluice box is durable and built to last; ideal for fine gold recovery

  • BEGINNER PROSPECTING: Makes a great camping or outdoor activity for adults or kids; portable gold prospecting that wont break the bank; Included with this sluice box is (2) fine gold and gold flake collection vials


The ASR Outdoor pocket aluminum mini sluice box is ideal for fine gold recovery, This is the perfect companion for you to use while processing your gold concentrate. Ideal for fine sand processing after classifying raw sediment and gold paydirt through a 1/20" material classifier sifting screen, the V-shape grooved rubber sluice matting is sure to pick up all of your fine gold pickers and small gold flake. Just spoon feed your sifted material through the channel and provide a small amount of water flow and watch the gold flakes appear on the ribbed rubber matting.

This mini pocket sluice box is small; at only 12" in length with a 3.5" wide channel it is one of the smallest prospecting tools that is easy to carry; incredibly lightweight, easy to assemble, with no tools required to assemble. It comes out of the box, ready to use. It is equipped complete with angled mesh and high quality V-Shape ribbed rubber mat. In the package an included 2 glass collection vials for your recovered fine gold found through your gold panning efforts. Woven vinyl miners moss can also be used in this mini sluice box and can be switched out simply by removing the wingnut and washer that holds everything in place.

Sure this ASR Outdoor mini sluice box could be used in the field while you survey new gold prospecting claims before packing in your large equipment. But it is much more practical for use at home or in the foreman trailer to evaluate your concentrate. Likewise, this is a fun unit for beginners and classrooms to jump start their luck and understanding of gold prospecting with mail order pay dirt, without breaking the bank first. It is made from rust resistant aluminum and will last for many years to come as this is a high-quality gold prospecting and mining equipment tool.

Have a complete compact gold prospecting sluice box anywhere you are with this rugged piece of gold prospecting equipment by ASR Outdoor.

title: Mini Portable 3 Riffle Rubber Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Equipment, 12 Inch
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• MAXIMUM PAYDIRT RECOVERY - Always reliable and able to maximize your gold recovery efforts, this pocket sluice box is best used to find the fine gold in your tailings, concentrate or raw paydirt

  • POCKET SLUICE BOX - Measures just 12" in length, 3" wide and 5.5"  at the flare mouth; Easily fits in pocket, backpack or travel bag to accommodate any use

  • EASY TO USE - Sluice box has 3 repeating gold riffle trap patterns: Hungarian, "V" Shaped and Square; Proven to efficiently trap gold and precious minerals while sifting away unwanted material

  • DURABLE LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN - Made from high contrast TPR rubber known for being flexible and UV resistant; easy to use in inclement weather; will not crack or break

  • GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT - Pocket sluice boxes are great for kids and beginners; valuable addition to seasoned gold prospectors and experts; scout new locations before hauling larger equipment


Whether you're an avid gold prospector or just dipping your toes into this fun outdoor hobby, gold panning with a pocket sluice box will help ensure you have the best prospecting experience. Our unique pocket size mini sluice box measures just 12" in length, has a 3" wide body and a 5.5" wide mouth, so you can quite literally fit this into a large pocket if needed, or use the carabiner hole to hang from your rucksack.

Made from high quality TPR (Thermoplastic Rubber) rubber this sluice box will continuously provide high yielding results of fine gold from your pay dirt. Known for being lightweight, flexible and UV resistant, this high-contrast green rubber material is ideal for a pocket sluice because it is easy to clean up and clear out once your gold pay dirt is washed through and it can travel easily without sacrificing space.

The ASR Outdoor gold panning pocket sluice box features three traditional riffle patterns proven to trap gold flake and nuggets: Hungarian, "V" shape and Square riffle gold traps that are built-in to create water turbulence in the sediment channel. They will trap the gold in your pay dirt and separate the small gold flour in a very effective way that helps to increase your gold prospecting recovery efforts. Coarse pieces will be caught easily in the Hungarian riffle traps while other smaller gold pieces may float over and get caught in the V shape before it has a chance to run out of your sluice box. Using a hybrid sluice design like this one gives you the best chance to maximize your gold recovery for various types of different gold.

The ASR Outdoor pocket sluice box for gold panning is a great addition to any seasoned prospector's collection of gold mining equipment as well as a great first-time sluice box option for beginners in their gold panning kits as this small unit takes the guess work out of panning and puts results in your hand. This compact and versatile pocket sluice box takes on the design extensively used during the California gold rush, sluice boxes were developed to have different riffle patterns that work together to sift out raw material while trapping gold flake and small gold flour in. Using a sluice box to pan for gold will allow you to easily identify valuable minerals while disposing of unwanted materials like silt, rock, and sand.

Scout and explore new locations before hauling all of your larger gold prospecting equipment out to the field. Use this pocket sluice box to run test concentrate and pay dirt from your site. The ASR Outdoor Pocket Sluice box is a must-have gold panning tool for any gold rush prospector!

 

    •

title: 8.5 inch Large Plastic Sand Scoop for Metal Detector Treasure Hunting (3 Colors)
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation > Camping & Hiking > Camping Tools
description_html:
METAL DETECTING SAND SCOOP – The ASR Outdoor sand scoop digger is an essential accessory for metal detection. It measures 9” in length and has a 6” wide mouth so you can easily remove rocks and sand while searching for treasure on the beach

  • 78 HOLES PER SCOOP – The scoop features 78 holes, each with a diameter of .5”. The holes will assist you with removing dirt and sand while locating your treasure on the beach or river bed

  • HEAVY-DUTY PLASTIC – Constructed from reinforced, heavy-duty single-piece plastic, the sand scoop is durable and will not rust or corrode so you can use it in any weather. Since it’s made of plastic, you won’t have to worry about any false positives while metal detecting

  • ULTRA LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN – The scoop weighs just .5 pounds (8 ounces) making it easy to use for both kids and adults. It will fit inside most standard-sized backpacks and won’t add too much to your carry weight

  • SPECIFICATIONS – Dimensions: 9” x 6” x 5.5”; Capacity: 3 Quarts; Material: Single Construction Durable Plastic; Holes per Scoop: 78, Hole Diameter: .5”

This sand scooper is super lightweight, making it ideal for scooping up sand to shake out treasures on dry, sandy beaches. Since it's constructed of durable plastic, it wont interfere with your metal detector making it easier to find treasure. Simply use your metal detector to locate the target area, and start scooping out sand until you find your treasure. Make sure you have one of these before your next treasure hunt!

title: 16pc Beginner Geology Rock Hounding Kit with Mining Tools and Tool Bag
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
If rock hounding, gem hunting or fossil finding are your outdoor hobby or keen geological interest, you’ll need the right tools to set yourself up for success in the field. From breaking up deposits and sorting material, to cleaning and examining your newfound precious metals, rocks, minerals, fossils, gems and more, this ASR Outdoor 13pc Beginner’s Geology Rock Hounding kit has you covered from start to finish! 

An essential in the field and stand out component of this kit is this 20oz hammer with rubberized grip for shock reduction; measuring 11 inches in length and forged from one solid piece of steel, one side of the hammer head features a square face for hammering rock or driving chisels, while the pointed tip allows you to crack open rocks or hard, dense material.

This rock hounding, gem hunting or fossil mining kit comes will all the aforementioned components that conveniently fit into a large and sturdy nylon tool bag. The storage bag makes it easy to carry all your rock hounding tools to and from site, keeping everything organized and in one place; the tool bag features handy, easily accessible side pockets too!

Whether you’re on the hunt for emeralds in North Carolina, for jade in Big Sur, California or fossils in Wyoming, this rock hounding kit from ASR Outdoor will have you organized and prepared for your next mineral mining adventure. Good luck!

  • BEGINNER ROCK HOUNDING KIT: If rock hounding, gem hunting or fossil finding are your outdoor hobby or keen geological interest, you’ll need the right tools to set yourself up for success in the field; from breaking up deposits to cleaning and examining materials, this kit has you covered!
  • ESSENTIAL ROCK PICK HAMMER: A must have in the field is this 20oz hammer with shock absorbing rubber grip; measuring 11 inches in length and forged from one solid piece of steel, one side of the hammer head features a square face for hammering rock or driving chisels, while the pointed tip allows you to crack open rocks or hard, dense material
  • 3PC CHISEL SET: The chisel set includes three different chisel lengths, 9.5, 10 and 12 inches respectively, and is made up of two standard flat heads chisels and one cross cut head chisel. Made from chrome molybdenum steel with a hardness rating of HRC 55-58, this ASR Outdoor chisel set has incredible tensile strength, impact resistance and toughness, standing up to intense wear and tear in the field. The chisel sets remarkable density, rust resistance properties and comfortable handling make them ideal hand tools for recurrent and reliable use on site
  • ROCK HOUNDING EQUIPMENT: Once you’ve made a mess in the field, you’re going to need to sort, examine and tidy up any new found materials; this kit includes a mini steel wire mesh classifier to screen off larger unwanted raw materials, brushes and a magnification loupe for examination
  • PORTABLE TOOLS: The included nylon tool bag makes it easy to carry all your geology rock hounding equipment to and from site, keeping everything organized and in one place; the tool bag features easily accessible side pockets, a zipper closure and large middle compartment for all your equipment

title: 3oz Plastic Heavy Duty Gold Snifter Bottle with Squeeze Nozzle (Multi-Packs)
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
The ASR Outdoor Gold Snifter Bottles are a must-have essential tool for all gold prospectors. This handy bottle is perfect for extracting gold from gold pans. Simple to use, just squeeze the bottle and use the suction to grab nuggets and release them into a glass storage vial for safe keeping.

  • Combined Size of Nozzle & Bottle: 5 x 1 inch diameter

  • Tube Size: 4 x 3/16 inch diameter

Each snifter bottle is 5 inches tall and holds 10ml of liquid.
Available in packs of 2, 4, 6, 8 or 10 units.

title: Large Rubber Riffled Sluice Box Matting for Gold Recovery, 27 x 10 inch
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• FLEXIBLE RUBBER SLUICE MAT: Once your material is run through the mat it can easily be rolled up letting you rinse out the concentrate that you have trapped; Made from TPR rubber that will not stiffen in cold weather

  • 3 RIFFLE TRAP PATTERNS: There are 3 different pattern gold collection riffle traps allow for various sizes of gold material to be trapped while each serving a different purpose to help aid in the gold prospecting recovery process

  • HUNGARIAN: Increases the turbulence behind the riffle, which agitates the sand bed, improving gold deposits; V-SHAPE: these groves work very well for catching fine gold flake; SQUARE RIFFLE: The large groves allow for catching small finds, pickers, and small gold nuggets

  • CUT TO FIT: The sluice box matting is pre-scored so it can easily be cut down to only 8 inches wide using the guide line on the back of the matting. Overall dimensions of the matting are 10 inches wide by 27 inches in length

  • MAXIMIZE RECOVERY EFFORTS: This is the perfect mat for superb fine gold recovery with fast or slow water and will enhance your gold prospecting and recovery efforts


The ASR Outdoor Rubber Riffle Sluice Box Mat is made from highly durable, one-piece flexible rubber that will never harden or crack in cold weather and is designed with 3 traditional, tried and true fine gold collecting riffle patterns. These gold recovery riffle traps are designed to maximize the amount of gold nuggets and gold flake that is trapped when separated from your raw screened material.

This Rubber Riffled Sluice Box Matting is manufactured from green thermoplastic rubber (TPR) allowing for optimal clarity and easy spotting and identifying of gold flake, gold nuggets, gems, or your choice rock hounding mineral. It is also a Trimmable Riffle Sluice Box Matting which is pre-scored so it can easily be cut down to only 8 inches wide using the guide line on the back of the matting. Overall dimensions of the matting are 10 inches wide by 27 inches in length; with riffle traps running the entire length.

This is the perfect sluice box mat for superb fine gold recovery with fast or slow water which will enhance your gold prospecting and recovery efforts.

The different pattern gold collection riffle traps allow for various sizes of material to be trapped while each serving a different purpose to help aid in the gold prospecting recovery process;  they are; Hungarian, V-shape, and Square riffle patterns;

Hungarian Riffle Trap:

Increases the turbulence behind the riffle, which agitates the sand bed, improving gold deposits within the recovery traps
V Shape Riffle Trap: V-shaped groves work very well for catching fine gold


Square Riffle Trap: The large groves allow for catching small finds, pickers, and small nuggets

Once your gold pay dirt material is run through the mat it can easily be rolled up to let you rinse out the concentrate that you have trapped. The concentrate rinsed from the matting will contain most of the gold accumulated during the run and is now ready to be panned and separated.

These traditional and proven riffle patterns will help increase the amount of gold and minerals you recover. Always sift or screen your material first using the ASR Outdoor Classifier Sifter Screens to ensure that your gold prospecting material that is run through your sluice box matting is finely separated from your raw material, maximizing your efficiency in the field.

title: 20pc Mini Pocket Sluice Box with 3.5 Gallon Bucket Gold Panning Kit (2 Styles)
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• GOLD PANNING KIT: 20pc complete rubber sluice box kit with 3.5 gallon bucket and mini classifier screens is intended for start to finish raw material processing; kit includes everything for collection, recovery and storage and is easily portable!
  • 12 INCH RUBBER SLUICE BOX: Sluice box features three gold riffle trap patterns: Hungarian, V-Shaped and Square, proven to efficiently trap gold; weighing in at just 0.46lbs, this rubber sluice box is easy to pack and carry with other gold prospecting equipment OR;
  • 12 INCH ALUMINUM SLUICE BOX: Mini aluminum sluice box features V Shaped ribbed rubber sluice box matting, proven to efficiently trap gold; And, weighing in at just 0.60lbs, this compact sluice box is easy to pack and carry with other gold prospecting equipment
  • CLASSIFIER SCREENS: Stack x3 mini sifting screens on top of gold pans to create a seamless material classification system, which removes unwanted material from your pay dirt concentrate, ideal for gold panning or feeding mini rubber sluice box
  • DRAWSTRING BACKPACK: This gold panning kit comes with a drawstring backpack to hold smaller prospecting tools, keeping them together and organized; drawstring backpack is incredibly lightweight, adding to the portability of this gold panning kit
  • PROSPECTING TOOLS: Gold panning kit also includes x4 snuffer bottles, x1 8lbs magnetic separator tool, x1 green prospectors scoop, x3 glass vials, x1 pair of magnifying tweezers and a 3 in 1 compact folding shovel


If you’re looking for a start to finish sluice box gold prospecting kit, look no further than the ASR Outdoor 20pc Complete Portable Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit. Intended for end to end raw material processing, this kit includes a comprehensive selection of prospecting tools needed for classification, collection and storage, and is incredibly portable!

And, while the mini 12 inch mini rubber sluice box, drawstring backpack and 3.5 gallon bucket make this kit easy to trek to and from a claim site, the supplementary components we’ve included ensure you’re never compromising on the range of prospecting tools or processes needed for a successful day in the field.

The compact 3 in 1 folding shovel and bucket make a great place to start gathering raw material. Once you’ve filled your bucket, transfer the raw material to stacked mini classifier screens that will sit on top of chosen included dual riffle green gold pans (10, 12 or 14 inch); You’ve now created an effective classification system to remove undesirable material like rocks and gravel from your pay dirt concentrate. However, before you start panning or sluicing, be sure grab that large 8lb magnetic separator tool! This will help to remove black sand and any other heavy magnetic materials, making it easier to separate and extract gold from your pay dirt.

Whether you choose to feed your mini rubber sluice or work on gold panning techniques, you’ve got both options with this kit! The 12 inch mini sluice box made from one piece of thermoplastic rubber features three gold riffle trap patterns: Hungarian, V-Shaped and Square, proven to efficiently trap gold. And, weighing in at just 0.46lbs, this rubber sluice box is easy to pack and carry with other gold prospecting equipment. Alternatively, the gold pans included are dual riffle with both a shallow and deep sidewall riffle design; they measure 10, 12 and 14 inches, are molded from one piece of high impact ABS plastic, are lightweight, rust and UV resistant, buoyant in water, and are suitable for all levels of gold prospectors.

If you’re lucky enough to spot gold, you can use the included snuffer bottles to extract gold flakes or nuggets and store them in the screw top glass vials for safe keeping. If not, well, we’re sorry to say, it’s back to the bucket. Good luck out there!

title: 13pc Portable Gold Panning Kit with Collapsible Bucket, Mini Aluminum Sluice Box and 30L Backpack (4 Colors)
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation
description_html:
• 13PC GOLD PANNING KIT: 13pc Gold Panning Kit comes with everything you’ll need to pan for gold including a sifting classifier, gold pans, sand scoop, mini sluice box, glass vials, snifter bottles and magnetic pick up tool; All of the items fit neatly inside of a 30 liter capacity canvas backpack
  • COLLAPSIBLE BUCKET: Silicone collapsible bucket will work seamlessly with large classifier screens for gold panning; It can also be used as a beverage cooler, small laundry basket, pet bowl, firewood carrier, gardening or fishing bucket too
  • DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS: 3 different dual riffle gold pans (8”, 12” and 14” diameter) that are designed to fit with collapsible bucket; deep blue color that will assist with identifying gold nuggets and flakes
  • MINI ALUMINUM SLUICE BOX: Inside the backpack you’ll find a compact and portable mini sluice box that is just 12” in length, featuring high channel walls and V-shape ribbed rubber matting; no assembly required
  • PROSPECTING TOOLS: Included are a 12 inch prospectors scoop, 3oz snifter bottles, glass collection vials and 5lb magnetic pick up pen tool

The ASR Outdoor 13pc Gold Panning Kit comes with everything you’ll need to pan for gold – a sifting classifier, gold pans, a sand scoop, a mini sluice box, glass vials, snifter bottles, and a magnetic pickup tool. All of the items fit neatly inside of a 30-liter capacity canvas backpack (color may vary) featuring reinforced stitching and sturdy zip and buckle closures.]

Included with the kit is a BPA Free silicone collapsible bucket designed to fit on a standard 5-gallon bucket. Incredibly versatile in nature, this bucket will work seamlessly with classifier sieves for gold panning, prospecting, and mining. It can also be used as a beverage cooler, small laundry basket, pet bowl, firewood carrier, gardening, or fishing bucket.

Each backpack kit comes with 3 different dual riffle gold pans (8”, 12”, and 14” diameter) that are designed to fit with the collapsible bucket. They come in a deep blue color that will assist with identifying gold nuggets and flakes while sifting through dirt, sand, and silt. We’ve also included a 1/2” classifier sieve that also fits with the collapsible bucket, great for sifting through coarser material.

Inside the backpack you’ll find a compact and portable mini sluice box that is just 12” in length, featuring high channel walls and V-shape ribbed rubber matting ideal for gold mining. Ready to use out of the kit, the mini sluice box requires no assembly so you can get to work right away.

Lastly, we’ve included a set of essential gold panning accessories that will help with separating, scooping, and storing gold – a 12” sand scoop, (2) 3oz snifter bottles, 2 glass collection vials, and a 5lb magnetic pickup tool that will distinguish gold flakes from black sand.

This kit was designed for beginner, intermediate, and expert gold prospectors, so you rest assured, you can enjoy gold panning whether you’re new to the hobby or a seasoned prospector. Good luck!

title: 10pc Beginner Gold Panning Kit Gold Prospecting Equipment (3 Colors)
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation
description_html:
The ASR Outdoor 10 piece gold panning kit comes with everything you’ll need to get started on your gold prospecting adventure. The gold prospecting equipment included is designed to help you identify, clean and collect valuable gold flakes, nuggets and flour in the field.

  • PROSPECTING GOLD PANNING EQUIPMENT: This 10 piece gold panning kit is a great beginner kit that includes tools designed to help you identify, clean, and collect valuable gold flakes and minerals from your pay dirt out in the field
  • PAY DIRT PROSPECTORS SCOOP: This small hand trowel scoop is an essential mining tool for your arsenal of gold prospecting and metal detecting equipment. It’s made of durable, high-quality ABS plastic that won't rust
  • GOLD SIFTING PANS AND PIPETTES: Gold Panning kit also comes with 2 dual riffle gold sifting pans; a 10” and an 8” diameter pan. These gold panning pans feature dual riffles and come in high contract colorways, so you can identify gold flakes, flour or nuggets easily. The included pipette droppers will assist with grabbing small flakes from the bottom of the pan easily
  • BLACK SAND MAGNET: Easily separate black sand from your gold pan with the prospectors 8lb magnet separator that works by squeezing the handle over magnetic particles to pick them out. There’s also a tweezers with a 4x magnifying glass so you can inspect your flakes and minerals more closely
  • GLASS COLLECTION VIALS : Lastly, we’ve added 3 glass collection vials so you can store your findings and keep them secured. Each glass vial has a capacity of 3mL (.75 drams) and comes with a water-tight plastic screw lid

      The kit comes with two different sizes of gold pans that measure 8 and 10 inch in diameter. These pans feature dual riffles and come in high contrast colorways, which makes it easier to identify gold flakes, nuggets, flour or other valuables. The two included pipette droppers can also assist with grabbing small flakes as well. 
       
      Additionally, we’ve added in a 8lb magnetic pick up tool to help you separate and remove black sand when gold panning. There’s also a pair of tweezers with a 4x magnifying glass, so you can inspect your flakes and minerals more closely.
       
      This essential gold panning kit is a great gift idea for yourself or other prospectors, whether they're beginners or experienced. Gold prospecting is also a fun activity for kids that encourages outdoor activity and exercise while learning about gold prospecting!

title: 14 Inch Traditional Large Single Ridge Riffle Finishing Gold Pan with Water Guide (2 Colors)
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• SINGLE RIFFLE: Gold pan incorporates a traditional ridge riffle side wall to help trap gold; used for gold panning and testing of deposits of heavy minerals

  • LARGE DIAMETER: 14 Inch gold pan with single riffle side wall has been proven to collect fine gold and ideal when working with larger material deposits

  • HIGH CONTRAST COLOR: Maximize recovery with saturated green or black large gold pans to improve visibility of gold flakes, gold nuggets or other valuable materials in paydirt deposit
  • WATER GUIDE: Unique specially designed water guide to improve water flow to the traps or remove water out of the gold pan without losing material deposit
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Diameter 14 inches; Depth 2.75 inches; Weight 10oz


Efficiently trap gold with the ASR Outdoor 14 Inch Gold Prospecting Finishing Gold Pan.

An essential piece of gold prospecting equipment is the gold pan! This finishing gold pan from ASR Outdoor features a single ridge riffle along the outer sidewall for fast and effective gold panning. When you add water, dirt, and gravel to your pan the lighter material flows out and the wide textured bottom allowing for efficient separation of any black sand, while highlighting the fine gold in the base of your pan. This pan is particularly great for managing large amounts of material, if you have limited sifting gold prospecting equipment available.

This is a lightweight and very tough gold pan, molded from one solid piece of ABS plastic, that will help reduce fatigue, so you will not get as tired in comparison to panning with a metal gold pan. Rust and UV resistant and buoyant in water.

category: Sporting Goods
description_html:

  • EFFORTLESS USE: Gold mining equipment ready to deploy from your backpack. All you need to do is make sure your sluice box is level in the field. When extended in stream the sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place so that when removed it does not fold up and collapse without warning
  • HIGH-YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: Best in quality components included in the backpack sluice box kit to aid in maximizing your gold collecting in the field. For all experience levels of gold panning enthusiasts.
