The Backpack and Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit Combo Set from ASR Outdoor was designed to give you the edge while panning for gold with portability in mind; inside the backpack, we've included our 50" Aluminum Folding Sluice Box. This lightweight, sluice box for gold panning incorporates traditional tried and true design aspects in an elongated 50" run out. What makes this unit different and extra handy is the ability to fold up to just 15 inches tall by 12 inches wide, easily fitting into a 5 gallon bucket as well as the included 30L canvas backpack making this ideal for beginner gold panning, day hikers, adventurers, and seasoned miner 49ers. You can backpack this folding gold sluice box into remote areas anywhere!

Simplify your gold prospecting and mining operations with this sluice box backpack gold panning kit.

The sluice box body is designed to lock rigidly in place when the sluice is unfolded. This takes care of the most common complaint about similar models in that they will often fold up when you tried to pick them up out of the stream. The sluice box carry strap is removable and can be used both as a hand or shoulder strap. This allows the carry strap to be easily removed when the sluice box is in action.

The sluice box features a uni-body construction, the riffles are precision laser cut from a single piece of 18 gauge steel and then formed into ultra light, sturdy steel riffles. These are then zinc plated for long rust-free service. These are fitted over grey miners moss and gold carpet which is already installed, so you won't have to worry about cutting and fitting your own when starting out. Ideal for use in conjunction with ASR Outdoor classifier screens and replacement multi-colored miners moss.

With our ASR Outdoor Canvas Backpack you'll be able to carry as much as you want while at the same time having the quality needed to keep it in good shape while you travel. The quick release buckles and draw string closure will ease your mind as it will keep your things secure while at the same time making them readily accessible in the large central pouch that holds up to 30 liters or 1830 cubic inches. The two side pouches close securely by zipper and canvas flap.

The 30L day pack also has room, even while filled with the sluice box to contain all your extra gear that you need to pack in with you to your claim site.

title: ASR Outdoor Black Drawstring Backpack Gym Bag Hiking Gear, 20 x 16 Inches
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
Looking for a lightweight option to carry your gear? ASR Outdoors black drawstring backpack or cinch bag is an ideal alternative to larger tote bags or heavier backpacks!

The cinch bag is great for hiking, backpacking, to pack with camping gear, to use as a travel bag, carry on bag, gym bag, or just for general daily activities and outings. With a top loading compartment, spacious design and large carrying capacity, this drawstring backpack will keep you mobile and on the move without weighing you down!

Measuring 20 x 16 inches, this roomy string backpack can hold lots of athletic gear, a water bottle, personal belongings and more. The shoulder straps act as draw cord to cinch down the top closure, keeping items in tow securely packed via the stopper, but also quickly and easily accessible when needed. The drawstring backpack also features reinforced PU leather corners and metal grommets, ensuring that it will be able to stand up to lots of wear and tear while you’re on the go. Made of high quality polyester nylon, the cinch bag has a minor sheen making it easy to spot clean (do not put in dryer).

Summer adventure, beach day, gym session or for a small carry on bag when flying, grab your gear and go with this pack-able, convenient, portable and lightweight drawstring backpack from ASR Outdoor.

title: 30L Heavy Stitch Gold Panning Backpack Camping Gear Canvas Rucksack (4 Colors)
category: Luggage & Bags > Backpacks > Hiking Backpacks
description_html:
Arguably one of the most important pieces of equipment to get you from A to B and beyond, think about the wear-and-tear we put our bags through; stuffed into overhead bins, squeezing into tight corners, thrown, tossed and bursting at the seams due to that last minute packing choices. Quality and durability is key to a backpack’s longevity and performance, which you will find in this hiking backpack by ASR Outdoor.

Meet the ASR Outdoor 30L Gold Panning large backpack. It is functional, durable, has a large capacity and designed in classic rucksack style. It will quickly become your go-to pack for everything from overnight hiking trips to long-haul air travel.

With 30 liters or 1830 cubic inches (volume) of packing space, the large central compartment of this rucksack can really hold it all. In addition to the huge central compartment, the rucksack features an interior draw cord compression closure, large top load lid closure, three exterior compartments and reinforced stitching throughout. Furthermore, all exterior side pockets feature both zipper and buckle closure, so you can rest assured your belongings will remain safe and secure. Lastly, adjustable carry straps provide comfort customization, as well as a top carry handle for easy maneuvering and lifting when needed. The canvas rucksack is made from 100% quality cotton, a natural, breathable and durable fiber that will perform better than other synthetic materials in the long run.

This backpack has been designed with gold panning and gold prospecting in mind. A great option for novice or experts alike, it will easily fit gold panning equipment like mini or folding sluice boxes, gold pans, sieves or classifiers and other small tools, so you can trek it all in one go to your field site. Built for adventure, reach for the ASR Outdoor 30L Gold Panning Hiking Backpack for your next camping trip, day hike, backpacking excursion and more.

Machine washable warm or cold cycle; air/hang dry.

title: 7pc Classic Field Beginner Gold Panning Kit with Dual Riffle Gold Pans (2 Colors)
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• GOLD RUSH READY: Features x2 dual riffle pans, x2 magnifying tweezers and x3 glass vials; this starter gold panning kit features basic gold mining components for gold recovery and gold storage and is suitable for beginners or seasoned gold prospectors alike
  • DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS: With both shallow and deep riffles, a wide textured bottom for material deposit separation and deep green color to highlight even fine gold, the riffled traps work to catch precious metals as the lighter material flows out of the pan
  • COMPACT AND PORTABLE: This ASR Outdoor classic field gold panning kit is compact and lightweight, easily fitting into any backpack or bag with your other gold prospecting equipment and tools; pack it with you for family day trips, camping adventures, beach days, gold prospecting excursions and more
  • GOLD MINING EQUIPMENT: All the equipment in this gold panning kit is made from high quality materials that will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come and will stand up to lots of wear and tear


Get in on the gold rush! Whether you’re a seasoned prospector or just planning to poke around your local riverbed for the first time, the ASR Outdoor 7-Piece Classic Field Gold Panning Kit with Green Dual Riffle Gold Pans is a great starter kit for beginners or as an addition to an experienced gold miner’s arsenal of gold prospecting tools and equipment.

Your kit includes:

x2 dual riffle gold prospecting pans
x2 magnifying tweezers with X4 magnification
x3 glass gold, gem or precious metals storage vials

The stand out component of this classic field gold panning kit is the two green dual riffle gold prospecting pans. With both shallow and deep riffles, a wide textured bottom for effective material deposit separation and deep green color to highlight even the finest gold flakes in the bottom of your pan, the riffled traps work to catch precious metals as the lighter material flows out of the pan, efficiently increasing your gold recovery efforts.

This ASR Outdoor classic field gold panning kit is compact and lightweight, easily fitting into any backpack or bag with your other gold prospecting equipment and tools; pack it with you for family day trips, camping adventures, beach days, gold prospecting excursions and more! And importantly, all the equipment in this gold panning kit is made from quality material; from the high impact dual riffle plastic gold pans to the metal magnifying tweezers and durable glass vials, these gold mining tools will see you through many gold panning seasons to come.

title: 4pc Dual Riffle Gold Pan Set Gold Prospecting Equipment (2 Colors)
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation
description_html:
Whether you’re dabbling in your local riverbed for the first time with family and friends, or planning an advanced gold panning excursion, dual riffle gold pans should be one of the top gold recovery tools on your list of equipment and gold prospecting essentials.

What makes these gold pans so effective is the dual riffle design. The gold pans included in this four-piece combo set feature four separate gold panning zones, a compact micro riffle, a flat sidewall, a deep 3.25-inch riffle area and 1/8 inch deep round base. The versatile riffles and complementary zones work together to optimize gold recovery, increasing surface area for faster and more efficient sifting and sorting of any potential gold nuggets or gold flakes.

In addition to the unique dual riffle pan design, the material construction and colors are also important to note. The four-piece gold panning pan sets are available in a solid black or deep green color, which helps to create a high contrast visual working environment against your working mineral deposit; the high contrast colors will make it easier to frame and spot recovered gold, gems or other high value minerals when sifting and sorting.

An essential gold mining and gold recovery tool, be sure to pack these lightweight, dual riffle gold pans for your next gold panning adventure. Good luck and happy prospecting.

  • DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS: The dual riffle gold pan perform above and beyond other gold pans; with compact micro riffles on one side, a flat sidewall, complemented by deep 3.25-inch riffles on the other side, plus a 1/8-inch-deep round base, these incorporated zones work together to optimize gold recovery
  • HIGH CONTRAST PAN COLORS: Made from UV resistant plastic the high contrast colors will not fade, making it easier to frame and spot recovered gold, gems or other high value minerals when working your paydirt
  • LIGHTWEIGHT DURABLE GOLD PAN: Made from high-impact, flexible ABS plastic, these dual riffle gold pans are corrosion and rust-resistant. They will last you many seasons
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Diameters: 8, 10, 12 and 14 inches; Material: ABS Plastic

title: 14pc Beginner Finishing Gold Prospecting Equipment Gold Panning Kit, Black
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• PROSPECTING TOOLS: ASR Outdoor gold panning kit comes with 14 essential tools for locating, collecting, and evaluating gems and minerals while panning for gold - a gold pan, glass collection vials, and a magnifying tweezers
  • 10 INCH GOLD PAN: Kit comes with a 10” diameter single riffle black gold pan designed to sift through silt and dirt for gold flakes. The dark black color ensures you’ll be able to identify and separate precious metals from sand and dirt
  • GLASS COLLECTION VIALS: Set features 12 collection vials, 6 of each size: 3/4 dram and 2 dram. The large and small sizes are great for storing gold flakes, gems, and other valuable finds during gold prospecting. Each vial comes with an air-tight plastic lid to keep your findings safe during transit
  • 4X MAGNIFYING TWEEZERS: Included is a 4X magnification tweezers designed to easily pick up small gems and flakes for further evaluation. The 4X magnification power will allow you to evaluate your findings and identify whether they are worth further inspection.


The ASR Outdoor compact gold prospecting bundle comes with 14 essential tools for identifying, collecting, and evaluating gold flakes and precious metals while panning for valuable materials - glass collection vials, a gold sifting pan, and a 4x magnifying glass tweezers.

This gold panning kit comes with a 10” diameter black gold pan with a single riffle designed to sift through dirt and silt for gold nuggets and flakes. The deep black color will ensure your ability to locate and sift through silt and sand for valuable materials.

The ASR Outdoor gold rush set features 12 glass collection vials, 6 of each size: 2 dram and 3/4 dram (.04 oz and .125 oz). The small and large-sized vials are ideal for storing gems, gold flakes, and other precious metals located during gold prospecting. Each vial comes with an air-tight plastic lid to keep your valuable findings stored during transit out of the field.

Lastly, we’ve Included a 4X magnification tweezers designed to assist with picking up and evaluating valuable flakes and nuggets. The 4X magnification power allows you to inspect what you’ve located and evaluate whether it’s worth further inspection.

Gold panning is a great outdoor activity for adults and children alike. This compact kit easily fits inside most standard backpacks and travel bags, making it a great bundle for camping and hiking adventures.

title: 11pc Complete Gold Panning Kit with Classifier Screens, Gold Pans and Prospecting Tools, Green
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• GOLD PANNING KITS: 11pc kit comes with everything you’ll need to pan, sift, pick up and store gold; (2) sifting classifiers, (3) dual riffle gold pans, (1) scoop, (1) black sand magnetic separator, (1) snifter bottle, (1) magnifying tweezers and (2) glass collection vials
  • CLASSIFIER SCREENS: The kit includes 2 classifiers with different mesh sizes: 1/2 and 1/8 inch, which will help you sift through both coarse and finer materials; 1/2 inch sifter has a wire thickness of 1.2mm; the 1/8 inch sifter has a wire thickness of .6mm; both are constructed of heavy duty plastic that is designed to fit on a standard 5 gallon bucket
  • DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS: Each kit comes with (3) deep green dual riffle gold pans in 3 sizes including 14, 10 and 8 inch diameters; The pans all fit neatly inside of the sifters, while the green color makes it easier to spot gold flakes
  • PROSPECTING TOOLS: Glass collection vials, magnifying tweezers, snifter bottle, pickup tool and the sand scoop

The ASR Outdoor 11 Piece Gold Prospecting Equipment Kit comes with everything you’ll need to pan, sift, pick up and store gold and gems! Inside the kit, you’ll find 2 sifting classifiers, 3 dual riffle gold pans, a scoop, a pickup tool, a snifter bottle, a magnifying tweezers, and 2 glass collection vials.

The kit includes 2 classifier screens with different wire mesh sizes of: 1/2” and 1/8”, which will help you sift through both coarse and finer materials. The 1/2” sifter screen has a wire thickness of 1.2mm, and the 1/8” sifter has a wire thickness of .6mm. They are both constructed of heavy-duty plastic that is designed to fit easily on a standard 5-gallon bucket.

Each kit comes with 3 deep dual riffle sifting pans in 3 sizes: 14”, 12”, and 8” diameters respectively. The pans all fit neatly inside of the sifters, and the green color makes it easier to spot gold flakes in silt and sand.

The remaining accessories included in this kit are the glass collection vials, the magnifying tweezers, the snifter bottle, the pickup tool, and the sand scoop, all of which will assist you in picking up, inspecting, and storing your findings. The tweezers features a 4X magnification power and the 4oz snifter bottle can be used to pick up gold flakes.

This deluxe gold panning kit is a great gift idea for all types of prospectors, whether they are just starting out or are expert gold prospectors.

title: Magnetic Pick Up Tool – Gold Prospecting Black Sand Separator Magnet with Quick Release Handle (2 Sizes)
category: Business & Industrial > Mining & Quarrying > Mining & Quarrying Supplies
description_html:
Speed up your gold recovery process with the Magnetic Pick Up Tool, designed to efficiently separate magnetic black sands from your concentrates so you can focus on what matters: finding gold!

Built for prospectors of all levels, this powerful magnetic separator helps remove unwanted ferrous materials like magnetite and iron-rich sands from your pan or cleanup concentrates. With a strong 8lb or 16lb magnetic pull force, it quickly attracts and lifts magnetic material, saving you time during final cleanup and increasing overall efficiency.

The easy release handle design allows for controlled separation: simply lift the magnet, then pull the handle to release collected material exactly where you want it. Whether you're working riverbanks, running concentrates at home or refining your final gold recovery, this tool is a must have for any serious prospector that will save you loads of time!

  • Powerful 8 lb Magnetic Pull: Efficiently removes black sand and magnetic material from gold concentrates
  • Easy Release Handle Mechanism: Quickly drop collected material with a simple pull; no mess, no hassle
  • Speeds Up Gold Recovery: Reduces time spent separating unwanted material during cleanup
  • Durable & Field-Ready Design: Built for repeated use in rugged outdoor and prospecting conditions
  • Compact & Portable: Lightweight design fits easily in your gold panning kit or backpack

title: 2 Inch Natural Testing Stone Prospecting Tools, Black
category: Arts & Entertainment > Hobbies & Creative Arts > Collectibles > Rocks & Fossils > Minerals
description_html:
• The ASR Outdoor Testing Stone is an essential tool for gold panning. It will help you determine whether the metal you've found is precious or not!
    In addition to determining whether a metal is precious or not, this stone can also test for karat content. It is meant to be used with testing solution and needles (not included). The stone itself is 2 x 1.5 x .25 inches, and is a necessary tool for jewelry makers and hobbyists as well. Make sure to add one of these to your gold rush kit or jewelry making tools!

title: 19pc Ultimate Gold Panning Kit with Classifier Screens, Gold Pans, Rock Pick
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation
description_html:
Whether you’re a new gold panning hobbyist or seasoned gold prospector, the ASR Outdoor 19pc Gold Panning Kit includes essential gold mining tools that will prepare you to properly, and successfully, sort, classify and store recovered gold flakes, gold nuggets, gems or other precious metals from your deposit. 

The ASR Outdoor 19pc gold panning kit includes the following equipment: three glass screw top storage vials, two magnifying tweezers, one regular 10 inch gold pans, two plastic shovel scoop, two large 14 inch gold pan, a magnetic separator pick up tool, two, three pipettes, a 1/8, 1/2 and 1/12 inch mesh classifying screen. Essential to successful gold prospecting are reliable riffled sifting pans and classifier sieves or screens; the ASR Outdoor gold pans included in this kit are constructed from heavy-duty plastic with unique riffle design and come in a deep green color to help better sift and spot gold. 

The classifier screens feature 304 steel mesh wire that make them rust-resistant and conveniently fit on the rim of a five gallon bucket for additional sorting and classifying as needed. And, should you be so lucky to recover gold flakes or gold nuggets from your latest gold mining conquest, reach for the magnifying tweezers and glass vials; these tools have been thoughtfully selected to include in this gold panning field kit, to help and allow for easy and convenient onsite cleaning, examination and storage of your newly discovered specimens. 

All the equipment included in this complete gold panning field kit are made from quality material; from the high impact, plastic classifier screens and gold pans, to the metal magnifying tweezers, and multipurpose shovel scoop a, all the components will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come! Good luck and happy prospecting , we hope you strike it rich!

  • GREAT BEGINNER GOLD PANNING KIT: This 19pc gold panning kit from is a great gold prospecting kit for beginners, as it features a wide selection of gold panning tools to learn and practice with; the kit intentionally includes two or more of the shovel scoops, gold pans, mesh classifier screens and more, so that new hobbyists can work alongside an experienced partner using the same equipment and learn the tricks of the trade

  • ESSENTIAL GOLD MINING PANS & SCREENS: Essential to a new hobbyist or seasoned gold prospector are reliable sifting pans and classifier screens; constructed from heavy-duty plastic, the included riffled pans come in a deep green to help better sift and spot recovered gold flakes or nuggets; the classifier screens feature 304 steel mesh wire that is rust-resistant; and notably, both gold panning tools conveniently fit on the rim of a five gallon bucket for additional sorting

  • POST-RECOVERY CLEAN UP & STORAGE EQUIPMENT: The magnifying tweezers, pipettes and glass vials will be convenient to reach for if you’re lucky enough to pan some gold, gems or other precious metals! These tools will allow you better to clean, store and examine your newly discovered specimens when on site

  • QUALITY DURABLE MATERIALS: All the equipment included in this complete gold panning field kit are made from quality material; from the high impact, durable plastic classifier screens and gold pans, to the metal magnifying tweezers and durable magnetic pick-up tool; all the components will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come

 

  • YOUR KIT INCLUDES: The 19pc gold prospecting kit includes:  three glass screw top storage vials, two magnifying tweezers, one regular 10 inch gold pans, two plastic shovel scoop, two large 14 inch gold pan, a magnetic separator pick up tool, three pipettes, a 1/8, 1/2 and 1/12 inch mesh classifying screen

title: Aluminum Sluice Box with Rubber TPR Riffle Matting, Gold Prospecting Equipment, 34 Inch
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT SLUICE BOX: Lightweight aluminum construction and precut TPR sluice box matting make this sluice box easy to deploy in the field come your next gold rush adventure; quality materials and unique riffle matting help to increase gold recovery efforts

  • HIGH YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: Made from flexible TPR, the specialized rubber sluice box matting features 3 distinctive gold flake traps; Hungarian, V-shaped and square riffles that work efficiently to increase gold nuggets and gold flake recovery

  • EASY TO USE SLUICE BOX: Once assembled, simply place the sluice box in river or stream, ensuring its level and secure allowing water to flow freely and without interruption through the 10 inch sediment channel

  • PORTABLE SLUICE BOX DESIGN: The gold sluice box comes with a handy shoulder strap that attaches to sluice box via included carabiners, making movement from one field site to the next a breeze

  • SLUICE BOX SPECIFICATIONS: Assembled Dimensions: 34.5 x 14 x 2.5 inches; Wide Mouth Flange: 14 inches; Weight: 5.20lbs; Material: TPR, Aluminum; Note: Some Assembly Required


    Make your gold prospecting recovery efforts simple, easy and effortless. This ASR Outdoor lightweight sluice box for gold prospecting combines our highly rated TPR rubber sluice box matting in a aluminum alloy, rust free body allowing you higher yield gold recovery from the raw material pay dirt you wash through it. Utilizing three distinctive riffle patterns throughout the sediment channel, the rubber sluice box matting maximizes your chances of catching gold of different shapes and sizes as they behave very differently in a sluice.
    The specialized gold prospecting rubber sluice matting features: Hungarian, V-shaped and square riffle gold traps that are built-in to create water turbulence in the sediment channel. They will trap gold flake and small gold flour in a very effective way that helps to increase your gold prospecting recovery efforts. Coarse pieces will be caught easily in the Hungarian riffle traps while other smaller gold pieces may float over and get caught in the V shape before it has a chance to run out of your sluice. Using a hybrid sluice design like this one gives you the best chance to maximize your gold recovery for various types of gold.

    Easy to maneuver, the 34 inch sluice box design gives you ample run out and enough surface area to make leveling and securing simple when the sluice box is placed in river or stream, allowing water to flow freely and without interruption through the 10 inch sediment channel.  The gold sluice box comes with a handy shoulder strap that attaches to sluice box via included carabiners, making movement from one gold claim to the next easy for the operator. Experiment with different angles and water speeds to find the best combination for your particular gold shape, size and conditions.

    Due to its simplicity, reliability and specialized rubber riffle sluice box matting, this ASR Outdoor 34 inch gold sluice box is a great gold prospecting sluice box for beginners and serious prospecting enthusiasts alike.

 

    •

title: 2 in 1 Metal Detector Sand Scoop with Built-in Steel Probe, Black
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
The ASR Outdoor Gold Rush Gold Panning 2-in-1 Plastic Black Scoop with Steel Probe Handle is a must-have gold panning essential to include in your arsenal of gold prospecting equipment, alongside a metal detector, sluice box, gold pans, sieves and more, to help increase your gold recovery efforts!

Whether you’re a seasoned gold prospector or just poking around in your local riverbed for the first time with friends or family, this plastic gold panning sand scoop shovel will help you to increase your gold recovery efforts, especially with its built-in steel probe that twists out from the top of the handle, reducing the number of tools you need on your gold prospecting field site.

The integrated steel probe makes it easy to find and collect items in sand and dirt much quicker than having to reach for another tool. The ASR Outdoor gold rush gold panning gold prospecting sand scoop or shovel is made from reinforced, heavy-duty, single-piece construction plastic; the shovel is non-metallic, rust-free and corrosion-free, allowing you to use and reuse the gold recovery tool for many gold panning seasons to come! In addition to the sand scoop’s formidable construction, the shovel also boasts a deep but vibrant black color; the color choice is intentional, as it will greatly aid in your gold recovery efforts to help sort and spot and gold among in your deposit.

If treasure hunting or gold panning is a favorite past-time, or it’s a new hobby that you’re just digging into, be sure to add one of the ASR Outdoor Gold Rush Gold Panning 2-in-1 Plastic Black Scoop with Steel Probe Handle to your gold prospecting equipment! It will help you to better sort, spot and recover any gold nuggets or other valuable minerals or gems via it’s bright black color, sturdy construction and handy, built-in steel probe.

  • METAL DETECTING SCOOP: This two in one ASR Outdoor black scoop digger is an essential tool in your arsenal of gold prospecting and metal detecting equipment; the scoop measures 14" from top to bottom and features a built-in steel probe for finding and collecting items in sand and dirt.

  • STEEL PROBE HANDLE: Twisting out from the top of the gold panning shovel, the steel probe is a handy tool to have for finding and collecting items in sand and dirt; great for gold prospecting, treasure hunters, hobbyists, metal detectors, coin collectors and more

  • HEAVY-DUTY PLASTIC: Constructed from reinforced, heavy-duty, single-piece construction plastic, the shovel is durable and will not rust or corrode. Since it's made of plastic, you won't have to worry about any false positives while metal detecting.

  • DEEP BLACK COLOR: The deep but vibrant black color provides an excellent backdrop for your gold, precious metal, gem stone and other mineral recovery efforts, allowing even small gold flakes to stand out from your deposit

title: 22pc Complete Finishing Gold Panning Kit with Rock Pick Hammer, Green
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• FINISHING GOLD PANNING KIT: This gold prospecting kit has everything one needs for gold panning, recovery, cleaning and storage, making it an accessible, yet comprehensive kit
  • FINE GOLD RECOVERY EQUIPMENT: Included are magnifying tweezers, gold snuffer bottles and glass collection vials with screw on tops; these gold prospecting tools will allow you to better clean, store and examine found gold
  • 1/8 CLASSIFYING SCREEN: 1/8 classifier screen features 304 steel wire mesh that is rust resistant and fits on top of a five gallon bucket; this sifting screen will help you remove large unwanted materials from your pay dirt like rocks and coarse gravel
  • QUALITY GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: All the gold mining tools included in this gold panning kit are made from high quality material; all the components will see you through many gold prospecting seasons to come


The 22pc Finishing Gold Panning Kit from ASR Outdoor is a curated set of gold prospecting equipment or prospecting tools that focuses on gold panning and recovery. While we've included a 1/8th classifier screen, this will only remove larger unwanted raw materials like rocks and large gravels, and may not provide enough classification of your raw mineral deposit into a "pan-able" collection of pay dirt. (Notably, our large sifting screens have been designed to sit on top of a five gallon bucket).

To help you start collecting your raw material deposit, we've included durable plastic trowels and a 32oz rock pick hammer, so that you can break up tough rocks and loosen the soil. There is also a 16lbs magnetic pick up tool, which helps to remove any magnetic material like black sand, making it easier and faster to pan for gold. (Note: it may take several uses to remove all magnetic material).

Once you have mostly classified pay dirt to work with, you'll want to turn to the single riffle and dual riffle gold pans for gold panning. The included gold pans in this kit are perfect for picking out the fine gold flakes and larger gold nuggets, as the saturated green colorway will make gold or other valuable materials stand out.

If you're lucky enough to find any gold flakes or gold nuggets, we've included 10 glass collection vials; these glass vials have screw on caps and will magnify your find with a bit of added water (5 large and 5 small). The two snifter bottles included will all you to pick up small nuggets from your pan, as well as to help clean found gold before storing it in the vial(s).

 

    •

title: 27 Inch Compact Aluminum Sluice Box with Flared Mouth Gold Prospecting Equipment
category: Business & Industrial > Mining & Quarrying > Mining & Quarrying Machinery
description_html:
• HIGH YIELD GOLD RECOVERY: This ASR Outdoor compact gold sluice box enhances water capacity suspension through the entire channel of the sluice box, via a uniquely designed flared mouth gate
  • GOLD RUSH READY: Ready to go right out of the box, this lightweight aluminum sluice box measures 27 inches and features four layers of gold trapping material: carpet, miners moss, expanded aluminum angled mesh and large 18 gauge steel zinc plated riffles
  • PORTABLE DESIGN: Weighing in at just 4.80lbs, this gold sluice box is lightweight and easy to carry with the built in removable shoulder strap (attaches with included carabiners)
  • RUST RESISTANT: Aluminum body and angled mesh, as well as 18 gauge zinc plated steel riffles ensure the quality and longevity of this gold sluice box will withstand many gold prospecting seasons ahead
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 27 x 10.75 x 2.5 inches; Sluice Box Weight: 4.80lbs; Channel Width: 9.25 inches; Flare Width: 10.75 inches; Material: Aluminum

 

Increase your gold recovery rate, while reducing river side set up time and effort with the ASR Outdoor Compact 27 Inch Fixed Aluminum Sluice Box.

With a uniquely designed flared mouth opening, the structure of this gold sluice box will allow for more water capacity suspension to flow through the entire channel of the sluice box, without any extra tools, components or time required on the prospector’s end. This compact aluminum sluice box comes pre-assembled and ready to use right out of the box, saving you time and effort during claim site set up.

In addition to more water flow via the flared channel opening, this sluice box also comes with essential preinstalled material layers to help trap gold: First is the rubber matting in the top third of the sluice box, followed by carpet, miners moss, angled aluminum mesh and large 18 gauge zinc plated steel riffles that make up the last two thirds. These layers work in concurrence to help ease the flow of water, allowing heavier materials like gold to drop, while continuing to carry out lighter materials to the end of the sluice box.

Another great feature of this gold sluice box is the portability. Weighing in at just 4.80lbs, this gold sluice box is compact and lightweight, making it easy to trek your claim site. It also features a built in shoulder strap that can be attached or removed via included carabiners; carry the sluice over your shoulder or toss it in a five gallon bucket with other prospecting tools.

This 27 inch sluice box is designed to used and made to be portable! Aluminum body and angled mesh, as well as 18 gauge zinc plated steel riffles are rust resistant and ensure the quality and longevity of this gold sluice box will withstand many gold prospecting seasons ahead. Now, go get this sluice box level and you’ll be gold rush ready. Good luck!

description_html:
• GOLD PANNING SCOOP: With a capacity up to two (2) cups, this ASR Outdoor green gold panning scoop shovel trowel is an essential tool in your arsenal of gold prospecting equipment; the shovel incorporates a built-in interior depth gauge etched on the scoop for precise measurements, a ridged handle for comfortable handling, as well as hole at the top of the handle for easy storage, a lanyard or hanging loop

  • HEAVY DUTY PLASTIC: Constructed from reinforced, heavy duty, single-piece construction plastic, the shovel is durable and will not rust or corrode, seeing you through many gold panning, gold mining and gold prospecting seasons to come; the non-metallic scoop also makes it easier to find metal when scanning your metal detector over it

  • DEEP GREEN COLOR: The deep but vibrant green color provides an excellent backdrop for your gold, precious metal, gem stone and other mineral recovery efforts, allowing even small gold flakes to stand out from your deposit

  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4.5 inches x 12 inches x 12.2 inches; Weight: 0.12lbs; Color: Green; Material: Plastic


  • ASR Outdoor Orange Heavy Duty Plastic Gold Panning Sand Scoop Shovel is a must-have gold panning essential to include in your arsenal of gold prospecting equipment, alongside a metal detector, sluice box, gold pans, sieves and more, to help increase your gold recovery efforts! Whether you’re a seasoned gold prospector or just poking around in your local riverbed for the first time with friends or family, this plastic gold panning sand scoop shovel will help you to increase your gold recovery efforts, especially when used in conjunction with a metal detector.
  • The ASR Outdoor plastic gold rush gold panning gold prospecting sand scoop or shovel is made from reinforced, heavy duty, single-piece construction plastic; the shovel is non-metallic, rust-free and corrosion-free, allowing you to use and reuse the gold recovery tool for many gold panning seasons to come! In addition to the sand scoop’s formidable construction, the shovel also boasts a bright and vibrant green color. The vivid color choice is purposeful, as it will greatly aid in your gold recovery efforts to help sort and spot and gold among other particles in your mineral deposit.

    The sand scoop of shovel also includes a lanyard hole at the top of the handle, giving you many convenient carrying options.

    If treasure hunting or gold panning is a favorite past-time, or it’s a new hobby that you’re just getting in to, be sure to add one of the ASR Outdoor Green Heavy-Duty Plastic Gold Rush Gold Panning Hand Scoop Trowel with lanyard hole to your gold prospecting equipment to increase your recovery efforts, sort your deposits and of course, dig!

title: 5lbs Magnetic Black Sand Steel Pocket Separator Pen Pick Up Tool
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• GOLD PROSPECTING ESSENTIAL: 5lb magnetic separator pen separates black sand and other heavy magnetic materials from pay dirt concentrate, making it easier to see and extract gold flakes or gold nuggets

  • 5LB LIFTING POWER: 5/8 inch diameter magnet shielded inside of pen tool picks up 5lbs of magnetic materials

  • DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made of quality stainless steel with water resistant that allows for gold panning in wet weather

  • COMPACT SIZE: Pen-shaped pick up tool measures just 5.5 inches in length and features a metal pocket clip for easy storage when not in use

  • QUICK RELEASE BUTTON: Plunger-type quick release button is easy to use; simply pull magnet away from gold concentrate paydirt in gold pan and release to remove magnetic particles out of your deposit


Are you an avid gold prospector, or just beginning to dabble in this fun outdoor activity? Then you absolutely need the ASR Outdoor Black Sand Pocket Separator Pen!

This unique magnetic separator pen has a lifting power of 5 pounds, which will allow you to pull black sand and other magnetic materials away from the gold concentrate so you extract and separate fine gold from other materials. As you locate gold and gold concentrate while panning, you'll find that separating these materials away will make your job easier so you can focus on locating your bounty!

The pen features a plunger-type quick release for ease of use, and the magnet is shielded inside of the pen to keep it from interfering with materials. Just pull the gold magnet away from the gold concentrate in your sifting pan, press the release button and the magnetic particles will be removed. The pen is also water-resistant so you can use it in riverbeds and is constructed of durable, high-quality stainless steel that will last for years to come. The magnet has a diameter of about 5/8" making it an ideal size for attracting small particles, and it comes with a metal pocket clip so you can just slip it inside of your pocket when not in use.

 

    •

title: Heavy Duty Collapsable Magnetic Prospectors Pick Axe Gold Prospecting Equipment, Silver
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• GOLD MINING PICK AXE: Overall Length: 18.75 inch; Collapsed Length: 10 inches; Comes with convenient nylon carry case to keep all parts together when not in use
  • MAGNETIC HEAD: Embedded in the head and handle of this gold prospecting tool is two, strong 15lbs that will pick up iron targets while you are digging, saving you valuable time
  • GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: Well balanced for lightweight portability the body is made from aluminum while the head is made from hardened stainless steel for breaking apart tough soil or gravel

  • EASY GRIP: Knurled aluminum handle for a secure grip when in use

  • FOUR PARTS: Collapses into four separate parts that fit snugly into the nylon canvas case with belt loop


Whether gold panning, treasuring hunting, camping or even gardening, sometimes a shovel or trowel just isn’t enough to get the job done. Insert the ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Magnetic Dual Head Pick axe is ideal for breaking, prying and digging hard-pan soil and other materials. This specific mattock tool features a unique collapsible design, breaking down into four parts for easy packing and carrying to and from claim site in your backpack.

Machined from both aluminum and hardened stainless steel for tough jobs like digging holes or breaking through soil; the three part handle is constructed of lightweight and durable aluminum with knurled texture for an effective and comfortable grip. while the dual headed pick is made from extremely durable and unforgiving heat treated steel. This tool can dish out a wallop and keep your operation in full swing while your on the job. Additionally, there are (2) strong 15lb magnets securely embedded into the head and handle, making it easy to pick up small nails, nuts and bolts and black sand while gold panning or prepping your working field deposit.

For gold panning specifically, the stainless steel pick axe is an essential tool to have in your arsenal of gold prospecting equipment and gold panning kits. It will help ease classify your material through your rock and soil screens. When in the field, prepping your prospecting area and gathering a working mineral deposit, you’ll want to reach for the efficient ASR Outdoor pick axe to help with breaking down matted soil or gravel, saving you time and energy.

And, when not in use, the pick axe or mattock tool can fit in the included black nylon storage bag with closure to keep all the pieces together in one place; the exterior of the storage pouch features a belt loop so it can easily be attached to a backpack, gold prospecting equipment or other gear.

title: 12.5 Inch Riffled Edge Prospector's Sand Scoop Gold Prospecting Equipment, Green
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• GOLD PANNING SCOOP: Measures 12.5” in length with a beveled scoop edge so you can count on it to dig through dirt, sand, and silt in any weather while also catching gold at the same time
  • BUILT IN SIFTING RIFFLES: The scoop features 8 built-in riffles that will assist with sifting through materials so you can quickly check for gold flakes and nuggets without requiring a heavy sluice box or large sifting pan that adds weight to gold prospecting equipment
  • HEAVY DUTY CONSTRUCTION: Scoop is constructed of heavy duty plastic that will not rust or corrode, making it an ideal digger option for both wet and dry materials; The deep green color will assist in identifying gold flakes from sand and dirt
  • CONVENIENT LANYARD HOLE: The ergonomic handle features a convenient lanyard hole that provides a variety of attachment options; Easily attach the scoop from your duty belt, backpack, or prospecting bag to keep it handy for quick deployment

The ASR Outdoor gold rush prospecting scoop digger is an essential tool for your arsenal of gold prospecting and metal detecting equipment. It measures 12.5” in length with a beveled scoop edge so you can count on it to dig through dirt, sand, and silt in any weather.

The scoop features 8 built-in riffles that will assist with sifting through materials so you can quickly check for gold flakes and nuggets without requiring a heavy sluice box or large sifting pan that adds weight to your prospecting gear.

The ASR sand scoop is constructed of heavy-duty plastic that will not rust or corrode, making it an ideal digger option for both wet and dry materials. The deep green color will assist in identifying gold flakes from sand and dirt.

The ergonomic handle features a convenient lanyard hole that provides a variety of attachment options. Easily attach the scoop from your duty belt, backpack, or prospecting bag to keep it handy for quick deployment or to allow it to air-dry.

Gold prospecting is a great outdoor activity for experts and beginners and is a fun way to get kids outside and exercise while camping, hiking, and beach combing. Make sure to grab one of these riffled gold panning scoops before your next prospecting trip!

title: 21pc Folding 50 Inch Aluminum Sluice Box Gold Panning Kit with Gold Recovery Prospecting Tools
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• ALUMINUM FOLDING SLUICE BOX: Ready to use out of the box, the 50” folding sluice box will allow you to process and sift through silt and identify more materials than a gold pan by itself. It’s constructed of ultra-light aluminum that won’t rust so you can count on it in the harshest of environments
  • CLASSIFIER SCREEN: Included is a 1/2” sifting classifier that is designed to fit on a standard 5-gallon bucket. It’s compact, stackable, and made with 304 stainless steel wire that will stand the test of time. Classifiers are essential to speeding up the efficiency of the panning process by separating larger rocks
  • ROCK PICK HAMMER AND DIGGER: 11” pointed tip rock pick hammer and steel digger trowel to assist with the rock hounding process. These heavy-duty gold prospecting tools will ensure that you can gain access to hard-to-reach areas to locate gold and precious stones
  • GOLD RECOVERY TOOLS:  Also included are essential gold planning collection tools so you can grab, sort, and store valuable materials out in the field: two 3oz snifter bottles for grabbing gold flakes, two magnifying glass tweezers for identifying materials, a 16lb black sand separator magnet tool and six glass vials for storing the gold flake and gold nuggets you find
  • PROSPECTING TOOLS:  x2 gold pans (12 and 10 inch diameter), 1/40 inch mini classifying sifter, brass coin probe, 4pc hook and pick set


The ASR Outdoor 21pc Gold Panning kit features 21 essential gold panning tools and equipment to help you strike it rich! Inside you’ll find a folding sluice box, gold pans, classifiers, collection supplies, and digging tools to aid in your gold prospecting efforts.

The mainstay of this deluxe gold panning kit features a 50” folding sluice box with precision laser cut riffles that will allow you to process and sift through silt and identify more materials than a gold pan by itself. It’s constructed of ultra-light aluminum that is ideal for traveling to new areas in the backcountry and won’t rust so you can count on it rain or shine.

We’ve also included a fine 1/2” sifting classifier that is designed to fit on a standard 5-gallon bucket. It’s compact, stackable, and made with 304 stainless steel wire that will stand the test of time. Classifiers are essential to speeding up the efficiency of the panning process by separating larger rocks.

In addition, we’ve added a steel trowel digger and an 11” pointed tip rock picking hammer to assist with the gold panning process. These heavy-duty gold prospecting tools will ensure that you can gain access to hard-to-reach areas in crevices to locate gold and precious stones. Both the hammer and the trowel are rust-proof and ideal tools for panning in remote areas where you’re more likely to access rich gold-bearing gravel.

Inside the kit, you’ll also find essential gold prospecting supplies so you can sort, grab and store valuable gold and materials out in the field: 1 16lb magnetic pick-up tool for identifying and separating black sand, six glass vials for storing gold flakes, two 3oz capacity snifter bottles, and two 4x magnification tweezers for easily identifying precious materials.

Lastly, we’ve included a ton of extra gold prospecting tools that will assist you even further: a coin probe designed for metal detecting, a four-piece set of picks and hooks, two gold sifting pans (10” and 12” diameter), and a 1/40” small sifting classifier. These bonus tools are ideal for identifying, sifting, and cleaning the precious materials and gems you find.

Gold prospecting is a great outdoor activity for adults and kids. Whether you’re just getting started or you’re a gold panning enthusiast, this deluxe kit includes all of the essential tools you’ll need to extract gold deposits and nuggets. Get out and explore the remote gold country!

 

    •

title: 21pc Testing and Finishing Gold Panning Kit with Tool Box
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
This ASR Outdoor 21pc Ultimate Gold Prospecting Kit includes all of the basic essentials  you'll need to prospect.

  • Snifter Bottles
  • Glass Vials
  • Tool Box
  • Microfiber cloth
  • Mini Crucible
  • Natural Testing Stone
  • Magnifying Tweezers
  • Small Trowel
  • Dual Riffle Gold Pan

Inside the durable tool box you'll find two plastic  snifter bottles, which are perfect for extracting gold from your gold  pan. Simple to use, just squeeze the bottle and use the suction to grab  nuggets and release them into the glass vials that we've also included!  There are 6 short vials and 6 tall vials, so you'll be able to organize  and store your gold effectively.

In addition, you'll also find a trowel for digging as well as a testing stone for testing the minerals  you collect. The microfiber cleaning cloth will assist during clean up,  and will work on any surface without the use of chemicals! This cloth is  non-abrasive and environmentally friendly as you'll be able to reuse it  for years!

In order to inspect your gold and other precious  gems/minerals, we've also thrown in the ASR Outdoor illuminated  tweezers. The tweezers feature an optical quality glass lens with 4x  magnification, so you'll be able to determine fine detail without  distortion. Made of stainless steel, the blades have precision needle  points ideal for manipulating tiny objects.

BONUS: This kit wouldn't be complete without a gold pan! As well as the gold prospecting  kit, we've added in a bonus prospecting pan, ideal for testing deposits  of heavy minerals like gold. It features riffled traps to catch your  gold as lighter material flows out of the pan. A wide textured bottom  efficiently separates remaining black sands, and the deep color of the  pan will highlight even the finest of gold deposits.

title: 10L Collapsible Silicone Bucket Gold Prospecting Equipment
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
An ASR Outdoor gold panning essential item, this collapsible silicone bucket is meant to pair seamlessly with the ASR Outdoor green classifier screens or sieves, in order to help you efficiently and effectively sift out unwanted raw materials form your working mineral deposit. And, not only is this gold panning bucket great for sorting your materials in the field, its sturdy plastic handle makes it a handy item to have for carrying equipment, moving water and much more when you’re on site.

Easy to use, transport and store, the collapsible silicone bucket features a purposefully compact and thoughtful design:

COLLAPSIBLE: The bucket folds down to just two inches when completely collapsed, great for saving space when it’s not in use! And, it easily fits into a backpack, closet, car, tote bag, beach bag and more too. Notably, the silicone and plastic grey and white collapsible bucket will maintain its shape and structural material integrity after repeated folding and reopening

FUNCTIONAL: A sturdy plastic bottom rim, top rim and carrier handle make this silicone collapsible bucket easy to maneuver; the bucket features a handle groove for grip, as well as a groove on the bucket mouth so you can control the directional flow of water. The bucket also has a handy hook you can employ to hang when not in use
 
BPA FREE: This rubber, multipurpose tool bucket is BPA (Bisphenol-A) free, meaning there are no harmful chemicals in the silicone material. The bucket is safe to use for drinking water and with little ones and pets; non-toxic and odorless

Total Capacity: 10 Liters / 2.65 Gallons

title: 3.5 or 5 Gallon White Heavy Duty Bucket with Handle Gold Prospecting Equipment
category: Business & Industrial > Mining & Quarrying > Mining & Quarrying Supplies

title: 4oz Gold Snifter Bottle Squeeze Snuffer for Fine Gold Recovery and Gold Panning (Assorted Pack Sizes)
category: Business & Industrial > Mining & Quarrying > Mining & Quarrying Supplies
description_html:
Don’t lose your gold at the finish line. Our 4oz Snifter Bottle is an essential tool for precise gold recovery, designed to easily extract fine gold flakes, dust and small nuggets from your pan or concentrates.

Built for accuracy and control, this squeeze bottle uses suction to quickly capture even the smallest pieces of gold without disturbing surrounding material. Simply squeeze, release, and watch as gold is drawn into the nozzle, making cleanup faster, easier and more efficient.

Compact, lightweight, and field-ready, these snuffer bottles are a must have addition to any gold panning kit, whether you're gold panning, extracting sluicing concentrates or finishing cleanup at home.

Simple to use, just squeeze the bottle and use the suction to grab nuggets and release them into a glass storage vial for safe keeping. Each snifter bottle is 5.25 inches tall and holds 10ml of liquid.

  • Precision Fine Gold Recovery Tool: Easily collect fine gold flakes, dust, and small nuggets with controlled suction
  • Easy Squeeze Operation: Simple one-handed use—squeeze, release, and capture gold instantly
  • 4oz Capacity: Ideal size for field use and cleanup work without adding bulk to your kit
  • Extended Nozzle for Accuracy: Narrow tip allows for targeted extraction in tight spots and detailed work
  • Lightweight & Portable: Compact design fits easily in backpacks, pouches, or gold prospecting kits
  • Tube Size: 4 x 3/16 inch diameter
  • Tube Thickness: 1/32 inches

title: 16pc Traditional Sluice Box Finishing Gold Panning Kit with Classifier Screens, Green
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
The ASR Outdoor Sluice Box Gold Prospecting Kit comes with everything you'll need to pan for gold anywhere, anytime!

The backbone of this kit is made up of a lightweight plastic sluice box with a versatile shoulder strap which allows you to easily take it to the beach, mountains or a river valley. With a shoulder strap that can be configured three different ways, seven pound box allows for maximum comfort and ease of transportation. The ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Gravity Trap 32-inch Portable Riffle Gold Sluice Box is a gravity fed high recovery gold prospecting and mineral collection tool. Extremely portable and weighing only 7lbs, made from high-impact durable plastic, it will never rust and can be used even in the harshest of climates without worry.

Molded into the channel of the ASR Outdoor Gold Panning Sluice Box is a set of riffle traps featuring four tested and true riffle designs to maximize the amount of gold that is separated from your pay dirt, they are; Hungarian, V-shape, Micro, and Square. These traditional and proven riffle patterns will help increase the amount of gold prospecting material you collect while separating your sediment and maximizing your efficiency.

The Gravity Trap Gold Sluice Box is 32 inches in length with a 10 inch wide channel and has 3 inch high channel walls to keep all your valuable, high yielding pay dirt confined and flowing over the riffle collection. The mouth of the Gold Prospecting Sluice Box features a 16 inch flared opening designed to increase the volume of water entering the prospecting channel thus increasing the flow rate through the Sluice Box. The Sluice Box is manufactured from green ABS High-Impact plastic allowing for maximum clarity and easy spotting or identifying of gold flakes, nuggets, gems, or your choice mineral.

The 32-inch Gravity Gold Rush Sluice Box by ASR Outdoor is the ideal set-up for beginner gold panning and experienced Miner Forty-Niners alike, as there is always a need for the proper tool for the job and this Gold Panning Sluice Box will find a good home with you in the wilderness when put to good use. To increase your gold collection efforts, use the ASR Outdoor Material Classifier Screens to sort your sediment before utilizing the Gravity Trap Riffled Sluice Box for gold prospecting.

To complement the sluice box, we've also included 2 classifier sifting screens that are designed to fit on top of standard 5 gallon buckets so you can sift out minerals with ease. You'll also find an magnetic separator pick up tool and a coin probe to help you locate and pick up metal objects as you find them.

In addition to the sluice box, we've included two 14" pans and one 10" diameter pan. The green color makes it easy to spot minerals among silt and dirt. We've also added in two pipette droppers, one 1 watt flashlights and three 2 dram glass vials for collecting your gems and minerals. We also included in a heavy duty scoop and a set of magnifying tweezers to help you identify and evaluate your findings. This is a great prospecting kit for beginners, intermediate and expert prospectors alike!

 

    •

title: 40pc Deluxe Geology Rock Hounding Kit with Mining Tools and Musette Tool Bag
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• DELUXE ROCK HOUNDING TOOLS KIT: If rock hounding, gem mining or fossil hunting are a new hobby or interest, you’ll need the right tools to set yourself up for success! From breaking up deposits to cleaning and examining materials, this 38pc ASR Outdoor rock hounding tools kit has you covered
  • ROCK PICK HAMMER: 20oz hammer features a rubberized grip for shock reduction; 11 inches in length and forged from one piece of steel, one side features a square face for hammering rock or driving chisels, while the opposing pointed tip allows you to crack open rocks or hard, dense material
  • ROCK HOUNDING ACCESSORIES: Kit includes a mini steel wire mesh classifier to screen off larger unwanted raw materials, examination brushes, and a snifter bottle for more detailed cleaning work, plastic baggies and a magnification jewelers loupe
  • DELUXE NYLON TOTE BAG: ASR Outdoor rock hounding bag features double-stitching at all stress points to ensure that it will last through years of prospecting or camping trips; Made of high quality nylon that is naturally weather resistant; It has 13 different pockets and features quick release buckles so you can access tools quickly
  • KIT COMPONENTS: x1 hammer, x1 unisex gloves, x1 aluminum jeweler’s loupe, x1 goggles, x6 cleaning brushes, x1 mini classifier sieve, x1 snifter bottle, x1 carabiner, x6 plastic baggies, x1 tweezers, x1 chisel, x1 set of aluminum containers and x1 nylon tool bag

If rock hounding, gem mining, or fossils are a new hobby or interest, you’ll need the right tools to set yourself up for success in the field! From breaking up deposits to cleaning and examining materials, this 38pc ASR Outdoor rock hounding tools kit has you covered!

A must-have, this 20oz hammer features a rubberized grip for shock reduction; 11 inches in length and forged from one piece of steel, one side features a square face for hammering rock or driving chisels, while the opposing pointed tip allows you to crack open rocks or hard, dense material.

Once you’ve made a mess in the field, you’re going to need to sort, examine and tidy up any newfound materials; this kit includes a mini steel wire mesh classifier to screen off larger unwanted raw materials, examination brushes, and a snifter bottle for more detailed cleaning work, plastic baggies and a magnification jewelers loupe.

The ASR Outdoor rock hounding bag features double-stitching at all stress points to ensure that it will last through years of prospecting or camping trips. It’s made of high-quality nylon that is naturally weather-resistant so you can count on it to protect your tools and supplies rain or shine. It has 13 different pockets and features quick-release buckles so you can access your tools quickly and easily.

Whether you’re on the hunt for emeralds in North Carolina, jade in Big Sur, California, or fossils in Wyoming, this rock hounding kit from ASR Outdoor will have you organized and prepared for your next mineral mining adventure. Good luck!

A must have gold prospecting equipment tool to have on hand to ensure your hard earned gold panning or sluicing efforts are not lost!

PLASTIC SIFTING SCREEN: Deep sifting screens are ideal for use at the beginning of the classification process when working with coarse raw materials; six inch depth allows for large amounts of material processing and can be stacked on top of a 5 gallon bucket

GOLD PANS: Kit comes with x3 high contrast green plastic dual riffle gold pans in 10, 12 and 14 inch diameters, ideal for gold panning classified pay dirt

A portable and comprehensive set of gold prospecting equipment, suitable for all skill levels, that allows for classification, panning, extraction and storage of any found gold. This ASR Outdoor 14pc kit includes x1 stackable plastic sifting screen, x3 dual riffle gold pans, x2 pipettes, x3 collection vials, magnifying tweezers, mini funnel, x2 snifter bottles and ASR Outdoor drawstring backpack.

The newest addition to ASR Outdoors classifier collection included in this kit, is the large, six inch deep plastic stackable sifting screen with built in handles, ideal for sifting out coarse raw material. This ASR Outdoor 14pc kit includes x1 stackable plastic sifting screen, x3 dual riffle gold pans, x2 pipettes, x3 collection vials, magnifying tweezers, mini funnel, x2 snifter bottles and ASR Outdoor drawstring backpack.The newest addition to ASR Outdoors classifier collection included in this kit, is the large, six inch deep plastic stackable sifting screen with built in handles, ideal for sifting out coarse raw material. Importantly, this heavy duty plastic sifting screen is able to be stacked on top of a five gallon bucket, and is also compatible with all other sizes of ASR Outdoor stainless steel mesh classifiers. Choose from the following plastic sifting screen sizes:1/2 INCH - 2 holes per square inch1/4 INCH - 4 holes per square inch1/8 INCH - 16 holes per square inchThis kit also includes x1 10, 12 and 14 inch dual riffle gold pans, ideal for panning paydirt after classification. The gold pans are UV and rust resistant, buoyant in water and feature both shallow and deep side wall riffle zones; all gold pans come in a high contrast green colorway, making it easier to spot gold flakes or nuggets when gold panning.Lastly, this gold panning kit includes gold prospecting tools and accessories for extraction like snifter bottles, magnifying tweezers, glass storage vials, pipettes and a clear mini funnel. All these gold prospecting tools easily fit in the included ASR Outdoor drawstring backpack, keeping everything together and organized. Good luck!

title: Heavy Duty Stackable Plastic Sifting Screens Gold Prospecting Equipment Rock Hounding (3 Sizes)
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
The newest addition to ASR Outdoors classifier collection are these large, six inch deep plastic stackable sifting screens with built in handle, ideal for working with and sifting out pay dirt or other valuable items from unwanted raw material. Importantly, these heavy duty plastic sifting screen is able to be stacked on top of a five gallon bucket, and are also compatible with all other sizes of ASR Outdoor stainless steel mesh classifiers.

Specifications To Note:

- Mesh Sizes: 1/2 inch, 1/4 inch or 1/8 inch
- Top Diameter: 13-1/4 inches 
- Bottom Diameter: 10 inches
- Depth: 6 inches; Space between sifters when stacked: 4"
- Durable Polypropylene Plastic Material

As mentioned, these heavy duty plastic gold rush sifting screens are ideal for working with coarse or more fine raw materials. Designed to be stacked on top of a five gallon bucket, use these plastic sifting screens or soil sifters to separate high value pay dirt from other unwanted organic material, like rocks, gravels, plant matter and aggregates.

Two important design features to note: depth and built in handles. The depth of this plastic sifting screen is intentional and will allow you to move through much more raw material in comparison to a more shallow classifier screen. Lastly, when carrying and working with heavier and large amounts of material, you'll appreciate the two built in side handles, making the plastic sifting screen easier to maneuver.

ASR Outdoors heavy duty plastic sifting screen is made of tough and durable polypropylene plastic that will see you through many gold prospecting or rock hounding seasons to come. The high quality plastic material will never rust, making it a great classifier suitable for all types of weather. To maintain longevity, rinse and air dry between uses. The plastic classifier would also make a great gardening or foraging tool.

Sold individually or as a 3pc set.

title: ASR Outdoor and Pan for Gold with Bobby Bo Guaranteed Gold Paydirt Bags (3oz, 1LB, 3LB, 10LB)
category: Business & Industrial > Mining & Quarrying > Mining & Quarrying Supplies
description_html:
ASR Outdoor X Bobby Bo paydirt bags are an excellent way to practice and enhance gold panning skills if you can't make it to an outdoor claim site. Available in a variety of classified and unclassified options, there's a paydirt bag here for every skill level, starting with a 3oz beginner classified bag, up to a large 10lb advanced unclassified bag.

  • 3OZ PAYDIRT BAG: Each bag will bare gold flakes and flower gold in the 20-30 mesh size range. The raw material is classified and contains no magnetic material like black sand, making it ideal for beginners new to the the sport.
  • 1LB PAYDIRT BAG: The one pound bag of beginner paydirt is pre-classified and includes lightweight materials like blond sands and fine gravels that are easy to pan; you won’t find any black sand or other heavy minerals here! This paydirt features coarse gold that will sit heavier in the pan, making it easier for those who might be new to the hobby to see and extract.
  • 3LB PAYDIRT BAG: Features unclassified paydirt filled with coarse gold flakes and fine flower gold. Black sand and other raw materials are present, which will require classification work. Great for honing in on classification work and fine gold recovery.
  • 10LB PAYDIRT BAG: Curated for the more experienced prospector, this paydirt features fine gold for a more difficult panning and extraction process, large gravels and significant amounts of black sand that will require classification work.

title: 21pc Geology Rock Hounding Kit with Mining Tools and Deluxe Carry Bag
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
If rock hounding, gem hunting or finding fossils are your outdoor hobby or keen geological interest, you’ll need the right tools to set yourself up for success in the field! From breaking up deposits and sorting material, to cleaning and examining your newfound precious metals, rocks, minerals, fossils, gems and more, this kit has you covered. 

A must have in the field and stand out component of this kit is this 20oz hammer with rubberized grip for shock reduction; measuring 11 inches in length and forged from one solid piece of steel, one side of the hammer head features a square face for hammering rock or driving chisels, while the pointed tip allows you to crack open rocks or hard, dense material, making it an essential tool for rock hounding.

This rock hounding, gem mining kit comes will all the aforementioned components that conveniently fit into a large and sturdy nylon tool bag. The storage bag makes it easy to carry all your rock hounding tools to and from the site, keeping everything organized and in one place.

Whether you’re on the hunt for emeralds in North Carolina, for jade in Big Sur, California or fossils in Wyoming, this rock hounding kit from ASR Outdoor will have you organized and prepared for your next mineral mining adventure. Good luck!

title: 13 Pocket Musette Shoulder Tool Bag for Rock Hounding or Metal Detecting
category: Hardware > Hardware Accessories > Tool Storage & Organization > Tool Bags
description_html:
The ASR Outdoor carry all bag was designed to hold all of your metal detecting gear and rock hounding equipment. It works remarkably well for a multitude of different activities and features a truly classic two-tone design in thick, rip stop nylon that is double stitched at all stress points to ensure that it will last through many years of beach combing with your metal detector in the sand, or rock hopping up bolder looking for geodes. Ease of use was a key concept in the design of this bag, simply by adjusting the shoulder strap you are able to pull the bag higher up on your hip which aids in making this an exceptionally useful treasure finds bag.

The ASR Outdoor rock hounding bag has 13 different pockets that will easily house your rock hounding tools like a rock hammer, compact shovel, flashlight, collection vials and jars as well as compass, journal, and even a mini-sluice box. These pockets are incorporated into the bag in a way that do not take away from the main compartment. There is also a built in pin point metal detector loop hold built into the side of the bag, for ease of access. The most notable feature may well be the unique large zippered flap that covers the entire length and width of the bag itself; unfurl it to access your specialty tools, notepad and maps without missing a beat on your excursion.

title: Stackable 1/4" Classifier Sifting Screen Gold Prospecting Equipment
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• 5 GALLON CLASSIFIER SCREEN: Durable, rust free plastic classifier has been designed to sit on top of a 5 gallon or 3 gallon bucket; 1/4" classifier. 

  • HEAVY DUTY DESIGN: Constructed from high impact polypropylene plastic, this sifting screen will see you through many gold panning seasons to come; rinse and air dry between uses

  • GOLD PROSPECTING EQUIPMENT: Classifying raw material down is imperative for successful gold recovery; remove large and worthless rocks, gravel and other aggregates from valuable pay dirt
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Top Diameter: 13.25 inches; Bottom Diameter: 11 inches; Weight: 1.3lbs; Color: Green

Heavy duty, rust free plastic sifting screen from ASR Outdoor will aid your increase the quality of the material you can run through a sluice box or gold pan, by separating unwanted coarse raw material into finer, manageable and hopefully more valuable pay dirt.

This classifier screen has been designed to be used in conjunction with a standard 5 gallon or 3 gallon bucket, as well as a 14 inch gold pan; this sifting screen is stackable, interlocking on top of other classifier screens if desired, to create an efficient material classification system, ready for panning. sluicing or high banking.

Featuring four holes per square inch, this classifier screen will work best with partially classified or finer raw materials given the mesh size. The sifting screen is also a great tool for rock hounding or gem hunting, as well as foraging. Good luck out there, we hope you strike it rich!

title: 19pc Metal Detector Accessories Kit with Musette Style Field Tool Bag
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• METAL DETECTOR ACCESSORIES: Kit includes x1 Musette style tool bag; x1 3 in 1 shovel with pick; x1 pair of gloves; x1 depth marker trowel; x1 waterproof notebook with pencil; x1 serrated edge digger; x1 scoop with probe; x1 large sand scoop and assorted collection tools
  • UNIQUE TOOL BAG: Featuring a large, main compartment for raw materials collection, there are 13 total interior pockets to keep tools organized; a side opening specialty tool flap found on the front of the bag allows for quick to notepads, diagrams or maps, as well as built in exterior pinpointer side loop
  • METAL DETECTING SHOVEL: 2 in 1 metal detecting shovel means less tools in the field; scoop measures 14 inches and features a built in steel probe for finding and collecting valuables in sand and dirt; probe unscrews from inside the top of the handle and can be reattached to the end of the scoop so both tools can be used simultaneously  
  • NO SPACE WASTED: All metal detector accessories included with this ASR Outdoor kit fit into the included musette style tool bag, making it easy to tote tools to and from the field, while keeping them together and organized in one secure location
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Kit Dimensions: 15 x 12 x 6.5 inches; Kit Weight: 6.20lbs

Whether you’re searching for small bits of history or cash value items like gold coins, jewelry or precious metals, set yourself up for success in the field with ASR Outdoors 18pc Metal Detector Accessories Kit.

The kit includes the following metal detector accessories:

x1 Musette style shoulder bag; x1 3 in 1 shovel with pick; x1 pair of gloves; x1 depth marker trowel; x1 10X eye loupe; x1 carabiner clip; x6 resealable plastic zip lock bags; x1 waterproof notebook; x1 serrated edge digger; x1 scoop with probe; x1 large sand scoop and x1 pair of tweezers

The best part about this metal detector accessories field kit, is that all included tools fit into the included musette style tool bag, making it easy to tote tools to and from the field, while keeping them together and organized in one location.

Featuring a large, main compartment for raw materials collection, there are a total of 13 interior pockets to keep tools organized; a specialty zipper opening tool flap pocket found on the front of the bag, allows for quick access to notepads, maps, pens and pencils, personal belongings and more. In addition, the tool bag also features a built in exterior side loop, specifically designed to hold a standard handheld pinpointer, giving you quick and easy access in the field when needed.

Also worth noting, is the 2 in 1 metal detecting shovel; the durable ABS plastic scoop measures 14 inches in length and features a built in steel probe for finding and collecting valuables in sand and dirt. The steel probe unscrews from inside the top of the handle, and can conveniently be reattached to the end of the scoop, so both tools can be used simultaneously.

Whether you’re a seasoned metal detecting hobbyist or brand new to the sport, the ASR Outdoor 18pc Metal Detector Accessories Kit is suitable for all levels and will have you covered in the field from start to finish.

title: 13 Inch Serrated Edge Digger, Versatile Hand Trowel for Breaking up Hard Ground
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
• VERSATILE DIGGING TOOL: Easily break through hard soil and stubborn roots, ideal for metal detector hobbyist and home gardening DIY projects; this is the right tool to have when a plastic hand trowel wont break through the earth
  • FIELD TESTED: After many seasons on the hunt for treasure finds we have seen the benefit of the heated carbon steel this hand digging tool is made from; weatherproof and rust proof this is a hand tool that can stand up to hard use rain or shine. No need to avoid rocks when you can dig right past them
  • DOUBLE EDGE SERRATED BLADE: 7.5 inch carbon steel blade is designed to penetrate hard soil and overburden with ease; use the double edge to saw into the ground in either direction to pull out clean clumps of earth to expose your find or simply plant some seeds like Johnny Appleseed
  • NON SLIP ERGONOMIC HAND: Often overlooked, our handle is oversized with a criss cross pattern to prevent slippage and allow a firm grasp; it feels good in the hand
  • DETAILED SPECIFICATIONS: Handle Length: 5 inches; Blade Length: 7.5 inches; Overall Length:13 inches; Includes black nylon sheath with built in belt loop for storage

Easily break through compacted gravel, hard soil and stubborn roots with the ASR Outdoor Serrated Edge Digger.

This versatile 13 inch hand trowel is constructed of heavy duty heat treated carbon steel that will allow you to shovel through the tough materials. It features a serrated edge that is designed for easily cutting through top layers of brush and soil while on the hunt for lost possessions or at home gardening so you can plant new seeds with ease. The blade itself is 7.5 inches in length, so you can count on it to dig deep into whatever earth you're working with.

The garden digger features a high visibility bright orange handle with an ergonomic grip to prevent slippage during use, and it even comes with a nylon sheath to protect the serrated edges when not in use. The sheath also features a belt loop so you can attach it to your belt while you're working. This is a great multipurpose digging tool for gardeners and metal detector hobbyist a like.

title: 11 Inch Pin Pointer Metal Detecting Hand Trowel Shovel with Depth Markers (2 Colors)
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
The ASR Outdoor Metal Detector Hand Trowel is a reliable hand tool that is crafted from high abrasive ABS plastic, which makes it not only strong and durable, but also lightweight and easy to use. The main benefit of using a non metal hand trowel is that you can use a pin pointer metal detector on the dirt that is still in the shovel without getting false positive readings.

The ideal use for this is for when metal detecting in the field to get scoops out of a dug hole and then swept with a pin pointer to determine if the object that the metal detector sounded off for is in the trowel. You can't do this with a metal trowel!

Each trowel features a 4 inch measuring scale on the scoop so you can control the depth of your digging. This hand trowel is extremely versatile and can be used in multiple types of terrain.

  • NO FALSE POSITIVES: Constructed from ABS plastic composite you can use a pin pointer metal detector on the dirt that is still in the shovel without getting false positive readings
  • DEPTH MARKER: Specially designed depth ruler is embossed into the face of the shovel pan; this will not wear off with normal use and will help control metered digging
  • DURABILITY AND LONGEVITY: Made to stand up to daily use this handheld digging tool will do the job consistently well and will be a reliable asset to keep with your metal detecting tools and accessories
  • COMFORT AND EASE: The metal detector hand trowel features an ergonomic handle with rubber thumb grip that aides in the daily use of this tool
