NO FALSE POSITIVES: Constructed from ABS plastic composite you can use a pin pointer metal detector on the dirt that is still in the shovel without getting false positive readings DEPTH MARKER: Specially designed depth ruler is embossed into the face of the shovel pan; this will not wear off with normal use and will help control metered digging DURABILITY AND LONGEVITY: Made to stand up to daily use this handheld digging tool will do the job consistently well and will be a reliable asset to keep with your metal detecting tools and accessories COMFORT AND EASE: The metal detector hand trowel features an ergonomic handle with rubber thumb grip that aides in the daily use of this tool

title: ASR Outdoor 10L Collapsible Bucket and Stand Gold Prospecting Equipment, 6pc
category: Uncategorized
description_html:
Whether you're new to gold panning or are an experienced gold prospector, you know how important it is to be able to successfully and efficiently classify your raw material down to usable paydirt, either for panning or to run through a sluice box to find gold nuggets, gems or other. The ASR Outdoor collapsible bucket and collapsible stand does just this in conjunction with the ASR Outdoor sifting pans in just a few easy steps.

The ASR Outdoor collapsible bucket has been designed to work seamlessly with ASR Outdoor sifting pans; together they make a an efficient classification system that is easy to set up and take down, lightweight and reliable. The collapsible bucket is a lightweight alternative to a traditional 5 gallon bucket, which can be heavy and cumbersome to use, as well as carry to and from your gold claim site.

To use the bucket and stand combo, you simply slide the four arms into the base and rotate until they lock in place. Then place the collapsible bucket over the tops of the arms and secure. Next, add your classifier screen and you're ready to start classifying your raw material.

The collapsible bucket is made from BPA free silicone, features a sturdy carrying handle, bottom finger indentation and water pouring channel; the bucket can also be employed for tons of other uses outside of gold panning kits like fishing, gardening, as an ice bucket, for camping and much more

Lastly, a handy mesh bag is included to make carrying the collapsible bucket and stand components easier, while allowing for tidy and organized storage when you're not utilizing your gold prospecting equipment to ensure none of the pieces are lost.

The collapsible bucket with stand is space saving, compact and lightweight in design, and overall an incredibly useful tool to include with your gold prospecting equipment.

title: Classifier Screen with 10L Collapsible Silicone Bucket Gold Prospecting Equipment
category: Sporting Goods
description_html:
Whether you're new to gold panning or are an experienced gold prospector, you know how important it is to be able to successfully and efficiently classify your raw material down to usable paydirt, either for panning or to run through a sluice box to find gold nuggets, gems or other. The ASR Outdoor collapsible bucket, collapsible stand and 1/4 inch classifier screen does just this in just a few easy steps!

The ASR Outdoor collapsible bucket has been designed to work seamlessly with the included 1/4 inch ASR Outdoor sifting pan; together they make a an efficient classification system that is easy to set up and take down, lightweight and reliable. The collapsible bucket is a lightweight alternative to a traditional 5 gallon bucket, which can be heavy and cumbersome to use, as well as carry to and from your gold claim site. To use the bucket and stand combo, you simply slide the four arms into the base and rotate until they lock in place. Then place the collapsible bucket over the tops of the arms and secure. Next, add your sifter and you're ready to start classifying your raw material.

The 1/4 inch classifier screen we've included in this gold panning kit is made from high impact, durable ABS plastic and will stand up to lots of gold prospecting equipment wear and tear. This sifting screens will allow you to classify down material to usable paydirt, removing larger unwanted materials like rocks and gravels, leaving you with just sand, fine gravels and hopefully gold nuggets! And, as mentioned, the sifters are designed to be stacked on top of the collapsible bucket for quick and efficient processing of unclassified paydirt.

The collapsible bucket is made from BPA free silicone, features a sturdy carrying handle, bottom finger indentation and water pouring channel; the bucket can also be employed for tons of other uses outside of gold panning kits like fishing, gardening, as an ice bucket, for camping and much more. Lastly, a handy mesh bag is included to make carrying the collapsible bucket and stand components easier, while allowing for tidy and organized storage when you're not utilizing your gold prospecting equipment to ensure none of the pieces are lost (does not fit the 1/4 inch classifier screen).

The collapsible bucket with stand is space saving, compact and lightweight in design, and overall a useful and versatile tool to include with your gold prospecting equipment.

title: 3pc Heavy Duty Cold Steel Chisel Set Rock Hounding Equipment
category: Hardware > Tools > Carving Chisels & Gouges > Straight Chisels
description_html:
Take to the field with confidence, knowing you have a reliable cold steel chisel set in your arsenal of tools from ASR Outdoor. Whether as geology tools, rock hounding equipment, for paleontology or archeology excursions and digs, this three piece cold chisel set will get the job done quickly and efficiently! 

The chisel set includes three different chisel lengths, 9.5, 10 and 12 inches respectively, and is made up of two standard flat heads chisels and one cross cut head chisel. Made from chrome molybdenum steel with a hardness rating of HRC 55-58, this ASR Outdoor chisel set has incredible tensile strength, impact resistance and toughness, standing up to intense wear and tear in the field. The chisel sets remarkable density, rust resistance properties and comfortable handling make them ideal hand tools for recurrent and reliable use on site.    

While this cold steel chisel set has been designed for geology kits, rock hounding equipment and related field work, they are nevertheless suitable across other applications, such as metal forming and cutting, removing waste, cutting rivets, rods or rusted bolts, brickwork and more.

Set Weight: 2.14lbs

Whether you're setting up camp deep in the backcountry or anchoring a canopy for a weekend outing, these rugged ground stakes are designed to hold strong when it matters most.

Constructed from a durable, single body design, these tent stakes deliver dependable ground anchoring, while remaining lightweight enough for backpacking and travel. The pointed tip allows for easy penetration into dirt, sand, gravel, or grass, while the reinforced top stopper and integrated eyelet make setup and removal quick and efficient. These tent pegs are constructed from durable and long lasting galvanized steel, meaning a protective zinc coating is placed over top of the steel in order to prevent rusting or corrosion. 

Designed with versatility in mind, these multipurpose stakes are ideal for securing camping tents, tarps, rain flies, canopies, and even landscaping or outdoor event setups. Their high-visibility color helps you quickly locate your gear in low light conditions, reducing the chance of lost or forgotten stakes at your campsite.

NOTE: Orange is the only style with twisted metal body design. Green and Glow in the Dark styles features a straight metal body design.

  • Reliable Ground Hold – Designed for strong anchoring in dirt, sand, gravel, and grassy terrain
  • Lightweight & Packable – Ideal for camping, backpacking, hiking, and travel
  • Durable One-Piece Construction – Built for repeated outdoor use without bending or breaking
  • Quick Setup Design – Pointed tip and top stopper with eyelet for fast installation and removal
  • High Visibility Color – Easy to spot in your gear or low-light conditions (orange or glow in the dark options)

description_html:
Be prepared wherever your adventure takes you with the ASR Outdoor 3-in-1 Waterproof Match Container—a compact, multi-function survival tool designed to keep your essentials dry, accessible, and ready when you need them most.

Built for the outdoors, this durable waterproof container safely stores matches and small survival items, protecting them from moisture, rain, and harsh conditions. Whether you're deep in the backcountry or preparing for emergencies, this pocket-sized tool delivers reliable performance in a lightweight design.

More than just storage, this versatile container features a built-in signaling mirror in the lid for emergency visibility and communication, along with a firestarter flint integrated into the base—giving you multiple survival tools in one compact unit.

From camping trips to emergency kits, this is a must-have addition for anyone who values preparedness and simplicity in the outdoors.

  • 3-in-1 Survival Tool: Waterproof storage, signal mirror, and firestarter flint all in one compact design

  • Integrated Signal Mirror: Reflective lid helps attract attention or signal for help in emergency situations
  • Built-In Firestarter Flint: Reliable spark source for starting fires in the field for warmth, cooking, or signaling
  • Compact & Lightweight: Pocket-sized design makes it easy to carry in backpacks, kits, or everyday gear

Keep your camp kitchen simple, compact, and ready for anything with the ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Camping Utensil Set. Designed for efficiency in the outdoors, this all-in-one set includes a knife, fork, and spoon that clip neatly together for easy storage in your pack, pocket, or emergency kit. Whether you're hiking deep into the backcountry or setting up at a campsite, this streamlined design keeps your essentials organized and always within reach.

Built from durable stainless steel, each utensil is made to handle rugged outdoor use without adding unnecessary weight to your gear. The knife features a built-in can opener, giving you added functionality for preparing meals on the go—no extra tools required. From quick trail lunches to campsite dinners, this set delivers reliable performance wherever you are.

Lightweight, practical, and easy to carry, the set also includes a convenient carrying case to keep everything clean and contained between uses. It’s an essential addition to any camping kit, backpack, or bug-out bag—perfect for those who value simplicity, durability, and smart design in the outdoors.

- Clip-Together Design: Knife, fork, and spoon securely clip together, keeping your gear organized and compact.

- Built-In Can Opener: The knife includes an integrated can opener—perfect for campsite meals and emergency food prep.

- Durable Stainless Steel Construction: Rust-resistant and built to last through repeated outdoor use.

- Lightweight & Packable: Ideal for backpacks, bug-out bags, camping kits, and travel.

- Complete Set with Carrying Case: Includes knife, fork, spoon, and a convenient carrying case for easy storage on the go.

Choose from a 1-pack or 2-pack set.

category: Office Supplies > General Office Supplies > Paper Products > Notebooks & Notepads > Notepads
description_html:
Ever found yourself camping or hiking and wish you could take notes, regardless of the weather? The ASR Outdoor mini waterproof notebook comes with 50 sheets of waterproof, smudge-proof, and tear-proof paper that can be used in any weather condition without worrying about sweat, water, or moisture.

These notebooks are made of tough, impact-resistant materials with a wire-O binding to ensure you can count on it rain or shine. It measures just 3"x 5" and will fit inside just about any pocket, travel bag or backpack used for outdoor activities.

Each notebook comes with a mini 3" pencil that will write legibly in any weather condition. Unlike traditional pens, pencils are great for outdoor and travel because you won't have to deal with it leaking into your backpack or gear bag.

The spiral-notebook journal features a weatherproof and flexible cover designed to protect your notes from stains and scratches. You can count on it to record your on-the-go lists, logs, and notes in wet environments. Take it with you on your next hiking, camping, or boating trip.

title: Lightweight Waterproof Dry Sack Bags with Roll Top (3 Sizes, 3 Colors)
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation > Camping & Hiking > Camping Tools
description_html:
Keep your gear organized and better protected from rain, splashes and wet conditions with our Waterproof Dry Sack Bags. Designed for kayaking, camping, hiking, rafting, boating, fishing, paddle boarding, backpacking and travel, these lightweight roll top dry bags offer compact, packable dry storage for outdoor essentials.

Available in multiple sizes, colors, and materials, these waterproof dry sack bags let you choose the right dry bag for everything from minimalist day trips to extended outdoor adventures. The compact 3 Liter Waterproof Dry Sack, made from lightweight 210T Terylene, is ideal for storing small valuables like phones, keys, snacks, and emergency essentials, while the larger 15 Liter and 20 Liter Dry Bags are constructed from durable 70D ripstop nylon with PU coating and feature a gusseted bottom for added capacity and structure.

Each waterproof dry bag features a roll top buckle closure designed to help protect contents when properly sealed, while remaining lightweight and easy to pack into a kayak, canoe, backpack, or camping kit. Select sizes also include a convenient D-ring attachment point for clipping accessories or securing gear.

Whether used as a kayaking dry bag, camping dry sack, floating waterproof bag for boating, or lightweight storage sack for hiking and backpacking, these versatile bags are built for outdoor utility. Available in 3L, 15L, and 20L capacities, they offer solutions for carrying everything from phones and valuables to clothing, food and trail gear. 

  • CAPACITY DRY BAG: ASR Outdoor waterproof dry sack holds either 3, 15 or 20 liters of personal items; Ideal waterproof storage bag for outdoor activities where essentials may be exposed to moisture and  water like boating, kayaking, and camping
  • WATERPROOF MATERIAL: 15 and 20 liter dry sacks are made of durable, Ripstop 70D PU-coated nylon designed to protect your essentials from water; Inside of bag is also coated 
    • 3L dry sack bag is made from 210T Terylene material
  • 15L and 20L BAGS WITH GUSSETED BOTTOMs: Bag features large gusseted bottom allowing you to store more gear; Extra pieces of fabric give the bag extra strength and room
  • SAFE AND SECURE: Strong buckle closure ensures items are secured even during intense travel and movement; Comes with D-ring ideal for attaching items for quick access like whistles, keys, straps, and compasses
  • NOTE: These dry sack bags are not meant to be fully submerged under water or act as a flotation device

title: 12pc Break Your Own Geodes Kit with Sledge Hammer and Safety Goggles (Assorted Size Geodes)
category: Toys & Games > Toys > Educational Toys > Science & Exploration Sets
description_html:
Ever wondered what lies inside these old, rugged rocks? Crack open a hands on adventure with Break Your Own Geodes Kit from ASR Outdoor! Perfect for curious minds, rock collectors, hobbyists, kids or geology enthusiasts alike, these break your own geodes let you crack open your very own rocks to discover absolutely stunning crystals hidden within!

Sourced from Morocco, our authentic and genuine geodes are 100% natural, and will range in sizes from two to five inches in diameter. Kit includes ten assorted size geodes, one sledge hammer and a pair of safety goggles.

  • Amaze and Delight: Each geode is a unique, natural masterpiece, showcasing vibrant crystals and intricate formations; no two rocks are the same!
  • Perfect for All Ages: Ideal for geology enthusiasts, hobbyists, or anyone who loves discovering nature’s surprises
  • Educational and Entertaining: A fantastic way to learn about the Earth's geological processes while enjoying a hands on experience
  • How to Break Open Geodes: Use the included ten inch sledge hammer to crack open the Moroccan geodes and reveal the stunning and glistening crystal interior (adult supervision required)

A great learning activity for kids, these natural wonders will awe and inspire budding geologists with their naturally formed spectacular crystal interior. Kids can start or add these amazing specimens to their very own rock collection. Geodes are fascinating natural formations that arise through a unique geological process, all of which is explained in the included educational insert. Discover nature’s hidden treasure with ASR Outdoors Break Your Own Geodes Kit!

NOTE: Children should not attempt breaking geode rocks open without adult supervision and should always wear included safety goggles.

title: 5LB Genuine Rough Gemstone Paydirt Bags, Rocks and Minerals Collection, Sift, Sort and Find Treasure
category: Arts & Entertainment > Hobbies & Creative Arts > Collectibles > Rocks & Fossils
description_html:
Each five pound ASR Outdoor Brazilian rough gemstone paydirt bag is a cornucopia of excitement and discovery, two pounds of gemstones. Packed with a great variety of authentic and genuine Brazilian gemstones, as well as smaller tumbled stones, the thrill of sifting through paydirt and identifying precious gemstones awaits!

In your gemstone paydirt, you’ll discover an assortment of rough gemstones like Amazonite, Rough Amethyst, Carnelian, Citrine, Clear Quartz, Fuchsite, Labradorite, Pyrite, Moonstone, Rose Quartz, Sea Jasper, Smoky Quartz, Tiger Eye and more! Use the gemstone identification chart to identify which gemstones you uncovered!

HOW TO USE: Fill a large bucket with water; scoop out paydirt into sifting screen (scoop and sifting screen not included); dip sifting screen into water to remove dirt and repeat with remaining paydirt; sift through material a second time to ensure no rocks or gemstones were missed! Clean and dry found gemstones and rocks and store in included burlap drawstring bag for safekeeping

Whether you're a seasoned gem enthusiast or a curious beginner, our gemstone paydirt delivers the thrill of sifting through rich, organic material to uncover genuine gemstones. Perfect for hobbyists, rock collectors, kids and families looking for a fun, hands on and screen free learning activity!

KIT INCLUDES: 5lb rough Brazilian gemstone paydirt bag, 8 x 12 burlap cinch bag for rock and gemstone storage, paydirt screening instructions card and a double sided gemstone identification chart and information card

Clean and dry found gemstones and rocks and store in included burlap drawstring bag for safekeeping Whether you're a seasoned gem enthusiast or a curious beginner, our gemstone paydirt delivers the thrill of sifting through rich, organic material to uncover genuine gemstones. Perfect for hobbyists, rock collectors, kids and families looking for a fun, hands on and screen free learning activity! KIT INCLUDES: 5lb rough Brazilian gemstone paydirt bag, 8 x 12 burlap cinch bag for rock and gemstone storage, paydirt screening instructions card and a double sided gemstone identification chart and information card

title: 9 Inch 440 Stainless Steel Recurve Full Tang Fixed Blade Knife with Sheath (4.25 Inch Blade)
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation > Camping & Hiking > Camping Tools > Hunting & Survival Knives
description_html:
The nine inch Fixed Recurve Blade Full Tang Hunting Knife with wood handle from ASR Outdoor is engineered for precision and versatility in the field. For chopping, slashing, peeling and other base to point cutting tasks, this knife can do it all.
If you’re not familiar with a recurve blade, it means that the knife blade itself is shaped like the letter ‘S’ with a concave edge. The fixed recurve blade lengthens the cutting edge without making the blade longer; it places the edge at multiples to the work being done, allowing it to easily handle different cutting angles.

Why choose this style of knife? The design of the knife allows you to move mass out to the tip of your blade by adding width, instead of thickness, preserving cutting ability and adding chopping power at the same time. 

The full tang 440 stainless steel construction ensures that the blades weight is more evenly distributed throughout the knife, making it easier to control; full tang blade ensures structural integrity and strength when handling, one you’ll be able to notice in comparison to a partial tang. And, importantly, the 440 stainless steel material boasts excellent edge retention and corrosion resistance, while the wood handle ensures a natural and comfortable grip, offering reliable feedback during cutting task.

The included sheath with a belt loop offers convenient and safe carrying, ensuring your knife is always within reach when you need it. Whether you’re hunting, camping, or exploring the wilderness, this hunting knife with fixed recurve blade is built to handle it all with confidence and precision.

title: 7 Inch Matte Black Curved Hawkbill Full Tang Fixed Blade Knife with Sheath and Lanyard (3.25 Inch Blade)
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation > Camping & Hiking > Camping Tools > Hunting & Survival Knives
description_html:
For everyday use, martial arts, combat or tactical scenarios, and even for camping, hunting and fishing, the ASR Tactical 7 Inch Full Tang Hawkbill Blade Karambit Knife is extremely versatile in many different environments. 

As for the anatomy of this tactical knife, it’s intentionally designed with a curved, downward sloping tip, with full tang hawkbill blade, making it ideal for pull cutting applications where slicing and controlled cutting methods are required. This knife can cover everything from skinning elk or small game, cleaning a fish, cutting through tough rope, carving, whittling, fashioning kindling and more.

For tactical purposes, the inward curve allows for controlled slashes, making it an effective choice for self defense, martial arts or combat situations (blade length measures 3.25 inches). Engineered for power, precision and control, the razor sharp, corrosion resistant blade effortlessly slices through a myriad of different materials. The full tang 440 stainless steel construction ensures that the blade weight is more evenly distributed, making it easier to control, ensuring structural integrity and maximum strength during handling.

The built in finger hole enhances grip and control over the blade by providing an additional point of contact; knife also features finger groves, a textured handle, and top thumb groove to improve leverage, extraction and ensures more precise blade manipulation. The ergonomic handle provides a secure and comfortable grip, ensuring that the knife remains firmly in hand even when wet or slippery. 

Lastly, the included sheath with lanyard offers convenient and safe carrying, ensuring your knife is always within reach when you need it, whether on or off person. Whether you’re hunting, camping, exploring the wilderness or practicing your tactical knife skills, this full tang hawkbill blade knife from ASR Tactical is built to handle it all with confidence and precision.

title: Collapsible Camping Lanterns (Black or Grey)
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation > Camping & Hiking > Camping Lights & Lanterns
description_html:
These collapsible camping lanterns provide 360 degree dense bright white, high quality, uniform lighting for camping, road tripping, if you’re stuck in a power outage, boating, hiking and more.

Equipped with COB technology, the camping lanterns have long lasting bulbs and come with batteries preinstalled, making them conveniently ready to use right out of the box.

In addition, the outdoor lights feature a unique collapsible design, giving you control over the luminosity output, allowing for easy adjustments depending on how much you light you need across different indoor or outdoor scenarios.

The camping lanterns also have built in, foldaway handles on the exterior body of the lantern, making them portable and quick to hang if needed; their compact sizes when fully collapsed contributes to their longevity and durability, while also making them lightweight and easy to tote packed, or hooked to the exterior of outdoor gear with a carabiner (not included).

An outdoor essential, these collapsible outdoor lights can help prep a meal in the dark, make the perfect reading light in your tent, create ambiance for late night camp games and act as a staple in your roadside emergency car kit or general emergency supplies.

And yes, you could just use a flashlight or headlamp, but these lightweight, portable adjustable lanterns make all your two handed tasks easier and more efficient with ambient lighting.

Large Lantern Dimensions Open: 7.25 inches

Large Lantern Dimensions Collapsed: 5 inches

Small Lantern Dimensions Open: 5.5 inches

Small Lantern Dimensions Collapsed: 3.25 inches

title: 12 Inch Full Tang Steel Axe Hatchet with Gut Hook Hex Holes Paracord Handle and Sheath, Black
category: Hardware > Tools > Axes
description_html:
Meet a compact powerhouse hatchet forged for outdoor action.

ASR Outdoor 12 Inch full tang high-carbon steel hatchet has multiple features, making it a great hand tool to pack with your outdoor gear, survival gear, camping gear, hunting gear and more.

-          Razor sharp steel blade with full tang durability

-          Paracord wrapped handle for grip and emergency

-          Built in gut hook to field dress like a pro

-          Mini pry bar and three hex holes

The ergonomic paracord wrapped handle ensures a secure grip and can be unwound for emergency use, while a sharp gut hook near the top edge offers clean and easy field dressing. A mini pry bar integrated into the lower handle makes quick work of lifting, scraping, or light demolition tasks. Plus, the handle includes three hex wrench holes for on the go adjustments, making it a compact multi tool you can count on.

Includes a black tactical sheath that securely covers the hatchet head, keeping the blade protected and ready for safe transport.

RAZOR SHARP STEEL BLADE: Forged from steel, this lightweight hatchet features a razor sharp blade and well balanced, full tang design; lanyard and fitted hatch head nylon sheath included

PARACORD WRAPPED HANDLE: Wrapped paracord handle allows for enhanced grip, while also acting as an emergency preparedness item or survival tool that can be unwound in case of injury, repair and more

BUILT IN GUT HOOK: ASR Outdoor hatchet comes with a built in gut hook designed to make field dressing tasks quick and efficient, and allows for one less tool to pack with your hunting or fishing gear

MINI PRY BAR HANDLE: Integrated into the lower handle, you’ll find a mini pry bar that makes quick work of tasks that require leverage, lifting, separating or light demolition work

x3 BUILT IN HEX HOLES: The hatchet handle also comes with three different sized hex wrench holes for on the go adjustments of nuts and bolts, making it a compact multitool you can count on

title: 13pc Creekside Gold Panning Kit with Drawstring Backpack and Mini Classifiers
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation
description_html:
Strike gold wherever adventure takes you!

This ASR Outdoor gold panning kit is lightweight and easily portable, meaning you walk or hike to just about any river or creek with gold prospecting equipment on your back, and immediately start panning for gold; minimal set up time needed and no assembly required.

All gold prospecting equipment included in this gold panning kit, conveniently fit inside the included ASR Outdoor drawstring backpack, so you can remain hands free when you’re on the go, and easily pack everything out when you’re done for the day.

Designed for use right at the water’s edge, this kit includes a high quality 12 inch dual riffle gold pan that makes capturing gold easier with both shallow and deep riffle walls. The gold panning kit also comes with three essential mini stacking classifiers, to help increase gold recovery efforts by eliminating unwanted raw materials from your paydirt. The included scoop is perfect for digging into creeks and streams, while the fine gold recovery equipment helps in the collection of even the smallest gold flakes and flour.

Lastly, this gold panning kit also includes a compatible stacking classifier storage container to catch paydirt, or securely store any other found valuables like rocks or fossils while exploring in the wild.

Adventure awaits; good luck!

title: 14pc Remote Adventure 30L Rucksack Gold Panning Kit with Classifier Screens (3 Colors)
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation
description_html:
Meet your all in one prospecting adventure kit from ASR Outdoor.

Designed for gold seekers who like to venture into remote terrain. Whether you're an experienced prospector or just getting started, this gold panning kit equips you with the gear you need to find and recover gold, no matter where your journey takes you. Walk or hike to just about any river or creek with essential gold prospecting equipment on your back, where you can immediately start panning for gold, with minimal set up time required. 

All gold prospecting equipment included in this gold panning kit, conveniently fits inside the included ASR Outdoor 30L backpack, so you can remain hands free when you’re on the go, and easily pack everything out when you’re done for the day.

Here’s what’s included: 

  • Durable 30L Backpack: Built tough for the backcountry, this spacious pack carries all your gear comfortably with reinforced seams, padded and adjustable shoulder straps, and multiple compartments
  • Classifier Screens (Multiple Sizes): Speed up your panning process with lightweight, stackable screens that separate larger rocks and debris from finer material, ideal for high efficiency prospecting
  • Gold Pans: High quality 14 inch single riffle and 12 inch dual riffle gold pans ensure you never miss a flake, whether working in a riverbed or remote stream
  • 8lb Magnetic Pick Up Tool: Remove unwanted magnetic black sand from concentrates quickly, lightweight and perfect for field use
  • 3-in-1 Shovel: Compact yet rugged, this digging tool is ready to tackle any terrain, whether breaking hard ground, scooping gravel or digging into riverbanks
  • Collapsible Bucket with Stand: Lightweight and portable, this fold-able bucket is perfect for collecting water or transporting pay dirt; packs down small to save space.
  • Fine Gold Recovery Tools: Everything you need to help recover and store even the tiniest specs of gold with ease

Designed for portability and performance, the 14pc Remote Rucksack Gold Panning Kit is your reliable companion for off the grid gold adventures. Whether hiking into remote streams or exploring historic gold fields, you’ll have all the tools needed to pan, classify, recover and store found gold. Adventure awaits, good luck!

title: 20pc Complete Gold Panning Kit with 50 Inch Folding Sluice Box and 5 Gallon Bucket (3 Colors)
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation
description_html:
Get ready to dig, classify, pan, sluice and recover like a pro, with this comprehensive 20pc gold prospecting equipment kit with 5 gallon bucket from ASR Outdoor. Designed for end to end raw material processing, this gold panning kit covers the entire gold recovery process, from initial deposit collection to fine gold recovery. And, whether you choose to feed your river sluice or pan for gold, you’ve conveniently got both options available with this gold panning kit.

50 INCH FOLDING SLUICE BOX: The MVP of this gold panning kit has to be the portable, folding aluminum 50 inch sluice box. It includes miners moss and carpet already installed, and with little assembly required, you’ll be running paydirt in no time. Folded Dimensions: 15 x 9.25 x 5 inches

DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS: With both shallow and deep riffles, a wide textured bottom for material deposit separation and deep green color to highlight even fine gold, the riffled traps work to catch gold as the lighter material flows out of the pan, effectively and efficiently increasing your gold recovery efforts

CLASSIFIER SCREENS: A must have tool to include with your gold panning equipment, our classifier screens are made of tough, high impact plastic and stainless steel wire mesh. The design is purposely made to stack on top of a 5 gallon bucket and used in multiples to increase classification efficiency and in turn, gold recovery

16LB MAGNETIC BLACK SAND SEPARATORL: Removing magnetic black sand with our magnetic pick up tool will save time and effort when trying to separate gold from other heavy sediments. Removing magnetic black sand, which often contains magnetite or hematite, are commonly found in the same areas as gold, making them difficult to separate; by clearing out these magnetic minerals, it will be easier to spot fine gold particles

title: Universal Fit Survival 550 Paracord Belt with Stainless Steel Buckle, 52 inch
category: Apparel & Accessories > Clothing Accessories > Belts
description_html:
ASR Outdoor 550 Survival Paracord Duty Belt: Your Wearable Emergency Tool

Always be ready for the unexpected with the ASR Outdoor 550 Survival Paracord Duty Belt. This isn't just a belt; it's a vital piece of everyday survival gear that keeps over 100 feet of durable paracord wrapped conveniently around your waist. Perfect for essential preparedness and tactical applications, you'll have the resources to improvise in any outdoor emergency.

Why the ASR Outdoor Paracord Belt is Essential Gear

This innovative survival belt provides quick access to a versatile tool for countless situations:

Always Prepared: By wearing your paracord, you eliminate the need to search through your pack in an emergency. It's always on hand when you need to rig a tent, start a fire, set snares, fish, or repair gear.

Tactical & Practical: Whether you're in the wilderness or facing an unexpected situation, this belt offers immediate access to a strong, reliable rope. Use the unraveled paracord for tasks like:

    • Tying down loads on your vehicle.
    • Hanging gear while camping.
    • Creating an emergency sling to navigate difficult terrain.

Unmatched Strength & Durability

    • Constructed from Mil-Spec 550 Tactical Paracord, the same high-quality material used by the US Military.
    • Features 7 strands of 100% genuine Mil-Spec 550lb parachute cord.
    • Boasts a breaking strength of 550 lbs with a reliable working load of 220 lbs.
    • The cord has an overall thickness of 5/32" diameter and a consistent 10% elongation under loaded weight, ensuring dependable performance.

Comfortable Universal Fit:

    • Designed for a universal fit with high adjustability.
    • Features a durable stainless steel belt buckle.
    • No pre-made belt holes mean you can secure the belt clasp through the paracord weave at any desired interval for a perfectly comfortable and secure fit.

Beef Up Your Bug Out Bag & Daily Wear

The ASR Outdoor black paracord belt is an essential addition to your bug out bag and an ideal piece of daily wear gear. Stay prepared, stay safe, and be ready for any adventure with this indispensable survival tool.

title: Full Magnesium Body Fire Starter Survival Tool with Striker
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation > Camping & Hiking > Camping Tools
description_html:
Whether you're deep in the backcountry, prepping for emergencies, or teaching essential outdoor skills, the ASR Outdoor Magnesium Fire Starter is your go to tool for instant flame and reliable heat! Set includes striker and magnesium fire starter on keychain.

Compact and powerful, this pocket sized fire starter packs serious survival punch. Just shave off some magnesium onto dry tinder, strike the ferro rod with the included scraper, and voila! A burst of hot sparks ignites your fire in seconds, even in damp or windy conditions.

Perfect for campers, hikers, backpackers, preppers, and anyone who loves the outdoors, this fire starter is a smart, lightweight addition to your survival kit or bug out bag.

No matches? No problem. Wet wood? Still lights. Cold night? You’re covered.

Don’t get caught without a flame--grab the fire starting tool that sparks when it counts!

How to Use:

  1. Gather tinder of preferred size/amount.

  2. Use the serrated edge of the striker to scrape along the magnesium rod to create shavings.

  3. Sprinkle magnesium shavings throughout the tinder pile or create a cluster to the size of a U.S. quarter coin.

  4. Hold the flint at an angle over the pile, sliding the striker forcefully along the length of the flint to create sparks.

  5. Continue sliding the striker against the flint until sparks land directly onto the shavings pile and ignite a flame.

  6. Note: Strip the protective layer of paint from the striker before first-time use for best results.

Note: Strip the protective layer of paint from the striker before first-time use for best results.

title: 14 Inch Metal Detecting Sand Scoop with Coin Probe (3 Colors)
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation > Camping & Hiking > Camping Tools
description_html:
The ASR Outdoor sand scoop for metal detecting features a 14-inch length handle for easier digging while treasure hunting, making this a great tool for both beginners and metal detecting enthusiasts! The ergonomic handle can help add comfort and stability while scooping dirt, sand, and soft gravel rock spots. 

The Scoop N Probe has a unique design - it also doubles as a coin probe for locating precious metals with a metal detector. The brass probe easily screws onto the handle for a convenient design allowing for less clutter in the field.

Easy to use, the sand scoop and probe combo tool pairs perfectly with a metal detector. Use it to dig a small plug and remove it, examine the area with your detector, and then use the probe to probe the small hole that you made. Gently shake the scoop side to side to sift through dirt and sand, hopefully uncovering treasure. 

Our sand scoop is made of high-quality ABS plastic that is ideal for metal detecting because this  material will not cause false positives like other similar tools. The durable plastic is weather resistant and easy to clean after use to keep your tool ready for your next treasure hunting trip.

title: 4 in 1 Hand Crank Emergency AM/FM Weather Radio, Flashlight, Power Bank, Alarm Siren for Camping Gear and Survival Kits
category: Electronics > Communications > Communication Radios
description_html:
Be ready for any situation with this 4 in 1 Emergency Hand Crank Radio, Flashlight, Power Bank and Siren from ASR Outdoor, your all-in-one survival tool for light, power and communication. Whether you’re preparing for a power outage, camping off grid, or building an emergency kit, this compact device ensures you stay safe, connected and informed.

Equipped with a bright LED flashlight and a built-in 750mAh rechargeable battery, it delivers up to 15 hours of reliable light or 14 hours of AM/FM radio play on a single charge. Multiple charging options—including USB-C fast charging and a hand-crank generator—make it easy to stay powered anywhere. Just one minute of cranking gives you 5 minutes of light, 5 minutes of radio, or 1 minute of emergency siren use.

This versatile device also works as a portable power bank, featuring a USB-A output to charge smartphones and small electronics when outlets aren’t available. The AM/FM radio provides clear reception for news or weather updates, keeping you informed during storms, disasters or outdoor adventures.

Compact and lightweight at just 5" x 2-1/4", the two-tone gray and black design easily fits into emergency kits, bug-out bags, backpacks or glove compartments. With its built in emergency siren, intuitive controls, and durable construction, this survival radio flashlight is a must have emergency preparedness item.

Stay prepared, stay safe, and stay connected with the ASR Outdoor 4 in 1 Emergency Multitool, a must-have for every outdoor enthusiast. 

FLASHLIGHT: Reliable emergency crank flashlight delivers up to 15 hours of bright light on a single charge, ideal for blackout preparedness, to include with camping gear, survival kits and much more

RECHARGEABLE BATTERY: 750 mAh capacity fully recharges in just 4 hours and powers up to 15 hours of flashlight use or 14 hours of AM/FM radio operation

MULTIPLE CHARGING OPTIONS: Stay powered anywhere with USB-C charging (cable included) or hand-crank generator; 1 minute of cranking provides 5 minutes of light, 5 minutes of radio, or 1 minute of emergency alarm

EMERGENCY POWER BANK: Doubles as a portable charger with USB-A output to keep smartphones and small devices powered when outlets aren’t available

AM/FM WEATHER RADIO: Tuning and volume controls with AM (520–1710 MHz) and FM (87.5–108 MHz) reception keep you informed during storms, disasters, or off-grid adventures; easy to use tuning and volume dials

EMERGENCY SIREN: Built in alarm allows you to alert others or call for help in urgent situations

So, whether you're attaching keys to your belt loop, securing a water bottle to your backpack, or hanging a lantern in your tent, these ASR Outdoor locking carabiners deliver lightweight durability and dependable functionality. title: 5lb Navy Blue Wool Blanket Camping Survival Gear, 64 x 84 Inches (70% Wool, 30% Synthetic)
category: Home & Garden > Emergency Preparedness > Emergency Blankets
description_html:
Be prepared for any emergency situation with the ASR Outdoor 5lb Wool Blanket. Weighing in at a solid 5lbs, this heavy duty blanket is made with a 70% wool and 30% synthetic material blend for optimal warmth, durability and longevity. And, measuring 64 x 84 inches, this blanket is large enough for full body coverage, layering, or sharing—ideal for sleeping outdoors, emergencies or just cozying up at home.

Whether you’re hiking, camping, hunting, fishing, or traveling through extreme weather, it’s an essential piece of outdoor survival gear. It also serves as ground cover, shelter, padding, or a protective barrier against cold and damp environments. Wool's natural insulating properties make it perfect for retaining body heat, even when wet—an essential feature for unpredictable outdoor weather conditions. The synthetic blend enhances strength, reduces bulk, and makes care easier, so you can count on this blanket for years of use.

From your car’s emergency kit to a weekend camping trip, this wool blanket is a versatile, all season solution that combines function with practical comfort. A must have emergency preparedness item for survival kits, bug-out bags and everyday outdoor activities.

5LB WOOL BLANKET: Crafted from 70% natural wool and 30% synthetic fibers, this heavy duty blanket is warm, durable, naturally insulating and moisture wicking; measures 64 x 84 inches 

EMERGENCY PREPAREDNESS ITEMS: Pack this wool blanket with your survival gear, car first aid kit, earthquake emergency kit and more; a must have emergency preparedness item for natural disaster or unforeseen harsh and extreme weather conditions 

MULTIPURPOSE WOOL BLANKET: Use for ground cover or padding, as a protective shield in extreme weather conditions or folded to make a comfy pet bed; ideal for camping, first aid use, emergency preparedness, and also make a great addition to any home as a cozy throw blanket

DURABLE & LONG LASTING: The natural resilience of wool fibers, combined with synthetic material reinforcement, make these wool blankets resistant to wear, fraying, and thinning; built to withstand years of use in rugged conditions 

EASY TO CARE FOR: Wool blankets are extremely durable, but you can make them last longer with proper care; wash in a cool to warm water setting using a wool safe detergent and always hang or air dry

title: Compact 50 Lumens Mini Zipper Light with Keychain, Camping Hiking EDC Survival Gear
category: Hardware > Tools > Flashlights & Headlamps > Flashlights
description_html:
• Rechargeable Mini Zipper Light
  • Rechargeable 501015 Battery
  • USB Charging Cable Included
  • Charge Time: 30 Minutes to full Charge
  • Run Time: 90 Minutes to Run Time
  • Rechargeable 50Mah 501015 Lithium Battery
  • Bulb Power: 50 Lumen/0.5W SMD Bulb

Be prepared when you’re camping, hunting or hiking on your favorite local trail, with the ASR Outdoor Compact 50 Lumens Rechargeable Survival Mini Zipper Keychain Light Tool!

Yes, it might be small and compact at 1.5 inches long but, the mini zipper light still provides a strong 50 lumens of brightness that you can easily carry with you without any extra added weight or bulk to your person or gear. And, not to mention, if your flashlight, headlamp, lantern or other light sources fails, you can always rely on this little light with 90 minutes of run time (30 minutes to charge; USB cable included with purchase) to get you to where you need to go.

Easy to use, the mini rechargeable zipper flashlight easily attaches to the zipper of your jacket, backpack, purse or bag; the light is activated by simply hitting the integrated on/off switch button on the top of the mini zipper light device tool. And, notably, the mini zipper flashlight is not only exclusively used for survival and outdoor excursion purposes, but can also be attached to the zipper of any bag in order to help locate the contents; to a dog collar if you’re walking after hours or to keychain; or to a key ring to help you find a lock in the dark. The mini zipper keychain light is also a great item to add to any bug out bag, survival kit or vehicle emergency preparedness tote.

Whether walking your dog after hours, making your way to the bathroom at your campsite, hiking in low light or reading in your tent, never be without light with the ASR Outdoor Compact 50 Lumens Rechargeable Survival Mini Zipper Keychain Light Tool! Multifunctional, low maintenance, lightweight and easy to tote, the mini zipper flashlight will come in handy in a myriad of outdoor or recreational activities.

title: Non-Metallic Zirconia Ceramic Mini Survival Razor Blade, Wear-Resistant and Non-Dulling
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation > Camping & Hiking > Camping Tools > Hunting & Survival Knives
description_html:
Non-Metallic Covert Zirconia Ceramic Razor Blade was designed as a low profile survival knife that has been adopted for every day carry as it is easily carried without any added bulk. There have been many versions of this ceramic razor blade over time but this latest version, the CRB is to date the one you want. It is constructed from zirconia ceramic, which is very sharp, wear resistant and non-dulling; this non-metallic knife will continue to stay sharp and cut well with continued use. It has a lifespan that is greatly increased over older versions due to advances in ceramic materials technologies.

The main cutting surface of the razor blade features a chisel-grind edge that gives you a much more acute angle than a double-sided grind. It will cut better and hold its edge longer, which is what you want a blade to do when it comes to various cutting tasks.

A built in mini lanyard hole provides a means for this micro blade to be sewn into clothing, attached to your belt or outdoor gear, using natural Kevlar thread. In total, this non metal knife is smaller than a American quarter and can prove to be life saving when needed in emergency survival situations. Widely used as a component to EDC tactical gear and SERE kits this ceramic razor blade is a must.

Overall Size: 1.25" x 0.4" (30mm x 10mm); Thickness: 0.028" (0.7mm); Weight: 0.017 oz.

  • CERAMIC RAZOR BLADE: Totally non-metallic, made from Zirconia ceramic, a super hard material that is extremely wear-resistant and non dulling

  • ENHANCED MINI KNIFE: The fixed blade ceramic razor features a chisel-grind edge with a small lanyard hole allowing it to be sewn into clothing or attached via Kevlar thread to your belt or outdoor gear

  • SERE AND SURVIVAL KIT: The Ceramic Razor Blade is made small enough to be discreetly secured on your person; ideal for tactical escape and evasion EDC gear

  • SURVIVAL KNIFE: Created for rapid cutting of rope, paracord, zip ties and more

  • SPECIFICATIONS: Overall Size 1.25" x 0.4" (30mm x 10mm); Thickness: 0.028" (0.7mm); Weight: 0.017 oz.

title: Mini Folding Ceramic Razor Blade Survival Tool EDC Gear
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation > Camping & Hiking > Camping Tools > Hunting & Survival Knives
description_html:
• CERAMIC RAZOR BLADE - The ceramic blade is lightweight and very sharp; easy to use flip out design makes it perfect for survival and escape needs

  • SERE AND SURVIVAL KIT - The Folding Ceramic Razor Blade is made small enough to be discreetly secured on your person; ideal for SERE and survival kits

  • DURABLE LONG LASTING EDGE - Zirconia ceramic razor blade will hold up to repeated cuttings of super-tough fibers like Kevlar cord and paracord, which can ruin a steel edge

  • SURVIVAL KNIFE - Made from lightweight materials and features a rivet punch-hole for hanging on a lanyard or key chain; created for rapid removal of ropes, tape, flex-cuffs

  • DIMENSIONS - Length: 1.7 Inches Closed; 2.8 Inches Overall; Blade Thickness: .0275 inches, Weight: 0.1oz

Folding Razor Blade Knife, CFRK, has the intended purpose of cutting rope, paracord, zip ties, duct tape and more. It will stand the test of time due to the amazing edge-holding capability of the zirconia ceramic material the micro escape blade is made from. The edge of the ceramic razor blade will hold up to repeated cuttings of super-tough fibers like Kevlar and paracord, which can ruin a steel edge. A brass rivet provides both a pivot and a lanyard hole for easy attachment and carrying. 

The CFRK is made small enough to be discretely carried in pocket, ideal for SERE and survival kits. Can be used for EDC as it will fit nicely on a keychain. The escape razor blade makes a great addition to any bug out bag. Collapsible, light construction is ideal for long term use, every day carry, and storage. Easy to use flip out design makes it perfect for use in outdoor, survival, and emergency situations. Non-metallic materials also make this lightweight and easy to maintain. This top-quality lightweight blade is hygienic and rustproof, the handle is constructed of an injection-molded plastic.

title: First Aid Kit in Plastic Waterproof Case Survival Gear Emergency Preparedness Item, 50pc
category: Health & Beauty > Health Care > First Aid > First Aid Kits
description_html:
Have you ever found yourself in a situation where you needed emergency supplies but didn't have any on hand? These situations can range in urgency from a child needing a bandage for a small cut or scrape to helping someone who is badly hurt and there are no available first responders. Time is critical when someone is injured, and even small injuries can become big injuries without immediate assistance. To address this, we've put together the ASR Outdoor 50 Piece First Aid Kit containing supplies to help you treat minor injuries and wounds, which will provide some peace of mind and ensure you have the ability to respond quickly until medical professionals can arrive.

Inside of the first response kit, you'll find supplies for cleaning and protecting wounds to assist in your first response efforts. The cleaning supplies included are 2 alcohol wipes, 2 sting relief wipes, and 2 antiseptic cleaning wipes. To protect the wound once it's been thoroughly cleaned, we've also included 10 cotton swabs, 10 large adhesive bandages (72mm x 19mm), 10 medium bandages (56mm x 19mm), 10 small bandages (40mm x 10mm), and 2 gauze pads. These different sized bandages along with the additional supplies should be able to address the most common minor injuries such as a cut, scrape, burn or blister.

In addition to all of these first aid supplies, we've included a bright red waterproof plastic container that will protect the supplies in the event that the case becomes submerged or affected by inclement weather. The high-visibility red color will help you locate the kit in poor lighting conditions like in the trunk of a car or if an emergency happens at night. The entire kit measures just 4.25" x 4" x 1.25" and weighs only .2 pounds (3.2 ounces), making it a great size for keeping in your car, boat, bug out bag, camping gear or backpack while traveling. The case also comes with a carabiner and lanyard so you can hang it from your belt or bag. 

There are many reasons to keep a first aid kit nearby, including liability for businesses and employees. When an injury occurs, a first aid kit can save lives and keep you prepared for an accident, which we all know are unexpected. No one wants to think about being sued, and businesses by law are required to keep first aid supplies readily available when there is no first response within 10 minutes. Protect yourself, your family, your business, your employees and strangers with a durable, waterproof, fully stocked first aid kit! We hope you never need it, but in the event that you do, you will be prepared.

title: 10 Inch Triple Riffle Gold Pan Gold Prospecting Equipment, Green
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation
description_html:
Recover more gold with confidence using the our Triple Riffle Gold Pan, designed to maximize gravity separation and help prospectors capture fine gold, flakes, and small nuggets with ease. Featuring three integrated riffle zones, this gold pan improves material stratification as you wash, allowing heavier gold to settle quickly while lighter material is efficiently cleared away.

Made from durable, lightweight plastic, this pan is built for repeated use in rivers, creeks, and streams without bending or warping. The unique gold pan is molded from durable ABS plastic that is UV resistant, rust proof and buoyant in water. 

The triple riffle design offers excellent control during panning, making it ideal for beginners learning proper gold panning technique as well as experienced prospectors who want faster, more efficient gold recovery. A combo riffled and smooth gold trap basin provides a third zone to clearly spot gold as concentrates build.

Use the deep riffles to rough out the raw material, finishing with the shallow riffles to make short work of your final heavy gold concentrates.

BEFORE USE: Gold pan should be seasoned before use by washing off all factory production oils for best results. Dimensions are 10 x 10 x 3 inches.

title: 10 Inch Bottom Dual Riffle Gold Pan Gold Prospecting Equipment, Green
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation
description_html:
ASR Outdoor 10 inch dual riffle gold pan features deep side wall riffles for capturing larger gold nuggets or valuable materials, which are complemented by micro riffles on the bottom of the pan, designed to capture fine specs, nuggets or flakes of gold.

This high impact plastic gold pan is lightweight, easy to use and the most efficient gold panning tool to use today over traditional steel or other metal gold pans. It is molded from durable ABS plastic that is UV resistant, rust proof, buoyant in water and features a built in carabiner clip hole for easy portability alongside your other gold prospecting equipment. Use the deep riffles to rough out the raw material, finishing with the shallow riffles to make short work of your final heavy gold concentrates.
 
• Deep Side Riffles - Catch large gold nuggets before they wash away separating the black sand and gold from lighter colored sediments
• Bottom Gold Trap - Helps to clearly see the gold that collects in the bottom corners as it becomes separated from the remaining black sand, pay dirt or other materials
• Micro Bottom Riffles - This unique pan features bottom micro riffles designed to capture fine gold flecks and small gold nuggets 

This gold pan is great for practicing panning techniques, as well as extraction and recovery, as the specifically designed bottom micro riffles will capture small gold nuggets or flakes with ease. Suitable for new hobbyists or experienced gold prospectors looking to try out a new tool. Good luck!

title: Dual Grit Knife Blade Sharpening Stones, 120/240 (2 Sizes)
category: Home & Garden > Kitchen & Dining > Kitchen Appliances > Knife Sharpeners > Sharpening Stones
description_html:
Bring dull knives and tools back to life with our Dual Grit Sharpening Stone: the simple, reliable way to keep your blades razor sharp. Whether it's your camping knife, kitchen scissors or antique longsword, there's a good chance that there's a blade in your house that's going to need to be sharpened eventually. This sharpening stone is made of extra-hard aluminum oxide, and is double sided with coarse grit and fine grit. The two grit values being: 120 and 240.

Choose the size that fits your needs: Each stone is double-sided with coarse 120 grit and fine 240 grit surfaces, giving you everything needed to restore and refine edges with ease.

Why It Works

Two Levels of Abrasion: The coarse side quickly reshapes and restores dull or nicked edges, while the fine side hones and polishes for a smooth, sharp finish. Amazon

Versatile Performance: Perfect for outdoor knives, pocket tools, chisels, hooks, scissors, and more — ideal for camping gear, workshop tools, or everyday blades. Amazon

Durable & Practical: Made from long-lasting abrasive material that holds up to regular use. The flat, stable build makes sharpening consistent and controlled. Amazon

Whether you’re preparing tools for your next adventure or maintaining essential blades in your kitchen or garage, this dual-grit stone takes the guesswork out of sharpening.

The stone measures: 6" x 2" x 1" OR 8" x 2" x 1"

title: Weather Resistant Nylon Rock Hounding Equipment Tool Bag with Shoulder Strap (18 x 8.5 x 11 inches)
category: Hardware > Hardware Accessories > Tool Storage & Organization > Tool Bags
description_html:
Rock Hounding Tool Bag is a rugged, weather resistant carry all designed for rock hounding, metal detecting and outdoor collecting adventures. Made from durable nylon with reinforced stitching and 13 pockets, it keeps tools, maps, and finds organized and accessible. Features two carry options: top handles and an adjustable shoulder strap that make hauling gear comfortable no matter where your outdoor adventure takes you. 

Hit the great outdoors with the right gear and never miss an overturned treasure hiding in plain sight.

The ASR Outdoor carry-all bag was designed to hold all of your metal detecting gear and rock hounding equipment in one convenient place. It works remarkably well for a multitude of different activities and features a truly classic two-tone design in thick, ripstop nylon that is double stitched at all stress points to ensure that it will last through many years of beach combing with your metal detector in the sand or rock hopping up boulders looking for geodes.

Our tool bag is constructed of heavy-duty, durable nylon that will keep your tools organized and ready to use whenever you need them. The bag itself measures 18" x 9" x 11" when open, and has a sturdy zip closure at the top of the bag. Both sides of the bag feature side pockets so you can have easy access to your most commonly used tools and accessories. The bag has 2 top carry handles, and also comes with a separate adjustable shoulder strap that you can attach to the bag for additional carrying options. The bottom of the bag is built-in, so you don't have to worry about it losing its shape over time. There is an additional storage space underneath the bag that can store heavier tools.

Gold prospecting, metal detecting and rock hounding are great outdoor activities that can be enjoyed by both adults and kids alike. If you're looking to get into these fun hobbies, ASR Outdoor has you covered with the right gear for your activity.

title: 4pc Premium Quality Aluminum Eye Loupe Set for Rock Hounding Geology Gold Prospecting (2.5X 5X 7.5X 10X)
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation
description_html:
Discover the fine details hidden within rocks, minerals, fossils, and gemstones with this 4-Piece Aluminum Loupe Magnifier Set, an essential field tool for geologists, rock hounds, prospectors, and mineral collectors. Designed for close inspection and identification, these compact hand lenses provide multiple magnification levels—typically 2.5x, 5x, 7.5x, and 10x—allowing you to examine surface texture, crystal structure, inclusions, fractures, and mineral grain patterns with precision. The variety of magnifications makes it easy to scan specimens at lower power and then zoom in for detailed analysis of fine geological features.

Each loupe features a clear optical glass lens with approximately 22 mm viewing diameter, providing a wide field of view and crisp magnification for accurate observation in the field or laboratory. The lenses are housed in a durable aluminum body that is lightweight yet rugged enough for outdoor geology work, rock hunting, mineral prospecting, fossil collecting, coin inspection, and gemstone evaluation. The foldable pocket design protects the lens when not in use and makes these loupes easy to carry in a backpack, field bag, or geology kit.

Perfect for rock hounding, mineral identification, gold prospecting, geology field studies, gem inspection, this versatile loupe set gives hobbyists and professionals the ability to closely examine specimens wherever adventure takes them. Whether you're exploring river gravels for gold, studying mineral formations in the field, or inspecting gemstones and fossils, this multi-magnification loupe kit provides the clarity and portability.

title: 20pc Complete Aluminum Storage Container Set for Rock Hounding Gold Prospecting Gemstones Geology

description_html:
Keep your finds protected and organized in the field with this Aluminum Storage Container Set, a practical accessory for rock hounding, geology field work, mineral collecting and gold panning. These lightweight metal containers are designed to safely store small specimens such as gold flakes, pickers, gemstones, mineral samples, paydirt concentrates, small fossils or crystal fragments while you explore rivers, streams, deserts and more. Whether you are prospecting for placer gold or cataloging rock samples, these durable containers make it easy to transport and protect valuable discoveries.

Constructed from lightweight yet durable aluminum, each container features a secure lid that keeps contents protected from dirt, moisture and of course loss while traveling or working in outdoor environments. The corrosion-resistant metal design stands up well to frequent outdoor use and easily fits into a prospecting backpack, rock hounding kit, pocket, tackle box or gold prospecting gear bag. 

Ideal for gold prospectors, mineral collectors, geologists, students and hobby rock hounds, this versatile container set is perfect for organizing samples after panning concentrates, separating interesting rocks in the field or storing recovered gold until you return home. Compact, reusable, and easy to carry these aluminum containers are a smart addition to any gold panning equipment, rock hounding tools, geology field kit or mineral identification kit, helping you keep your discoveries safe.

title: Mini Stick On LED Lights 6 Pack Battery Operated Puck Lights with Magnet and Adhesive for Camping Gear RV Tool Boxes
category: Hardware > Tools > Flashlights & Headlamps > Flashlights > Handheld Torches
description_html:
Add quick, convenient lighting wherever you need it with the ASR Outdoor Mini Stick-On LED Lights, a compact and versatile lighting solution for camping gear, RV storage, tool boxes, tackle boxes, closets, vehicles, and outdoor equipment. Each pack includes six battery-operated LED puck lights, designed to provide bright, reliable illumination in tight or dark spaces where traditional lighting isn’t practical.

Powered by energy-efficient SMD LED technology, each light produces 50 lumens of bright white light, making them perfect for lighting up small compartments, storage bins, and gear bags. These push-on LED lights are simple to operate—just press the center to turn the light on or off for instant illumination whenever you need it.

Each light runs on long-lasting CR2032 batteries (included), providing dependable lighting without the need for wiring or charging. Whether you're organizing gear in your garage, setting up lighting inside your RV, or adding visibility to a toolbox or tackle box, these battery-powered LED lights offer a quick and easy lighting solution.

Designed for flexibility, each light features a magnetic base that securely attaches to metal surfaces such as tool boxes, vehicles, and equipment cases. The included adhesive backing allows the lights to be mounted on non-metal surfaces like cabinets, walls, storage containers, or camping bins. This makes them ideal for RV lighting, camping storage lighting, boat compartments, closets, glove compartments, backpacks, and outdoor gear kits.

Compact, lightweight, and easy to install, the ASR Outdoor Mini LED Stick-On Lights are a practical addition to your camping equipment, travel gear, RV accessories, outdoor storage systems, and everyday organization tools. Whether you're lighting up a dark storage area, organizing outdoor gear, or adding portable lighting to your vehicle or campsite, these mini battery LED lights provide simple and dependable illumination.

title: Waterproof Pocket Notebook All Weather Field Notes Journal (50 Sheets with Pencil)
category: Office Supplies > General Office Supplies > Paper Products > Notebooks & Notepads > Pocket Notebooks
description_html:
Never let rain, mud, or harsh outdoor conditions stop you from recording important notes. The ASR Outdoor Waterproof Pocket Notebook is designed for adventurers, field professionals, and anyone who needs reliable note-taking in unpredictable environments. Built with durable waterproof and tear-resistant materials, this compact notebook keeps your notes safe and legible whether you're hiking remote trails, camping in the rain, or working outdoors. The weather-resistant pages allow you to write clearly with graphite, preventing smudging and ensuring your notes remain readable even in damp conditions.

Compact and practical, this pocket-sized notebook measures approximately 3 x 5 inches and easily fits in backpacks, jacket pockets, field kits, or survival bags. Despite its small size, the notebook contains 50 wide-ruled sheets, providing plenty of space for recording observations, jotting down reminders, sketching maps, or keeping track of measurements in the field. The bright green cover increases visibility in low-light or outdoor environments, making it easy to locate in your gear or pack.

Designed for convenience, the notebook also includes a compact 3-inch graphite pencil, allowing you to write immediately without needing additional tools. Unlike ink pens that may leak or fail in extreme temperatures, graphite performs reliably in a variety of weather conditions. For added utility, the notebook features a built-in ruler with both inch and millimeter measurements, making it a practical companion for quick measurements while working outdoors.

Whether you're documenting a hiking route, recording field notes, planning a camping trip, or keeping an emergency log, the ASR Outdoor Waterproof Notebook is built to handle the elements. Lightweight, durable, and easy to carry, it's a dependable addition to any camping gear kit, hiking pack, emergency preparedness bag, or everyday carry setup.

title: Stainless Steel Signaling Mirror – Emergency Survival Mirror for Hiking, Camping & Outdoor Safety
category: Home & Garden > Emergency Preparedness > Emergency Tools & Kits
description_html:
Stay prepared for the unexpected with the ASR Outdoor Stainless Steel Signaling Mirror, a lightweight and durable tool designed for outdoor safety and emergency signaling. Compact yet highly reflective, this mirror allows you to signal rescuers, passing aircraft, or other adventurers by reflecting sunlight over long distances—an essential capability for wilderness survival situations. Survival signal mirrors are commonly included in emergency kits because their reflective surface can attract attention even from far away.

Constructed from high-quality stainless steel, this signaling mirror is designed to be more durable than typical plastic or acrylic alternatives. The double-sided polished finish provides a clear reflective surface, while the slim 0.3 mm thickness keeps the mirror lightweight and easy to carry. Measuring approximately 3 x 4 inches, it fits comfortably in backpacks, survival kits, emergency bags, or pockets without adding unnecessary weight.

For added versatility, the mirror features a lanyard attachment hole, allowing it to be easily secured to gear, backpacks, or emergency kits so it’s always within reach when needed. Whether you’re hiking deep trails, camping in remote areas, boating, or building a wilderness survival kit, this compact signaling mirror is a dependable piece of safety gear.

Reliable, lightweight, and built for real outdoor use, the ASR Outdoor Signaling Mirror is a smart addition to any camping kit, hiking pack, bug-out bag, or emergency preparedness setup.

Features:

  • Durable stainless steel construction

  • Double-sided reflective mirror finish

  • Compact 3" x 4" size for easy portability

  • Ultra-thin 0.3 mm thickness

  • Lanyard hole for attaching to packs or gear

  • Shatterproof design for dependable outdoor use

  • Ideal for camping, hiking, survival kits, emergency preparedness, and outdoor adventures

title: Waterproof Emergency Rain Poncho Lightweight Camping & Hiking Rain Protection (Clear, 1pk)
category: Apparel & Accessories > Clothing > Outerwear > Coats & Jackets > Ponchos
description_html:
Be prepared when the weather changes unexpectedly with the ASR Outdoor Emergency Rain Poncho. Designed for portability and convenience, this lightweight rain poncho provides quick protection from rain and wet conditions while taking up minimal space in your pack or gear bag. Whether you're hiking a trail, attending an outdoor event, camping, or preparing an emergency kit, this compact poncho helps keep you dry when you need it most.

Constructed from durable polyethylene, the poncho offers reliable water-resistant protection while remaining extremely lightweight and easy to carry. Polyethylene rain ponchos are commonly used for emergency rain gear because they are compact, flexible, and effective at keeping clothing dry during sudden weather changes.

The poncho features a roomy hood and loose fit design, making it comfortable to wear over clothing or backpacks during rainy conditions. Its one-size-fits-most design allows it to be used by a wide range of people, making it a practical choice for families, outdoor enthusiasts, and emergency preparedness kits.

When not in use, the poncho folds down into a compact size that can easily fit in a backpack, glove compartment, purse, or survival kit. This makes it a smart addition to camping gear, hiking packs, travel bags, or bug-out bags, ensuring you always have rain protection within reach.

Lightweight, portable, and dependable, the ASR Outdoor Emergency Rain Poncho is a simple yet essential piece of gear for staying dry during outdoor adventures and unexpected weather.

  • Lightweight polyethylene construction for dependable rain protection

  • Water-resistant material helps keep clothes dry in wet conditions

  • Compact and portable design folds small for easy storage

  • Roomy hood and loose fit for comfortable wear over clothing or gear

  • One size fits most adults and outdoor users

description_html:
Be prepared for unexpected weather and outdoor emergencies with the ASR Outdoor Reflective Emergency Shelter. Designed to provide fast, reliable protection in challenging conditions, this lightweight survival shelter helps shield you from wind, rain, and cold when you need it most. Whether you're hiking remote trails, camping in the backcountry, or building an emergency preparedness kit, this compact shelter offers dependable protection when conditions change quickly.

Constructed from durable reflective material, the shelter helps retain body heat while also providing a barrier from rain and wind. The reflective interior helps bounce heat back toward occupants, which can be especially important during cold or wet conditions in the outdoors. Emergency shelters like this are commonly carried in survival kits because they provide quick protection and insulation during unexpected situations.

Despite its rugged performance, the shelter remains lightweight and compact, making it easy to carry in backpacks, emergency kits, bug-out bags, or vehicle preparedness kits. Once deployed, the shelter provides coverage for up to two adults, creating a temporary refuge from the elements during storms, wilderness emergencies, or natural disasters.

Simple to set up and easy to pack away, the ASR Outdoor Emergency Shelter is a practical addition to any outdoor gear setup. Whether you're trekking through unpredictable weather or preparing for emergency scenarios, this shelter provides a quick and reliable solution for staying protected outdoors.

  • Lightweight and compact for easy storage in backpacks and survival kits

  • Provides temporary shelter for up to two people

title: Reusable Thermal Mylar Emergency Blanket Sleeping Bag Bivvy Sack 40um Thickness
category: Home & Garden > Emergency Preparedness > Emergency Blankets
description_html:
Torrential rain, hail, snowstorm or extreme wind, never be caught in the cold without a thermal emergency blanket sleeping bag! Also referred to as a bivvy sack, the ASR Outdoor thermal emergency blanket sleeping bag was engineered to retain body heat and provide protection, warmth and dryness when you’re up against the elements, making it an absolute must-have, essential item in your survival kit, emergency kit or bug out bag. Here are some important product specs to note on the mylar emergency blanket sleeping bag:

- Heavy-duty aluminized polyethylene Mylar material (tear/weather resistant)
- Bright orange exterior color increases visibility to emergency rescuers 
- Reflective interior reflects and retains 95% of generated body heat
- Designed for one single adult (36 inches by 84 inches)
- Extra-thick 40um thickness for prolonged warmth
- Weighs just 5 ounces

The most exceptional and noteworthy quality of the ASR Outdoor reusable thermal Mylar sleeping bag is it’s extra thickness. At 40um’s, it’s almost double the thickness of most competitors, allowing it to prolong warmth, dryness to help your body maintain a normal body temperature. In addition, the emergency blanket sleeping bag will reflect back and retain 95% of your body heat, helping to regulate the circulatory system and to assist in preventing the body from entering a state of shock or hypothermia when caught in extreme weather conditions. 

The ASR Outdoor bivvy sac will keep you warm because of it’s material construction; Made from heavy-duty aluminized polyethylene (PE) Mylar, the emergency blanket sleeping bag is extremely durable and weather-resistant, tear and puncture resistant, waterproof and windproof to be exact. Due to its durability, the sleeping bag can be used for a variety of purposes such as: a reflective warmer, as a rain or wind shield, as ground cover when camping, as a tarp to protect equipment, as an temporary emergency relief shelter (especially if you have a few to spare), as a flag or marker, extra sleeping layer if very cold conditions and more! Notably, the emergency blanket sleeping bag is completely reusable, so be sure to pack it with you when you and your family or friends are packing for the next outdoor adventure or expedition!

The ASR Outdoor Reusable Thermal Mylar Emergency Blanket Sleeping Bag is compact, lightweight and minimal in its design. Weighing just 5 ounces, the emergency blanket sleeping bag while designed to comfortably fit one single adult, rolls up to measure just six by six by three inches, making it easy to store, pack and travel with; a reusable drawstring storage travel bag is also included so you can neatly store it away when not in use. 

As mentioned above, the emergency blanket sleeping bag bivvy sac is an essential item for your survival kit, or bug out bag. If you don’t already stock these in your arsenal of camping, car, survival, trekking, backpacking, emergency or expedition kits or packs, we highly suggest you add a couple as a safety precaution. Quality material construction, compact design, extra thickness, weather resistant, puncture resistant and lightweight, the reusable sleeping bag is above all else, a potential lifesaver for you, your friends and your family when hit with unexpected extreme weather conditions—be prepared with the ASR Outdoor Reusable Thermal Mylar Emergency Blanket Sleeping Bag and stay warm when the weather won’t!

title: 5 Gallon Collapsible Water Container Portable Camping & Emergency Water Storage
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation > Hydration System Accessories
description_html:
Stay prepared and hydrated during outdoor adventures with the ASR Outdoor Collapsible Water Container. Designed for convenience and portability, this flexible water carrier provides a reliable way to store and transport water while taking up minimal space in your gear. Whether you're setting up camp, preparing for emergencies, or storing water for travel, this collapsible container offers a practical solution for outdoor hydration.

With the ability to hold up to 5 gallons (20 liters) of water, this container expands when filled and collapses flat when empty, making it easy to store in backpacks, vehicles, emergency kits, or camping gear bins. The semi-transparent material allows you to quickly check water levels so you always know how much water remains.

Constructed from durable, flexible materials, the container is built to handle outdoor use while remaining lightweight and easy to carry. The integrated handle allows for convenient lifting and transport, while the wide opening and spigot-style valve make it simple to dispense water for drinking, cooking, or washing around camp.

When your adventure is over, simply empty the container and fold it down flat for compact storage. This space-saving design makes it ideal for camping trips, road travel, RV use, emergency preparedness kits, and everyday outdoor activities.

Lightweight, practical, and easy to pack, the ASR Outdoor Collapsible Water Container is an essential piece of gear for anyone who spends time outdoors or wants to be prepared with reliable water storage.

Features:

  • Large 5-gallon (20 liter) capacity for reliable water storage
  • Collapsible design folds flat for compact storage when empty
  • Semi-transparent material allows easy monitoring of water levels
  • Integrated handle for comfortable carrying and transport
  • Spigot valve for convenient water dispensing
  • Ideal for camping, hiking, RV travel, emergency preparedness, and outdoor adventures
