title: Natural Citronella Mosquito Repellent Bracelet Wrist Band (4 Colors)
category: Home & Garden > Household Supplies > Pest Control > Repellents > Animal & Pet Repellents
description_html:
Lightweight, effective, non-toxic, waterproof, comfortable, and employing a natural insect repellent, citronella, as well as essential oils, these mosquito repellant bracelets from ASR Outdoor can help to keep pesky bugs at bay!

In addition, the one size fits all mosquito repellant wrist bands feature a plastic coiled design, making the mosquito repellent bands fully adjustable with lots of stretch; they can be comfortably be worn on either a wrist or ankle (or both!) And, unlike spray-on repellents, the mosquito repellant bracelets don’t leave an oily residue behind on your skin and do not need to be reapplied.

The non-toxic natural mosquito repellent wrist bands work to block an insect’s receptors used to detect humans and animals’ scents. Infused with essential oils proven to deter mosquitos you will be able to keep yourself and your family mosquito-free no matter where your outdoor summer adventures might take you! 

Incredibly lightweight, you won’t even notice you’re wearing the insect repellent bracelet so, grab a stack for your next camping trip or backcountry hike! Packaged in a resealable bag, the mosquito repellent bracelet can easily be thrown into any purse, backpack or travel bag for quick, easy protection from pesky bugs and mosquitoes when you’re on the go, making them ideal for any outdoor activity.

Available colors: red, yellow, green or blue

description_html:
Carry your passion for gold prospecting or gold panning wherever you go, with our Gold Panner or Sluice Box Stainless Steel Carabiner Keychains. 

Designed for outdoor enthusiasts and hobbyists, these keychains feature detailed, prospecting-inspired silhouettes that reflect the tools and lifestyle of real gold seekers. Whether you’re in the field or just want a subtle nod to your favorite outdoor hobby, these designs bring character to your everyday carry.

Made from durable stainless steel, each keychain is built to handle rugged environments without rusting or wearing down, meaning they’ll stand up to use around water, dirt and changing outdoor conditions. The solid construction ensures long-lasting performance, whether clipped to your gear during a day at the river or used daily with your keys.

The integrated carabiner allows for quick and secure attachment to gear, belt loops, keys, backpacks or bags, giving you easy access. The included split ring keeps your keys organized and firmly in place, making it a practical addition to your everyday carry setup or outdoor kit.

title: Mosquito Net with Mounting Kit Travel Camping Essentials Outdoor Canopy, 94.5 Inches
category: Sporting Goods > Outdoor Recreation > Camping & Hiking > Mosquito Nets & Insect Screens > Pyramid Mosquito Nets
description_html:
Ensure a restful night’s sleep with ASR Outdoors fine mesh round mosquito net for camping, travel, backpacking and other outdoor activities! Keep mosquitoes and pesky bugs out of your sleeping area with this large mosquito indoor or outdoor canopy; measuring 131 inches in diameter, the mosquito net is suitable for most size beds and mattresses. 

Importantly, this fine mesh mosquito net in sheer white colorway features 240 holes per square inch, meaning mosquitoes and bugs are out, but that airflow and circulation can still travel within the mosquito netting. The fine mesh material is made from durable polyester, holding up to lots of wear and tear on your travels, backcountry adventures, road trips and more.

A must have item to include with you for travels abroad where mosquitoes could pass on infection, this lightweight mosquito canopy design means the mosquito netting is easy to pack and carry with luggage, backpacking gear, camping gear, emergency preparedness items, survival kits and more. Plus, the mosquito net for bed comes with a mounting kit (hand tools not include), that includes the following: includes x1 hook, x1 wall anchor, x1pc 39 inch white cord, x1pc 24 inch upper hoop and x1 hanging loop.

Lastly, the mosquito net also comes with a reusable and resealable plastic storage zip lock bag for storage when not in use. Stay bug free and enjoy a peaceful, uninterrupted sleep with this camping essentials backpacking gear mosquito net from ASR Outdoor.

Dimensions: 94.5 x 131.5 inches
